SELECT DISTINCTROW [ORDER DETAIL].[Prod Type], [ORDER DETAIL].Accept, Sum([ORDER DETAIL].Price) AS SumOfPrice, ORDER.OID, [ORDER DETAIL].[Line No]
FROM CUSTOMER INNER JOIN ([ORDER] INNER JOIN [ORDER DETAIL] ON ORDER.OID = [ORDER DETAIL].OID) ON CUSTOMER.CID = ORDER.CID
WHERE (((ORDER.[Accept Date])>#12/31/1999#))
GROUP BY [ORDER DETAIL].[Prod Type], [ORDER DETAIL].Accept, ORDER.OID, [ORDER DETAIL].[Line No]
HAVING ((([ORDER DETAIL].[Prod Type])="Hide") AND (([ORDER DETAIL].Accept)=Yes));

SELECT CUSTOMER.Lname, CUSTOMER.Fname, CUSTOMER.Street1, CUSTOMER.City, ORDER.OID, Sum([ORDER DETAIL].Price) AS SumOfPrice, ORDER.[Accept Date]
FROM (CUSTOMER INNER JOIN [ORDER] ON CUSTOMER.CID = ORDER.CID) INNER JOIN [ORDER DETAIL] ON ORDER.OID = [ORDER DETAIL].OID
GROUP BY CUSTOMER.Lname, CUSTOMER.Fname, CUSTOMER.Street1, CUSTOMER.City, ORDER.OID, [ORDER DETAIL].[Prod Type], ORDER.[Accept Date]
HAVING ((([ORDER DETAIL].[Prod Type])="PPHM" Or ([ORDER DETAIL].[Prod Type])="IPM DATA"))
ORDER BY CUSTOMER.Lname, CUSTOMER.Fname;

SELECT DISTINCTROW CUSTOMER.Lname, ORDER.OID, [ORDER DETAIL].[Prod Type], EVENT.Completed, [ORDER DETAIL].[Accepted Date], EVENT.Billed, EVENT.Bill_Date, EVENT.[Paid Amount], EVENT.[Paid Amount 2], EVENT.[Paid Amount 3], EVENT.[Paid Amount 4], EVENT.[Paid  date 2], EVENT.[Paid date 3], EVENT.[Paid date 4], EVENT.[Paid Date 1], EVENT.[Check Number 1], EVENT.[Check Number 2], EVENT.[Check Number 3], EVENT.[Check Number 4], EVENT.[Paid in full], EVENT.[Billed 2], EVENT.[Billed 3], EVENT.[Billed 4], EVENT.[Bill_Date 3], EVENT.[Bill_Date 2], EVENT.[Bill_Date 4]
FROM (CUSTOMER INNER JOIN ([ORDER] INNER JOIN [ORDER DETAIL] ON ORDER.OID = [ORDER DETAIL].OID) ON CUSTOMER.CID = ORDER.CID) LEFT JOIN EVENT ON ([ORDER DETAIL].[Line No] = EVENT.[Line No]) AND ([ORDER DETAIL].OID = EVENT.OID)
WHERE (((EVENT.Completed)=Yes) AND ((EVENT.Billed)=Yes) AND ((EVENT.[Paid in full])=No))
ORDER BY CUSTOMER.Lname;

SELECT ACCOUNTS_R.OID
FROM ACCOUNTS_R;

SELECT CUSTOMER.Source, ORDER.[Proposal Date], CUSTOMER.CID, ORDER.[Work Name], ORDER.OID, ORDER.[Accept Date], Sum([ORDER DETAIL].Price) AS SumOfPrice, [ORDER DETAIL].[Prod Type]
FROM (CUSTOMER INNER JOIN [ORDER] ON CUSTOMER.CID = ORDER.CID) INNER JOIN [ORDER DETAIL] ON ORDER.OID = [ORDER DETAIL].OID
GROUP BY CUSTOMER.Source, ORDER.[Proposal Date], CUSTOMER.CID, ORDER.[Work Name], ORDER.OID, ORDER.[Accept Date], [ORDER DETAIL].[Prod Type]
HAVING (((CUSTOMER.Source) Like "*Angi*") AND ((ORDER.[Proposal Date])>#1/1/2021#) AND ((ORDER.[Accept Date]) Is Not Null))
ORDER BY CUSTOMER.CID;

SELECT DISTINCTROW CUSTOMER.*, ORDER.*, ORDER.OID, [ORDER DETAIL].[Prod Type], [ORDER DETAIL].Description, [ORDER DETAIL].Price, Round([Order Detail.11 Price]*1.04,0) AS Expr1, [ORDER DETAIL].Plant, [ORDER DETAIL].Location, [ORDER DETAIL].Accept, [ORDER DETAIL].Start, [ORDER DETAIL].Pest, [ORDER DETAIL].[Line No], ORDER.[Job Note], ORDER.[Annual Contract], CUSTOMER.[Customer Note], ORDER.[Proposal Date], ORDER.[Accept Date], EVENT.Gallonage, ORDER.[2019 Accepted], ORDER.[2018 Accepted], ORDER.[2017 Accepted], ORDER.[2016 Accepted], ORDER.[2015 Accepted], ORDER.[2014 Accepted], ORDER.[2013 Accepted], ORDER.[2012 Accepted], ORDER.[2011 Accepted], ORDER.[2010 Accepted], ORDER.[2009 Accepted], ORDER.[2008 Accepted], ORDER.[2007 Accepted], ORDER.[2006 Accepted], ORDER.[2005 Accepted], [ORDER DETAIL].[19 Accepted], [ORDER DETAIL].[19 Price], [ORDER DETAIL].[18 Accepted], [ORDER DETAIL].[18 Price], [ORDER DETAIL].[17 Accepted], [ORDER DETAIL].[17 Price], [ORDER DETAIL].[16 Accepted], [ORDER DETAIL].[16 Price], [ORDER DETAIL].[15 Accepted], [ORDER DETAIL].[15 Price], [ORDER DETAIL].[14 Accepted], [ORDER DETAIL].[14 Price], [ORDER DETAIL].[13 Accepted], [ORDER DETAIL].[13 Price], [ORDER DETAIL].[12 Accepted], [ORDER DETAIL].[12 Price], [ORDER DETAIL].[11 Accepted], [ORDER DETAIL].[11 Price], [ORDER DETAIL].[10 Accepted], [ORDER DETAIL].[10 Price], [ORDER DETAIL].[09 Accepted], [ORDER DETAIL].[09 Price], [ORDER DETAIL].[08 Accepted], [ORDER DETAIL].[08 Price], [ORDER DETAIL].[07 Accepted], [ORDER DETAIL].[07 Price]
FROM (CUSTOMER INNER JOIN ([ORDER] INNER JOIN [ORDER DETAIL] ON ORDER.OID = [ORDER DETAIL].OID) ON CUSTOMER.CID = ORDER.CID) LEFT JOIN EVENT ON ([ORDER DETAIL].[Line No] = EVENT.[Line No]) AND ([ORDER DETAIL].OID = EVENT.OID)
WHERE ((([ORDER DETAIL].[Prod Type])="worksheet") AND ((ORDER.[Annual Contract])=Yes) AND ((ORDER.[Proposal Date])<#1/1/2020#))
ORDER BY ORDER.OID, [ORDER DETAIL].[Line No];

SELECT DISTINCTROW CUSTOMER.Lname, ORDER.[Work Street], ORDER.[Work City], CUSTOMER.Map, CUSTOMER.Grid, CUSTOMER.[Evening Phone], [ORDER DETAIL].Location, [ORDER DETAIL].Plant, [ORDER DETAIL].Pest, [Rate] AS Expr1, [Amount] AS Expr2, [ORDER DETAIL].Price, [ORDER DETAIL].[Prod Type]
FROM ((CUSTOMER INNER JOIN [ORDER] ON CUSTOMER.CID = ORDER.CID) INNER JOIN [ORDER DETAIL] ON ORDER.OID = [ORDER DETAIL].OID) LEFT JOIN EVENT ON ([ORDER DETAIL].[Line No] = EVENT.[Line No]) AND ([ORDER DETAIL].OID = EVENT.OID)
WHERE (([ORDER DETAIL].Pest Like "*Winter*") AND ([ORDER DETAIL].[Prod Type]="SPRAY") AND ([ORDER DETAIL].Accept=Yes) AND ([ORDER DETAIL].Start<#11/1/95#) AND (EVENT.Completed=No Or EVENT.Completed Is Null)) OR (([ORDER DETAIL].Pest Like "*Winter*") AND ([ORDER DETAIL].[Prod Type]="PPHM") AND ([ORDER DETAIL].Accept=Yes) AND ([ORDER DETAIL].Start<#11/1/95#) AND (EVENT.Completed=No Or EVENT.Completed Is Null))
ORDER BY ORDER.[Proposal Date] DESC;

SELECT DISTINCTROW CUSTOMER.Lname, CUSTOMER.Street1, CUSTOMER.City, CUSTOMER.Map, CUSTOMER.Grid, [ORDER DETAIL].Plant, [ORDER DETAIL].Pest, [ORDER DETAIL].Price, EVENT.Completed, EVENT.Complete_Date, [ORDER DETAIL].Application
FROM ((CUSTOMER INNER JOIN [ORDER] ON CUSTOMER.CID = ORDER.CID) INNER JOIN [ORDER DETAIL] ON ORDER.OID = [ORDER DETAIL].OID) LEFT JOIN EVENT ON ([ORDER DETAIL].[Line No] = EVENT.[Line No]) AND ([ORDER DETAIL].OID = EVENT.OID)
WHERE (([ORDER DETAIL].[Prod Type]="LAWN") AND ([ORDER DETAIL].Accept=Yes))
ORDER BY CUSTOMER.Map;

SELECT DISTINCTROW CUSTOMER.Lname, CUSTOMER.Street1, CUSTOMER.City, CUSTOMER.Map, CUSTOMER.Grid, [ORDER DETAIL].Plant, [ORDER DETAIL].Pest, [ORDER DETAIL].Price, EVENT.Completed, EVENT.Complete_Date, [ORDER DETAIL].Application, [ORDER DETAIL].Frequency, EVENT.[Event Price], EVENT.Event_No, EVENT.Event_Date
FROM ((CUSTOMER INNER JOIN [ORDER] ON CUSTOMER.CID = ORDER.CID) INNER JOIN [ORDER DETAIL] ON ORDER.OID = [ORDER DETAIL].OID) LEFT JOIN EVENT ON ([ORDER DETAIL].[Line No] = EVENT.[Line No]) AND ([ORDER DETAIL].OID = EVENT.OID)
WHERE (([ORDER DETAIL].Pest Like "********** VISITS************") AND ([ORDER DETAIL].[Prod Type]="pphm") AND ([ORDER DETAIL].Accept=Yes)) OR (([ORDER DETAIL].Pest Like "Ticks*******************" Or [ORDER DETAIL].Pest Like "Health*****") AND ([ORDER DETAIL].[Prod Type]="pphm"))
ORDER BY CUSTOMER.Lname;

SELECT DISTINCTROW CUSTOMER.Lname, CUSTOMER.Street1, CUSTOMER.City, CUSTOMER.Map, CUSTOMER.Grid, [ORDER DETAIL].Plant, [ORDER DETAIL].Pest, [ORDER DETAIL].Price, EVENT.Completed, EVENT.Complete_Date, [ORDER DETAIL].Application, EVENT.Completed
FROM ((CUSTOMER INNER JOIN [ORDER] ON CUSTOMER.CID = ORDER.CID) INNER JOIN [ORDER DETAIL] ON ORDER.OID = [ORDER DETAIL].OID) LEFT JOIN EVENT ON ([ORDER DETAIL].[Line No] = EVENT.[Line No]) AND ([ORDER DETAIL].OID = EVENT.OID)
WHERE (([ORDER DETAIL].Pest Like "Health********") AND ([ORDER DETAIL].Start>#02/28/95#) AND ([ORDER DETAIL].End<#07/1/95#) AND ([ORDER DETAIL].[Prod Type]="SPRAY") AND ([ORDER DETAIL].Accept=Yes))
ORDER BY CUSTOMER.Lname;

SELECT DISTINCTROW CUSTOMER.Lname, ORDER.[Work Street], ORDER.[Work City], CUSTOMER.Map, CUSTOMER.Grid, [ORDER DETAIL].Location, [ORDER DETAIL].Plant, [ORDER DETAIL].Pest, [ORDER DETAIL].Price, EVENT.Completed, EVENT.Complete_Date, [ORDER DETAIL].Application, EVENT.Completed, [ORDER DETAIL].Accept
FROM ((CUSTOMER INNER JOIN [ORDER] ON CUSTOMER.CID = ORDER.CID) INNER JOIN [ORDER DETAIL] ON ORDER.OID = [ORDER DETAIL].OID) LEFT JOIN EVENT ON ([ORDER DETAIL].[Line No] = EVENT.[Line No]) AND ([ORDER DETAIL].OID = EVENT.OID)
WHERE (([ORDER DETAIL].Accept=Yes) AND ([ORDER DETAIL].Start>#03/30/95#) AND ([ORDER DETAIL].End<#11/30/95#) AND ([ORDER DETAIL].[Prod Type]="SPRAY")) OR (([ORDER DETAIL].Pest Like "Ticks***************") AND ([ORDER DETAIL].Accept=Yes) AND ([ORDER DETAIL].Start>#04/1/95#) AND ([ORDER DETAIL].End<#11/30/95#) AND ([ORDER DETAIL].[Prod Type]="SPRAY"))
ORDER BY CUSTOMER.Lname;

SELECT DISTINCTROW CUSTOMER.CID, ORDER.OID, [ORDER DETAIL].[Line No], CUSTOMER.Lname, [ORDER DETAIL].Location, [ORDER DETAIL].Plant, [ORDER DETAIL].Pest, [ORDER DETAIL].Price, [ORDER DETAIL].[Prod Type], CUSTOMER.Company, [ORDER DETAIL].Start, [ORDER DETAIL].Accept, ORDER.[Work Street], ORDER.[Work City], CUSTOMER.[E-Mail], EVENT.Complete_Date
FROM (CUSTOMER INNER JOIN ([ORDER] INNER JOIN [ORDER DETAIL] ON ORDER.OID = [ORDER DETAIL].OID) ON CUSTOMER.CID = ORDER.CID) LEFT JOIN EVENT ON ([ORDER DETAIL].[Line No] = EVENT.[Line No]) AND ([ORDER DETAIL].OID = EVENT.OID)
WHERE ((([ORDER DETAIL].Plant) Like "*Beech*") AND (([ORDER DETAIL].Pest) Like "Beech*") AND (([ORDER DETAIL].[Prod Type]) Not Like "Worksheet") AND (([ORDER DETAIL].Accept)=Yes))
ORDER BY CUSTOMER.CID, ORDER.OID, [ORDER DETAIL].[Line No], [ORDER DETAIL].[Accepted Date] DESC;

SELECT DISTINCTROW CUSTOMER.CID, ORDER.OID, [ORDER DETAIL].[Line No], CUSTOMER.Lname, [ORDER DETAIL].Location, [ORDER DETAIL].Plant, [ORDER DETAIL].Description, [ORDER DETAIL].Accept, ORDER.[Work Street], ORDER.[Work City], CUSTOMER.[E-Mail]
FROM (CUSTOMER INNER JOIN ([ORDER] INNER JOIN [ORDER DETAIL] ON ORDER.OID = [ORDER DETAIL].OID) ON CUSTOMER.CID = ORDER.CID) LEFT JOIN EVENT ON ([ORDER DETAIL].[Line No] = EVENT.[Line No]) AND ([ORDER DETAIL].OID = EVENT.OID)
WHERE ((([ORDER DETAIL].Plant) Like "*Beech*") AND (([ORDER DETAIL].Description) Not Like "*Take down*") AND (([ORDER DETAIL].[Prod Type])="worksheet"))
ORDER BY CUSTOMER.CID, ORDER.OID, [ORDER DETAIL].[Line No], [ORDER DETAIL].[Accepted Date] DESC;

SELECT DISTINCTROW CUSTOMER.Fname, CUSTOMER.Lname, CUSTOMER.Street1, CUSTOMER.City, ORDER.OID, [ORDER DETAIL].[Line No], [ORDER DETAIL].Location, [ORDER DETAIL].Plant, [ORDER DETAIL].Description, [ORDER DETAIL].Price, EVENT.Billed, EVENT.Bill_Date, EVENT.[Billed 2], EVENT.[Bill_Date 2]
FROM (CUSTOMER INNER JOIN ([ORDER] INNER JOIN [ORDER DETAIL] ON ORDER.OID = [ORDER DETAIL].OID) ON CUSTOMER.CID = ORDER.CID) LEFT JOIN EVENT ON ([ORDER DETAIL].[Line No] = EVENT.[Line No]) AND ([ORDER DETAIL].OID = EVENT.OID)
WHERE (((EVENT.Billed)=No) AND ((EVENT.Completed)=Yes) AND ((EVENT.[To Bill])=Yes) AND (([ORDER DETAIL].[Prod Type])="WORKSHEET" Or ([ORDER DETAIL].[Prod Type])="INFO") AND (([ORDER DETAIL].Accept)=Yes) AND ((EVENT.[Paid in full])=No Or (EVENT.[Paid in full]) Is Null))
ORDER BY CUSTOMER.Lname, ORDER.OID;

SELECT DISTINCTROW [Sequence] AS Expr1, ORDER.OID, [ORDER DETAIL].[Line No], CUSTOMER.Lname, ORDER.[Work Street], CUSTOMER.Map, ORDER.[Work City], CUSTOMER.Grid, CUSTOMER.[Evening Phone], [ORDER DETAIL].Location, [ORDER DETAIL].Plant, [ORDER DETAIL].Pest, [ORDER DETAIL].Price, [ORDER DETAIL].[Prod Type], CUSTOMER.[Customer Note], ORDER.[Job Note], CUSTOMER.Company, [ORDER DETAIL].Start, [ORDER DETAIL].Accept
FROM (CUSTOMER INNER JOIN ([ORDER] INNER JOIN [ORDER DETAIL] ON ORDER.OID = [ORDER DETAIL].OID) ON CUSTOMER.CID = ORDER.CID) LEFT JOIN EVENT ON ([ORDER DETAIL].[Line No] = EVENT.[Line No]) AND ([ORDER DETAIL].OID = EVENT.OID)
WHERE ((([ORDER DETAIL].Pest) Like "*inject*") AND (([ORDER DETAIL].[Prod Type])="SPRAY") AND (([ORDER DETAIL].Accept)=Yes) AND ((EVENT.Completed)=No Or (EVENT.Completed) Is Null))
ORDER BY [ORDER DETAIL].[Accepted Date] DESC;

SELECT DISTINCTROW CUSTOMER.Lname, CUSTOMER.Fname, [ORDER DETAIL].Plant, ORDER.OID, [ORDER DETAIL].[Line No], [ORDER DETAIL].Start, [ORDER DETAIL].Accept, CUSTOMER.[E-Mail]
FROM (CUSTOMER INNER JOIN ([ORDER] INNER JOIN [ORDER DETAIL] ON ORDER.OID = [ORDER DETAIL].OID) ON CUSTOMER.CID = ORDER.CID) LEFT JOIN EVENT ON ([ORDER DETAIL].[Line No] = EVENT.[Line No]) AND ([ORDER DETAIL].OID = EVENT.OID)
WHERE ((([ORDER DETAIL].Plant) Like "*Boxwood*") AND ((CUSTOMER.[E-Mail]) Like "*@*"))
ORDER BY CUSTOMER.Lname, ORDER.OID, [ORDER DETAIL].[Line No], [ORDER DETAIL].[Accepted Date] DESC;

SELECT CUSTOMER.Lname, EVENT.[Paid Amount], EVENT.[Paid Amount 2], EVENT.[Check Number 1], ORDER.OID, EVENT.[Paid  date 2]
FROM ((CUSTOMER INNER JOIN [ORDER] ON CUSTOMER.CID = ORDER.CID) INNER JOIN [ORDER DETAIL] ON ORDER.OID = [ORDER DETAIL].OID) LEFT JOIN EVENT ON ([ORDER DETAIL].[Line No] = EVENT.[Line No]) AND ([ORDER DETAIL].OID = EVENT.OID)
GROUP BY CUSTOMER.Lname, EVENT.[Paid Amount], EVENT.[Paid Amount 2], EVENT.[Check Number 1], EVENT.[Check Number 2], ORDER.OID, EVENT.[Paid  date 2]
HAVING (((EVENT.[Paid  date 2])>#9/29/99#));

SELECT CUSTOMER.Fname, CUSTOMER.Lname, CUSTOMER.Company, CUSTOMER.Street1, CUSTOMER.City, CUSTOMER.State, CUSTOMER.Zip, CUSTOMER.[Evening Phone], CUSTOMER.CID
FROM CUSTOMER
GROUP BY CUSTOMER.Fname, CUSTOMER.Lname, CUSTOMER.Company, CUSTOMER.Street1, CUSTOMER.City, CUSTOMER.State, CUSTOMER.Zip, CUSTOMER.[Evening Phone], CUSTOMER.CID, CUSTOMER.[Wood Chips]
HAVING (((CUSTOMER.[Wood Chips])=Yes))
ORDER BY CUSTOMER.Lname;

SELECT CUSTOMER.Fname, CUSTOMER.Map, CUSTOMER.Grid, CUSTOMER.Lname, CUSTOMER.Street1, CUSTOMER.City, CUSTOMER.Zip, CUSTOMER.Phone, CUSTOMER.[Evening Phone], CUSTOMER.[Cell Phone], CUSTOMER.[Customer Note], CUSTOMER.CID
FROM CUSTOMER
GROUP BY CUSTOMER.Fname, CUSTOMER.Map, CUSTOMER.Grid, CUSTOMER.Lname, CUSTOMER.Street1, CUSTOMER.City, CUSTOMER.Zip, CUSTOMER.Phone, CUSTOMER.[Evening Phone], CUSTOMER.[Cell Phone], CUSTOMER.[Customer Note], CUSTOMER.CID, CUSTOMER.[Wood Chips], CUSTOMER.State, CUSTOMER.Fax, CUSTOMER.Firewood
HAVING (((CUSTOMER.[Wood Chips])=Yes))
ORDER BY CUSTOMER.Map, CUSTOMER.Grid, CUSTOMER.Lname;

nodes.id: query:Completed Cash Total by Product type
nodes.name: Completed Cash Total by Product type

properties.sql:
SELECT DISTINCTROW [ORDER DETAIL].[Prod Type], [ORDER DETAIL].Accept, EVENT.Completed, Sum([ORDER DETAIL].Price) AS SumOfPrice, EVENT.[Paid in full], ORDER.[Ck # 1]
FROM EVENT INNER JOIN (CUSTOMER INNER JOIN ([ORDER] INNER JOIN [ORDER DETAIL] ON ORDER.OID = [ORDER DETAIL].OID) ON CUSTOMER.CID = ORDER.CID) ON (EVENT.[Line No] = [ORDER DETAIL].[Line No]) AND (EVENT.OID = [ORDER DETAIL].OID)
WHERE (((ORDER.[Accept Date])>#12/31/1999#))
GROUP BY [ORDER DETAIL].[Prod Type], [ORDER DETAIL].Accept, EVENT.Completed, EVENT.[Paid in full], ORDER.[Ck # 1]
HAVING ((([ORDER DETAIL].[Prod Type]) Not Like "IPM DATA") AND (([ORDER DETAIL].Accept)=Yes) AND ((EVENT.Completed)=Yes) AND ((EVENT.[Paid in full])=Yes) AND ((ORDER.[Ck # 1]) Is Null));

SELECT DISTINCTROW [ORDER DETAIL].[Prod Type], [ORDER DETAIL].Accept, EVENT.Completed, Sum([ORDER DETAIL].Price) AS SumOfPrice
FROM EVENT INNER JOIN (CUSTOMER INNER JOIN ([ORDER] INNER JOIN [ORDER DETAIL] ON ORDER.OID = [ORDER DETAIL].OID) ON CUSTOMER.CID = ORDER.CID) ON (EVENT.[Line No] = [ORDER DETAIL].[Line No]) AND (EVENT.OID = [ORDER DETAIL].OID)
WHERE (((ORDER.[Accept Date])>#12/31/1999#))
GROUP BY [ORDER DETAIL].[Prod Type], [ORDER DETAIL].Accept, EVENT.Completed
HAVING ((([ORDER DETAIL].[Prod Type]) Not Like "IPM DATA") AND (([ORDER DETAIL].Accept)=Yes) AND ((EVENT.Completed)=Yes));

SELECT DISTINCTROW CUSTOMER.Title, CUSTOMER.Fname, CUSTOMER.Lname, CUSTOMER.Company, CUSTOMER.Street1, CUSTOMER.City, CUSTOMER.State, CUSTOMER.Zip, ORDER.OID, ORDER.[Work Name], ORDER.[Work Street], ORDER.[Work City], ORDER.[Work State], ORDER.[Work Zip], [ORDER DETAIL].[Line No], [ORDER DETAIL].Price, [ORDER DETAIL].Plant, [ORDER DETAIL].Location, [ORDER DETAIL].Description, CUSTOMER.CID, EVENT.Complete_Date, EVENT.Bill_Date, EVENT.[Paid Amount], CUSTOMER.[Evening Phone], CUSTOMER.Fax, CUSTOMER.Phone, [ORDER DETAIL].[Prod Type], CUSTOMER.Phone, CUSTOMER.[Evening Phone], EVENT.[Paid Amount 2], EVENT.[Paid Amount 3], Sum([ORDER DETAIL].Price) AS SumOfPrice
FROM (CUSTOMER INNER JOIN ([ORDER] INNER JOIN [ORDER DETAIL] ON ORDER.OID = [ORDER DETAIL].OID) ON CUSTOMER.CID = ORDER.CID) LEFT JOIN EVENT ON ([ORDER DETAIL].[Line No] = EVENT.[Line No]) AND ([ORDER DETAIL].OID = EVENT.OID)
GROUP BY CUSTOMER.Title, CUSTOMER.Fname, CUSTOMER.Lname, CUSTOMER.Company, CUSTOMER.Street1, CUSTOMER.City, CUSTOMER.State, CUSTOMER.Zip, ORDER.OID, ORDER.[Work Name], ORDER.[Work Street], ORDER.[Work City], ORDER.[Work State], ORDER.[Work Zip], [ORDER DETAIL].[Line No], [ORDER DETAIL].Price, [ORDER DETAIL].Plant, [ORDER DETAIL].Location, [ORDER DETAIL].Description, CUSTOMER.CID, EVENT.Complete_Date, EVENT.Bill_Date, EVENT.[Paid Amount], CUSTOMER.[Evening Phone], CUSTOMER.Fax, CUSTOMER.Phone, [ORDER DETAIL].[Prod Type], CUSTOMER.Phone, CUSTOMER.[Evening Phone], EVENT.[Paid Amount 2], EVENT.[Paid Amount 3], [ORDER DETAIL].Accept, EVENT.Completed, EVENT.[To Bill], EVENT.[Paid in full], EVENT.Billed
HAVING ((([ORDER DETAIL].[Prod Type])="WORKSHEET") AND (([ORDER DETAIL].Accept)=Yes) AND ((EVENT.Completed)=Yes) AND ((EVENT.[To Bill])=Yes) AND ((EVENT.[Paid in full])=No) AND ((EVENT.Billed)=Yes));

SELECT CUSTOMER.Fname, CUSTOMER.Lname, CUSTOMER.Street1, CUSTOMER.City, CUSTOMER.Zip, CUSTOMER.[Customer Note], CUSTOMER.CID
FROM CUSTOMER
GROUP BY CUSTOMER.Fname, CUSTOMER.Lname, CUSTOMER.Street1, CUSTOMER.City, CUSTOMER.Zip, CUSTOMER.[Customer Note], CUSTOMER.CID, CUSTOMER.State
HAVING (((CUSTOMER.Lname)="Resident"))
ORDER BY CUSTOMER.CID;

SELECT CUSTOMER.CID, CUSTOMER.Title, CUSTOMER.Fname, CUSTOMER.Lname, CUSTOMER.Company, CUSTOMER.Street1, CUSTOMER.City, CUSTOMER.State, CUSTOMER.Zip, CUSTOMER.Source, CUSTOMER.Map, CUSTOMER.Grid, CUSTOMER.Phone, CUSTOMER.Fax, CUSTOMER.[Evening Phone], CUSTOMER.[Customer Note], CUSTOMER.[Cell Phone], CUSTOMER.[E-Mail], CUSTOMER.Referance, CUSTOMER.[Tax Exempt], CUSTOMER.[Wood Chips], CUSTOMER.Firewood
FROM CUSTOMER;

SELECT DISTINCTROW [ORDER DETAIL].Accept, No AS Expr1, EVENT.Completed, EVENT.[To Bill], EVENT.Billed, EVENT.[Billed 2], EVENT.[Billed 3], EVENT.[Billed 4], EVENT.[Paid in full], [Blank] AS Expr2, ORDER.[Accept Date], EVENT.Complete_Date, EVENT.Bill_Date, EVENT.[Bill_Date 2], EVENT.[Bill_Date 3], EVENT.[Bill_Date 4], ORDER.[Pd Date 1], ORDER.[Pd Date 2], ORDER.[Pd Date 3], ORDER.[Pd Date 4], ORDER.[Pd Date 5], ORDER.[Pd Date 6], ORDER.[Ck # 1], ORDER.[Ck # 2], ORDER.[Ck # 3], ORDER.[Ck # 4], ORDER.[Ck # 5], ORDER.[Ck # 6], ORDER.[Pd Amt 1], ORDER.[Pd Amt 2], ORDER.[Pd Amt 3], ORDER.[Pd Amt 4], ORDER.[Pd Amt 5], ORDER.[Pd Amt 6], [ORDER DETAIL].[Accepted Date], EVENT.Gallonage, [ORDER DETAIL].Start, ORDER.[PrePaid Disc Given], ORDER.[Write-Off Given]
FROM ([ORDER] INNER JOIN [ORDER DETAIL] ON ORDER.OID = [ORDER DETAIL].OID) LEFT JOIN EVENT ON ([ORDER DETAIL].[Line No] = EVENT.[Line No]) AND ([ORDER DETAIL].OID = EVENT.OID)
WHERE (((ORDER.[Annual Contract])=Yes) AND (([ORDER DETAIL].[Prod Type])="WORKSHEET" Or ([ORDER DETAIL].[Prod Type])="info" Or ([ORDER DETAIL].[Prod Type])="chips")) OR (((ORDER.[Annual Contract])=Yes) AND (([ORDER DETAIL].[Prod Type])="Hide") AND (([ORDER DETAIL].Description) Is Not Null) AND (([ORDER DETAIL].Pest) Is Null))
ORDER BY ORDER.[Pd Amt 1] DESC , ORDER.OID, [ORDER DETAIL].[Line No];

SELECT DISTINCTROW [ORDER DETAIL].Accept, No AS Expr1, EVENT.Completed, EVENT.[To Bill], EVENT.Billed, EVENT.[Billed 2], EVENT.[Billed 3], EVENT.[Billed 4], EVENT.[Paid in full], [Blank] AS Expr2, ORDER.[Accept Date], ORDER.[Service Declined], [ORDER DETAIL].[Accepted Date], EVENT.Complete_Date, ORDER.[Pd Date 1], ORDER.[Pd Date 2], ORDER.[Pd Date 3], ORDER.[Pd Date 4], ORDER.[Pd Date 5], ORDER.[Pd Date 6], ORDER.[Ck # 1], ORDER.[Ck # 2], ORDER.[Ck # 3], ORDER.[Ck # 4], ORDER.[Ck # 5], ORDER.[Ck # 6], ORDER.[Pd Amt 1], ORDER.[Pd Amt 2], ORDER.[Pd Amt 3], ORDER.[Pd Amt 4], ORDER.[Pd Amt 5], ORDER.[Pd Amt 6], ORDER.[PrePaid Disc Given], ORDER.[Write-Off Given], EVENT.Bill_Date, EVENT.[Bill_Date 2], EVENT.[Bill_Date 3], EVENT.[Bill_Date 4], EVENT.Gallonage, [ORDER DETAIL].Start
FROM ([ORDER] INNER JOIN [ORDER DETAIL] ON ORDER.OID = [ORDER DETAIL].OID) LEFT JOIN EVENT ON ([ORDER DETAIL].[Line No] = EVENT.[Line No]) AND ([ORDER DETAIL].OID = EVENT.OID)
WHERE (((No)=No) AND (([ORDER DETAIL].[Prod Type])="Spray" Or ([ORDER DETAIL].[Prod Type])="PPHM" Or ([ORDER DETAIL].[Prod Type])="info drf" Or ([ORDER DETAIL].[Prod Type])="info merit" Or ([ORDER DETAIL].[Prod Type])="info pphm" Or ([ORDER DETAIL].[Prod Type])="Info spray" Or ([ORDER DETAIL].[Prod Type])="ipm data")) OR (((No)=No) AND (([ORDER DETAIL].[Prod Type])="Hide") AND (([ORDER DETAIL].Description) Is Null)) OR (((No)=No) AND (([ORDER DETAIL].[Prod Type])="Hide") AND (([ORDER DETAIL].Description) Is Not Null) AND (([ORDER DETAIL].Pest) Is Not Null))
ORDER BY ORDER.[Pd Amt 1] DESC;

SELECT DISTINCTROW CUSTOMER.Title, CUSTOMER.Fname, CUSTOMER.Lname, ORDER.CID, ORDER.OID, [ORDER DETAIL].[Prod Type], Sum([ORDER DETAIL].Price) AS SumOfPrice, EVENT.Bill_Date, EVENT.[Paid Amount], EVENT.[Check Number 1], EVENT.[Paid in full], EVENT.Deposited, EVENT.[Deposited date]
FROM (CUSTOMER INNER JOIN ([ORDER] INNER JOIN [ORDER DETAIL] ON ORDER.OID = [ORDER DETAIL].OID) ON CUSTOMER.CID = ORDER.CID) LEFT JOIN EVENT ON ([ORDER DETAIL].[Line No] = EVENT.[Line No]) AND ([ORDER DETAIL].OID = EVENT.OID)
WHERE (((EVENT.[To be Deposited])=Yes))
GROUP BY CUSTOMER.Title, CUSTOMER.Fname, CUSTOMER.Lname, ORDER.CID, ORDER.OID, [ORDER DETAIL].[Prod Type], EVENT.Bill_Date, EVENT.[Paid Amount], EVENT.[Check Number 1], EVENT.[Paid in full], EVENT.Deposited, EVENT.[Deposited date]
HAVING (((EVENT.Deposited)=Yes))
ORDER BY CUSTOMER.Lname;

SELECT DISTINCTROW CUSTOMER.Lname, ORDER.[Work Street], EVENT.Completed, EVENT.Complete_Date, EVENT.Gallonage, [ORDER DETAIL].OID, [ORDER DETAIL].[Line No], [ORDER DETAIL].Location, [ORDER DETAIL].Plant, [ORDER DETAIL].Pest, [ORDER DETAIL].Price
FROM (CUSTOMER INNER JOIN ([ORDER] INNER JOIN [ORDER DETAIL] ON ORDER.OID = [ORDER DETAIL].OID) ON CUSTOMER.CID = ORDER.CID) LEFT JOIN EVENT ON ([ORDER DETAIL].[Line No] = EVENT.[Line No]) AND ([ORDER DETAIL].OID = EVENT.OID)
WHERE (((CUSTOMER.Lname)=[Forms]![CUSTOMER]![lname]) AND (([ORDER DETAIL].Pest) Like "Health****") AND (([ORDER DETAIL].Start)<Now()) AND (([ORDER DETAIL].[Prod Type])="SPRAY" Or ([ORDER DETAIL].[Prod Type])="PPHM") AND (([ORDER DETAIL].Accept)=Yes)) OR (((CUSTOMER.Lname)=[Forms]![CUSTOMER]![lname]) AND (([ORDER DETAIL].Start)<Now()) AND (([ORDER DETAIL].[Prod Type])="INFO DRF") AND (([ORDER DETAIL].Accept)=Yes))
ORDER BY EVENT.Complete_Date, [ORDER DETAIL].[Line No];

SELECT DISTINCTROW CUSTOMER.Lname, [ORDER DETAIL].[Line No], ORDER.[Work Street], EVENT.Completed, EVENT.Complete_Date, EVENT.Gallonage, [ORDER DETAIL].Location, [ORDER DETAIL].Plant, [ORDER DETAIL].Pest, [ORDER DETAIL].Price, [ORDER DETAIL].Start
FROM (CUSTOMER INNER JOIN ([ORDER] INNER JOIN [ORDER DETAIL] ON ORDER.OID = [ORDER DETAIL].OID) ON CUSTOMER.CID = ORDER.CID) LEFT JOIN EVENT ON ([ORDER DETAIL].[Line No] = EVENT.[Line No]) AND ([ORDER DETAIL].OID = EVENT.OID)
WHERE ((([ORDER DETAIL].Pest) Like "Health****") AND (([ORDER DETAIL].Start)<Now()+30) AND (([ORDER DETAIL].OID)=[Forms]![ORDER]![OID]) AND (([ORDER DETAIL].[Prod Type])="SPRAY" Or ([ORDER DETAIL].[Prod Type])="PPHM") AND (([ORDER DETAIL].Accept)=Yes)) OR ((([ORDER DETAIL].Start)<Now()+30) AND (([ORDER DETAIL].OID)=[Forms]![ORDER]![OID]) AND (([ORDER DETAIL].[Prod Type])="info drf") AND (([ORDER DETAIL].Accept)=Yes))
ORDER BY [ORDER DETAIL].[Line No];

SELECT CUSTOMER.Fname, CUSTOMER.Lname, ORDER.CID, CUSTOMER.[Customer Note], CUSTOMER.[E-Mail]
FROM (CUSTOMER INNER JOIN [ORDER] ON CUSTOMER.CID = ORDER.CID) INNER JOIN [ORDER DETAIL] ON ORDER.OID = [ORDER DETAIL].OID
GROUP BY CUSTOMER.Fname, CUSTOMER.Lname, ORDER.CID, CUSTOMER.[Customer Note], CUSTOMER.[E-Mail]
HAVING (((CUSTOMER.[Customer Note]) Like "*@*"));

SELECT DISTINCTROW ORDER.OID, [ORDER DETAIL].Price, EVENT.Complete_Date, EVENT.Billed, EVENT.[To Bill], EVENT.[Paid Amount], EVENT.Completed, [ORDER DETAIL].[Line No]
FROM (CUSTOMER INNER JOIN ([ORDER] INNER JOIN [ORDER DETAIL] ON ORDER.OID = [ORDER DETAIL].OID) ON CUSTOMER.CID = ORDER.CID) LEFT JOIN EVENT ON ([ORDER DETAIL].[Line No] = EVENT.[Line No]) AND ([ORDER DETAIL].OID = EVENT.OID)
WHERE (((EVENT.Completed)=No Or (EVENT.Completed) Is Null) AND (([ORDER DETAIL].[Prod Type])="SPRAY") AND (([ORDER DETAIL].Accept)=Yes) AND (([ORDER DETAIL].Start)>#8/1/96# And ([ORDER DETAIL].Start)<#10/1/96#))
ORDER BY ORDER.OID;

SELECT DISTINCTROW CUSTOMER.Title, CUSTOMER.Fname, CUSTOMER.Lname, CUSTOMER.Street1, CUSTOMER.City, ORDER.[Paid Amount], [ORDER DETAIL].[Prod Type], [ORDER DETAIL].Accept, ORDER.Order, EVENT.Event_No, EVENT.Completed, EVENT.Complete_Date, EVENT.[To Bill], EVENT.Bill_Date, EVENT.[Event Price], EVENT.[Paid Date], EVENT.[Paid Amount], EVENT.Price
FROM ((CUSTOMER INNER JOIN [ORDER] ON CUSTOMER.CID = ORDER.CID) INNER JOIN [ORDER DETAIL] ON ORDER.OID = [ORDER DETAIL].OID) LEFT JOIN EVENT ON ([ORDER DETAIL].[Line No] = EVENT.[Line No]) AND ([ORDER DETAIL].OID = EVENT.OID)
WHERE (([ORDER DETAIL].[Prod Type]="SPRAY") AND ([ORDER DETAIL].Accept=False))
ORDER BY CUSTOMER.Lname;

SELECT DISTINCTROW CUSTOMER.Lname, CUSTOMER.Street1, ORDER.OID, ORDER.[Proposal Date], ORDER.[Accept Date], ORDER.[Paid Amount], [ORDER DETAIL].Price, [ORDER DETAIL].Accept, EVENT.Event_No, EVENT.Event_Date, EVENT.Completed, EVENT.Complete_Date, EVENT.[To Bill], EVENT.Billed, EVENT.Bill_Date, EVENT.[Event Price], EVENT.[Paid Date], EVENT.[Paid Amount], EVENT.Price
FROM ((CUSTOMER INNER JOIN [ORDER] ON CUSTOMER.CID = ORDER.CID) INNER JOIN [ORDER DETAIL] ON ORDER.OID = [ORDER DETAIL].OID) LEFT JOIN EVENT ON ([ORDER DETAIL].[Line No] = EVENT.[Line No]) AND ([ORDER DETAIL].OID = EVENT.OID);

SELECT EVENT.Event_No, ORDER.OID, [ORDER DETAIL].[Line No]
FROM ((CUSTOMER INNER JOIN [ORDER] ON CUSTOMER.CID = ORDER.CID) INNER JOIN [ORDER DETAIL] ON ORDER.OID = [ORDER DETAIL].OID) LEFT JOIN EVENT ON ([ORDER DETAIL].[Line No] = EVENT.[Line No]) AND ([ORDER DETAIL].OID = EVENT.OID);

SELECT DISTINCTROW CUSTOMER.Title, CUSTOMER.Lname, CUSTOMER.Fname, ORDER.OID, CUSTOMER.Company, CUSTOMER.Street1, ORDER.[Work Zip], CUSTOMER.[Tax Exempt], CUSTOMER.[Evening Phone], CUSTOMER.Fax, CUSTOMER.Phone, [ORDER DETAIL].Location, ORDER.[Work Name], ORDER.[Work City], ORDER.[Work State], ORDER.[Work Street], CUSTOMER.City, CUSTOMER.State, CUSTOMER.Zip, ORDER.CID, [ORDER DETAIL].[Prod Type], [ORDER DETAIL].Plant, [ORDER DETAIL].Pest, [ORDER DETAIL].Price, EVENT.Complete_Date, EVENT.Billed, CUSTOMER.Fax, EVENT.[Paid in full], EVENT.[Billed 2], [ORDER DETAIL].Start, [ORDER DETAIL].[Line No], EVENT.Completed, [ORDER DETAIL].Accept, EVENT.Bill_Date, EVENT.[To Bill], CUSTOMER.[E-Mail], ORDER.[Pd Amt 1], ORDER.[Pd Amt 2], ORDER.[Pd Amt 3], ORDER.[Pd Amt 4], ORDER.[Pd Amt 5], ORDER.[Pd Amt 6], ORDER.[Pd Date 1], ORDER.[Pd Date 2], ORDER.[Pd Date 3], ORDER.[Pd Date 4], ORDER.[Pd Date 5], ORDER.[Pd Date 6], ORDER.[Ck # 1], ORDER.[Ck # 2], ORDER.[Ck # 3], ORDER.[Ck # 4], ORDER.[Ck # 5], ORDER.[Ck # 6], ORDER.[PrePaid Disc Given]
FROM (CUSTOMER INNER JOIN ([ORDER] INNER JOIN [ORDER DETAIL] ON ORDER.OID = [ORDER DETAIL].OID) ON CUSTOMER.CID = ORDER.CID) LEFT JOIN EVENT ON ([ORDER DETAIL].[Line No] = EVENT.[Line No]) AND ([ORDER DETAIL].OID = EVENT.OID)
WHERE (((ORDER.OID)<>14403 And (ORDER.OID)<>27043 And (ORDER.OID)<>25324 And (ORDER.OID)<>27106 And (ORDER.OID)<>12735 And (ORDER.OID)<>8800 And (ORDER.OID)<>18872 And (ORDER.OID)<>27583 And (ORDER.OID)<>1273 And (ORDER.OID)<>27674 And (ORDER.OID)<>27129 And (ORDER.OID)<>4838) AND (([ORDER DETAIL].[Prod Type])="PPHM" Or ([ORDER DETAIL].[Prod Type])="SPRAY") AND ((EVENT.[Paid in full])=No Or (EVENT.[Paid in full]) Is Null) AND ((EVENT.Completed)=Yes) AND (([ORDER DETAIL].Accept)=Yes))
ORDER BY CUSTOMER.Lname;

SELECT CUSTOMER.Fname, CUSTOMER.Lname, CUSTOMER.Street1, CUSTOMER.City, CUSTOMER.State, CUSTOMER.Zip, CUSTOMER.Map, CUSTOMER.Grid, CUSTOMER.Phone, CUSTOMER.Fax, CUSTOMER.[Evening Phone], CUSTOMER.[Customer Note], CUSTOMER.[Cell Phone], CUSTOMER.[Wood Chips], CUSTOMER.Firewood, CUSTOMER.CID
FROM CUSTOMER
GROUP BY CUSTOMER.Fname, CUSTOMER.Lname, CUSTOMER.Street1, CUSTOMER.City, CUSTOMER.State, CUSTOMER.Zip, CUSTOMER.Map, CUSTOMER.Grid, CUSTOMER.Phone, CUSTOMER.Fax, CUSTOMER.[Evening Phone], CUSTOMER.[Customer Note], CUSTOMER.[Cell Phone], CUSTOMER.[Wood Chips], CUSTOMER.Firewood, CUSTOMER.CID

SELECT DISTINCTROW CUSTOMER.Lname, CUSTOMER.Street1, CUSTOMER.City, CUSTOMER.Map, CUSTOMER.Grid, CUSTOMER.[Evening Phone], [ORDER DETAIL].[Prod Type], [ORDER DETAIL].Plant, [ORDER DETAIL].Location, [ORDER DETAIL].Pest, [ORDER DETAIL].Price
FROM CUSTOMER INNER JOIN ([ORDER] INNER JOIN [ORDER DETAIL] ON ORDER.OID = [ORDER DETAIL].OID) ON CUSTOMER.CID = ORDER.CID
WHERE (([ORDER DETAIL].[Prod Type]="Lawn") AND ([ORDER DETAIL].Pest Like "*grub*") AND ([ORDER DETAIL].Accept=Yes))

SELECT [ORDER DETAIL].[Prod Type], CUSTOMER.Lname, [ORDER DETAIL].OID, [ORDER DETAIL].[Line No], [ORDER DETAIL].Plant, [ORDER DETAIL].Pest, [ORDER DETAIL].Description
FROM (CUSTOMER INNER JOIN ([ORDER] INNER JOIN [ORDER DETAIL] ON ORDER.OID = [ORDER DETAIL].OID) ON CUSTOMER.CID = ORDER.CID) LEFT JOIN EVENT ON ([ORDER DETAIL].[Line No] = EVENT.[Line No]) AND ([ORDER DETAIL].OID = EVENT.OID)

SELECT DISTINCTROW CUSTOMER.Lname, [ORDER DETAIL].[Prod Type], ORDER.OID, [ORDER DETAIL].Price, EVENT.[Paid Amount], EVENT.[Paid Amount 2], EVENT.[Paid in full], EVENT.[Paid Date 1], EVENT.Deposited, EVENT.[Paid  date 2]

SELECT DISTINCTROW ORDER.OID, CUSTOMER.Lname, ORDER.*, [ORDER DETAIL].[Line No], [ORDER DETAIL].[Prod Type], [ORDER DETAIL].Description, [ORDER DETAIL].Application AS Expr1, [ORDER DETAIL].Price, [ORDER DETAIL].Plant, [ORDER DETAIL].Location, [ORDER DETAIL].Accept, [ORDER DETAIL].Start, [ORDER DETAIL].Pest, CUSTOMER.CID, CUSTOMER.Title, CUSTOMER.Fname, CUSTOMER.Company, CUSTOMER.Street1, CUSTOMER.City, CUSTOMER.State, CUSTOMER.Zip, CUSTOMER.Source, CUSTOMER.Map, CUSTOMER.Grid, CUSTOMER.Phone, CUSTOMER.Fax, CUSTOMER.[Evening Phone], CUSTOMER.[Customer Note]
FROM (CUSTOMER INNER JOIN ([ORDER] INNER JOIN [ORDER DETAIL] ON ORDER.OID = [ORDER DETAIL].OID) ON CUSTOMER.CID = ORDER.CID) LEFT JOIN EVENT ON ([ORDER DETAIL].[Line No] = EVENT.[Line No]) AND ([ORDER DETAIL].OID = EVENT.OID)
WHERE (((ORDER.OID)=[Forms]![ORDER]![OID]) AND (([ORDER DETAIL].[Prod Type])="ipm DATA") AND (([ORDER DETAIL].Start)<Now()+24) AND (([ORDER DETAIL].Pest) Not Like "*Health*") AND ((EVENT.Completed)=No Or (EVENT.Completed) Is Null))
ORDER BY ORDER.OID, [ORDER DETAIL].[Line No] DESC;

SELECT DISTINCTROW CUSTOMER.Lname, ORDER.*, ORDER.OID, [ORDER DETAIL].[Line No], [ORDER DETAIL].[Prod Type], [ORDER DETAIL].Description, [ORDER DETAIL].Price, [ORDER DETAIL].Plant, [ORDER DETAIL].Location, [ORDER DETAIL].Accept, [ORDER DETAIL].Start, [ORDER DETAIL].Pest, CUSTOMER.CID, CUSTOMER.Title, CUSTOMER.Fname, CUSTOMER.Company, CUSTOMER.Street1, CUSTOMER.City, CUSTOMER.State, CUSTOMER.Zip, CUSTOMER.Source, CUSTOMER.Map, CUSTOMER.Grid, CUSTOMER.Phone, CUSTOMER.Fax, CUSTOMER.[Evening Phone], CUSTOMER.[Customer Note], [ORDER DETAIL].Start
FROM (CUSTOMER INNER JOIN ([ORDER] INNER JOIN [ORDER DETAIL] ON ORDER.OID = [ORDER DETAIL].OID) ON CUSTOMER.CID = ORDER.CID) LEFT JOIN EVENT ON ([ORDER DETAIL].[Line No] = EVENT.[Line No]) AND ([ORDER DETAIL].OID = EVENT.OID)
WHERE ((([ORDER DETAIL].[Prod Type])="IPM Data") AND (([ORDER DETAIL].Pest) Not Like "*Health*") AND ((ORDER.[Service Declined])=No Or (ORDER.[Service Declined]) Is Null))
ORDER BY ORDER.OID, [ORDER DETAIL].[Line No] DESC;

SELECT DISTINCTROW CUSTOMER.Lname, ORDER.[Work Street], ORDER.[Work City], ORDER.[Work Zip], CUSTOMER.Map, CUSTOMER.Grid, [ORDER DETAIL].Location, [ORDER DETAIL].Plant, [ORDER DETAIL].Pest, [ORDER DETAIL].Start, CUSTOMER.Street1, CUSTOMER.Company, CUSTOMER.City, CUSTOMER.State, ORDER.OID, [ORDER DETAIL].[Line No]
FROM (CUSTOMER INNER JOIN ([ORDER] INNER JOIN [ORDER DETAIL] ON ORDER.OID = [ORDER DETAIL].OID) ON CUSTOMER.CID = ORDER.CID) LEFT JOIN EVENT ON ([ORDER DETAIL].[Line No] = EVENT.[Line No]) AND ([ORDER DETAIL].OID = EVENT.OID)
WHERE (((CUSTOMER.Lname)=[Forms]![CUSTOMER]![lname]) AND (([ORDER DETAIL].[Prod Type])="IPM DATA"))
ORDER BY [ORDER DETAIL].[Accepted Date] DESC;

SELECT ORDER.OID, CUSTOMER.Lname, CUSTOMER.Street1, CUSTOMER.City, ORDER.[Job Note], [ORDER DETAIL].[Prod Type], EVENT.[Paid in full]
FROM (CUSTOMER INNER JOIN ([ORDER] INNER JOIN [ORDER DETAIL] ON ORDER.OID = [ORDER DETAIL].OID) ON CUSTOMER.CID = ORDER.CID) INNER JOIN EVENT ON ([ORDER DETAIL].[Line No] = EVENT.[Line No]) AND ([ORDER DETAIL].OID = EVENT.OID)
GROUP BY ORDER.OID, CUSTOMER.Lname, CUSTOMER.Street1, CUSTOMER.City, ORDER.[Job Note], [ORDER DETAIL].[Prod Type], [ORDER DETAIL].Description, EVENT.[Paid in full]
HAVING (((ORDER.[Job Note]) Like "*$*") AND (([ORDER DETAIL].[Prod Type])="Worksheet") AND ((EVENT.[Paid in full])=False));

SELECT ORDER.OID, CUSTOMER.Lname, CUSTOMER.Street1, CUSTOMER.City, ORDER.[Job Note], [ORDER DETAIL].[Prod Type], CUSTOMER.CID
FROM CUSTOMER INNER JOIN ([ORDER] INNER JOIN [ORDER DETAIL] ON ORDER.OID = [ORDER DETAIL].OID) ON CUSTOMER.CID = ORDER.CID
GROUP BY ORDER.OID, CUSTOMER.Lname, CUSTOMER.Street1, CUSTOMER.City, ORDER.[Job Note], [ORDER DETAIL].[Prod Type], CUSTOMER.CID, [ORDER DETAIL].Description
HAVING (((ORDER.[Job Note]) Like "*2016*" Or (ORDER.[Job Note]) Like "*16*" Or (ORDER.[Job Note]) Like "*2017*" Or (ORDER.[Job Note]) Like "*17*" Or (ORDER.[Job Note]) Like "*2018*" Or (ORDER.[Job Note]) Like "*18*" Or (ORDER.[Job Note]) Like "*2019*" Or (ORDER.[Job Note]) Like "*19*" Or (ORDER.[Job Note]) Like "*2020*" Or (ORDER.[Job Note]) Like "*20*" Or (ORDER.[Job Note]) Like "*2021*" Or (ORDER.[Job Note]) Like "*21*" Or (ORDER.[Job Note]) Like "*2022*" Or (ORDER.[Job Note]) Like "*22*" Or (ORDER.[Job Note]) Like "*2023*" Or (ORDER.[Job Note]) Like "*23*" Or (ORDER.[Job Note]) Like "*2024*" Or (ORDER.[Job Note]) Like "*24*" Or (ORDER.[Job Note]) Like "*2025*" Or (ORDER.[Job Note]) Like "*25*") AND (([ORDER DETAIL].[Prod Type])="Spray" Or ([ORDER DETAIL].[Prod Type])="PPHM"));

SELECT CUSTOMER.Lname, ORDER.OID, ORDER.[Job Note], ORDER.[Annual Contract], ORDER.[Work Name], ORDER.[Work Map], ORDER.[Work Grid], ORDER.[Winter Work], [ORDER DETAIL].[Prod Type]
FROM (CUSTOMER INNER JOIN [ORDER] ON CUSTOMER.CID = ORDER.CID) INNER JOIN [ORDER DETAIL] ON ORDER.OID = [ORDER DETAIL].OID
GROUP BY CUSTOMER.Lname, ORDER.OID, ORDER.[Job Note], ORDER.[Annual Contract], ORDER.[Work Name], ORDER.[Work Map], ORDER.[Work Grid], ORDER.[Winter Work], [ORDER DETAIL].[Prod Type]
HAVING (((ORDER.[Job Note]) Like "*2006*") AND (([ORDER DETAIL].[Prod Type])="HIDE" Or ([ORDER DETAIL].[Prod Type])="PPHM" Or ([ORDER DETAIL].[Prod Type])="SPRAY" Or ([ORDER DETAIL].[Prod Type])="LAWN")) OR (((([ORDER].[Job Note]) Like "*2006*") Like "*2007*")) OR (((ORDER.[Job Note]) Like "*2008*"));

SELECT DISTINCTROW CUSTOMER.Title, CUSTOMER.Fname, CUSTOMER.Lname, CUSTOMER.Company, CUSTOMER.Street1, ORDER.[Work Zip], CUSTOMER.City, CUSTOMER.State, CUSTOMER.Zip, [ORDER DETAIL].[Line No], EVENT.[Bill_Date 2]
FROM (CUSTOMER INNER JOIN ([ORDER] INNER JOIN [ORDER DETAIL] ON ORDER.OID = [ORDER DETAIL].OID) ON CUSTOMER.CID = ORDER.CID) LEFT JOIN EVENT ON ([ORDER DETAIL].[Line No] = EVENT.[Line No]) AND ([ORDER DETAIL].OID = EVENT.OID)
WHERE ((([ORDER DETAIL].[Line No])=1) AND (([ORDER DETAIL].[Prod Type])="SPRAY" Or ([ORDER DETAIL].[Prod Type])="PPHM") AND ((EVENT.[Paid in full])=No) AND (([ORDER DETAIL].Accept)=Yes) AND ((EVENT.[Bill_Date 2])=#8/25/98#))
ORDER BY CUSTOMER.Lname;

SELECT DISTINCTROW CUSTOMER.Fname, CUSTOMER.Title, CUSTOMER.Lname, CUSTOMER.City, CUSTOMER.Street1, CUSTOMER.State, CUSTOMER.Zip, ORDER.OID, [ORDER DETAIL].[Prod Type]
FROM CUSTOMER INNER JOIN ([ORDER] INNER JOIN [ORDER DETAIL] ON ORDER.OID = [ORDER DETAIL].OID) ON CUSTOMER.CID = ORDER.CID
GROUP BY CUSTOMER.Fname, CUSTOMER.Title, CUSTOMER.Lname, CUSTOMER.City, CUSTOMER.Street1, CUSTOMER.State, CUSTOMER.Zip, ORDER.OID, [ORDER DETAIL].[Prod Type]
HAVING (([ORDER DETAIL].[Prod Type]="LAWN "))
ORDER BY ORDER.OID;

SELECT DISTINCTROW ORDER.OID, CUSTOMER.Lname, ORDER.[Work Street], CUSTOMER.Map, ORDER.[Work City], CUSTOMER.Grid, [ORDER DETAIL].Pest, EVENT.Completed, EVENT.Complete_Date, [ORDER DETAIL].[Prod Type]
FROM (CUSTOMER INNER JOIN ([ORDER] INNER JOIN [ORDER DETAIL] ON ORDER.OID = [ORDER DETAIL].OID) ON CUSTOMER.CID = ORDER.CID) LEFT JOIN EVENT ON ([ORDER DETAIL].[Line No] = EVENT.[Line No]) AND ([ORDER DETAIL].OID = EVENT.OID)
GROUP BY ORDER.OID, CUSTOMER.Lname, ORDER.[Work Street], CUSTOMER.Map, ORDER.[Work City], CUSTOMER.Grid, [ORDER DETAIL].Pest, EVENT.Completed, EVENT.Complete_Date, [ORDER DETAIL].[Prod Type], [ORDER DETAIL].Accept
HAVING ((([ORDER DETAIL].Pest) Like "3rd*") AND ((EVENT.Completed)=Yes) AND (([ORDER DETAIL].[Prod Type])="Lawn") AND (([ORDER DETAIL].Accept)=Yes));

SELECT DISTINCTROW CUSTOMER.Lname, CUSTOMER.Street1, CUSTOMER.City, CUSTOMER.Map, CUSTOMER.Grid, CUSTOMER.[Evening Phone], [ORDER DETAIL].[Prod Type], [ORDER DETAIL].Plant, [ORDER DETAIL].Location, [ORDER DETAIL].Pest, [ORDER DETAIL].Price
FROM CUSTOMER INNER JOIN ([ORDER] INNER JOIN [ORDER DETAIL] ON ORDER.OID = [ORDER DETAIL].OID) ON CUSTOMER.CID = ORDER.CID
WHERE (([ORDER DETAIL].[Prod Type]="Lawn") AND ([ORDER DETAIL].Pest Like "*1st App*") AND ([ORDER DETAIL].Accept=Yes))
ORDER BY CUSTOMER.Map DESC;

SELECT DISTINCTROW CUSTOMER.*, ORDER.*, ORDER.OID, [ORDER DETAIL].[Prod Type], [ORDER DETAIL].Description, [ORDER DETAIL].Application, [ORDER DETAIL].Price, [ORDER DETAIL].Plant, [ORDER DETAIL].Location, [ORDER DETAIL].Accept, [ORDER DETAIL].Start, [ORDER DETAIL].End, [ORDER DETAIL].Pest, [ORDER DETAIL].[Line No]
FROM CUSTOMER INNER JOIN ([ORDER] INNER JOIN [ORDER DETAIL] ON ORDER.OID = [ORDER DETAIL].OID) ON CUSTOMER.CID = ORDER.CID
WHERE ((([ORDER DETAIL].[Prod Type])="LAWN "))
ORDER BY ORDER.OID;

SELECT CUSTOMER.CID, CUSTOMER.Lname, CUSTOMER.Street1, CUSTOMER.City, CUSTOMER.State, CUSTOMER.Zip, CUSTOMER.Map, CUSTOMER.Grid, [ORDER DETAIL].Accept
FROM (CUSTOMER INNER JOIN ([ORDER] INNER JOIN [ORDER DETAIL] ON ORDER.OID = [ORDER DETAIL].OID) ON CUSTOMER.CID = ORDER.CID) LEFT JOIN EVENT ON ([ORDER DETAIL].[Line No] = EVENT.[Line No]) AND ([ORDER DETAIL].OID = EVENT.OID)
GROUP BY CUSTOMER.CID, CUSTOMER.Lname, CUSTOMER.Street1, CUSTOMER.City, CUSTOMER.State, CUSTOMER.Zip, CUSTOMER.Map, CUSTOMER.Grid, [ORDER DETAIL].Accept
HAVING (((CUSTOMER.Map) Is Null) AND ((CUSTOMER.Grid) Is Null) AND (([ORDER DETAIL].Accept)=Yes)) OR (((CUSTOMER.Zip) Is Null) AND (([ORDER DETAIL].Accept)=Yes));

SELECT DISTINCTROW CUSTOMER.Lname, ORDER.[Work Street], EVENT.Completed, EVENT.Complete_Date, EVENT.Gallonage, [ORDER DETAIL].OID, [ORDER DETAIL].[Line No], [ORDER DETAIL].Location, [ORDER DETAIL].Plant, [ORDER DETAIL].Pest, [ORDER DETAIL].Price
FROM (CUSTOMER INNER JOIN ([ORDER] INNER JOIN [ORDER DETAIL] ON ORDER.OID = [ORDER DETAIL].OID) ON CUSTOMER.CID = ORDER.CID) LEFT JOIN EVENT ON ([ORDER DETAIL].[Line No] = EVENT.[Line No]) AND ([ORDER DETAIL].OID = EVENT.OID)
WHERE (((CUSTOMER.Lname)=[Forms]![CUSTOMER]![lname]) AND (([ORDER DETAIL].Pest) Like "*inject*") AND (([ORDER DETAIL].Start)<Now()) AND (([ORDER DETAIL].[Prod Type])="SPRAY" Or ([ORDER DETAIL].[Prod Type])="PPHM") AND (([ORDER DETAIL].Accept)=Yes)) OR (((CUSTOMER.Lname)=[Forms]![CUSTOMER]![lname]) AND (([ORDER DETAIL].Start)<Now()) AND (([ORDER DETAIL].[Prod Type])="info merit") AND (([ORDER DETAIL].Accept)=Yes))
ORDER BY EVENT.Complete_Date, [ORDER DETAIL].[Line No];

SELECT DISTINCTROW CUSTOMER.Lname, [ORDER DETAIL].[Line No], ORDER.[Work Street], EVENT.Completed, EVENT.Complete_Date, EVENT.Gallonage, [ORDER DETAIL].Location, [ORDER DETAIL].Plant, [ORDER DETAIL].Pest, [ORDER DETAIL].Price, [ORDER DETAIL].Start
FROM (CUSTOMER INNER JOIN ([ORDER] INNER JOIN [ORDER DETAIL] ON ORDER.OID = [ORDER DETAIL].OID) ON CUSTOMER.CID = ORDER.CID) LEFT JOIN EVENT ON ([ORDER DETAIL].[Line No] = EVENT.[Line No]) AND ([ORDER DETAIL].OID = EVENT.OID)
WHERE ((([ORDER DETAIL].Pest) Like "*inject*") AND (([ORDER DETAIL].Start)<Now()+21) AND (([ORDER DETAIL].OID)=[Forms]![ORDER]![OID]) AND (([ORDER DETAIL].[Prod Type])="SPRAY" Or ([ORDER DETAIL].[Prod Type])="PPHM") AND (([ORDER DETAIL].Accept)=Yes)) OR ((([ORDER DETAIL].Start)<Now()+21) AND (([ORDER DETAIL].OID)=[Forms]![ORDER]![OID]) AND (([ORDER DETAIL].[Prod Type])="info merit") AND (([ORDER DETAIL].Accept)=Yes))
ORDER BY [ORDER DETAIL].[Line No];

SELECT DISTINCTROW CUSTOMER.Title, CUSTOMER.Fname, CUSTOMER.Lname, [ORDER DETAIL].[Prod Type], [ORDER DETAIL].Accept, Sum([ORDER DETAIL].Price) AS SumOfPrice, CUSTOMER.Phone, CUSTOMER.[Evening Phone]

FROM (CUSTOMER INNER JOIN ([ORDER] INNER JOIN [ORDER DETAIL] ON ORDER.OID = [ORDER DETAIL].OID) ON CUSTOMER.CID = ORDER.CID) LEFT JOIN EVENT ON ([ORDER DETAIL].[Line No] = EVENT.[Line No]) AND ([ORDER DETAIL].OID = EVENT.OID)

ORDER BY ORDER.OID, [ORDER DETAIL].[Line No];

properties.sql:
SELECT DISTINCTROW CUSTOMER.Title, CUSTOMER.Fname, CUSTOMER.Lname, CUSTOMER.Street1, CUSTOMER.City, CUSTOMER.State, CUSTOMER.Zip, ORDER.OID, ORDER.[Accept Date], Sum([ORDER DETAIL].Price) AS SumOfPrice, Sum(EVENT.[Paid Amount]) AS [SumOfPaid Amount], ORDER.[Paid Amount], EVENT.Bill_Date
FROM (CUSTOMER INNER JOIN ([ORDER] INNER JOIN [ORDER DETAIL] ON ORDER.OID = [ORDER DETAIL].OID) ON CUSTOMER.CID = ORDER.CID) LEFT JOIN EVENT ON ([ORDER DETAIL].[Line No] = EVENT.[Line No]) AND ([ORDER DETAIL].OID = EVENT.OID)
WHERE (((EVENT.Bill_Date)>#11/1/96#))
GROUP BY CUSTOMER.Title, CUSTOMER.Fname, CUSTOMER.Lname, CUSTOMER.Street1, CUSTOMER.City, CUSTOMER.State, CUSTOMER.Zip, ORDER.OID, ORDER.[Accept Date], ORDER.[Paid Amount], EVENT.Bill_Date, [ORDER DETAIL].[Prod Type], [ORDER DETAIL].Accept, EVENT.Completed, EVENT.[To Bill]
HAVING ((([ORDER DETAIL].[Prod Type])="WORKSHEET") AND (([ORDER DETAIL].Accept)=Yes) AND ((EVENT.Completed)=Yes) AND ((EVENT.[To Bill])=Yes));

SELECT CUSTOMER.Lname, CUSTOMER.CID, [ORDER DETAIL].[Prod Type], ORDER.OID, [ORDER DETAIL].[Line No], EVENT.[Check Number 1], EVENT.[Paid Amount], EVENT.[Paid Date 1], EVENT.[Paid in full]
FROM (CUSTOMER INNER JOIN ([ORDER] INNER JOIN [ORDER DETAIL] ON ORDER.OID = [ORDER DETAIL].OID) ON CUSTOMER.CID = ORDER.CID) LEFT JOIN EVENT ON ([ORDER DETAIL].[Line No] = EVENT.[Line No]) AND ([ORDER DETAIL].OID = EVENT.OID)
WHERE (((EVENT.[Paid Date 1])<#1/1/2007#))
GROUP BY CUSTOMER.Lname, CUSTOMER.CID, [ORDER DETAIL].[Prod Type], ORDER.OID, [ORDER DETAIL].[Line No], EVENT.[Check Number 1], EVENT.[Paid Amount], EVENT.[Paid Date 1], EVENT.[Paid in full]
ORDER BY CUSTOMER.Lname;

SELECT CUSTOMER.Lname, CUSTOMER.CID, ORDER.OID, ORDER.[Ck # 1], ORDER.[Pd Amt 1], CUSTOMER.[Tax Exempt], Sum([ORDER DETAIL].Price) AS SumOfPrice
FROM (CUSTOMER INNER JOIN ([ORDER] INNER JOIN [ORDER DETAIL] ON ORDER.OID = [ORDER DETAIL].OID) ON CUSTOMER.CID = ORDER.CID) LEFT JOIN EVENT ON ([ORDER DETAIL].[Line No] = EVENT.[Line No]) AND ([ORDER DETAIL].OID = EVENT.OID)
WHERE (((ORDER.[Pd Date 1])=Format(Now(),"mm/dd/yy")))
GROUP BY CUSTOMER.Lname, CUSTOMER.CID, ORDER.OID, ORDER.[Ck # 1], ORDER.[Pd Amt 1], CUSTOMER.[Tax Exempt], [ORDER DETAIL].Accept
HAVING ((([ORDER DETAIL].Accept)=Yes))
ORDER BY CUSTOMER.Lname;

SELECT CUSTOMER.Lname, CUSTOMER.CID, ORDER.OID, ORDER.[Ck # 2], ORDER.[Pd Amt 2], CUSTOMER.[Tax Exempt], Sum([ORDER DETAIL].Price) AS SumOfPrice
FROM (CUSTOMER INNER JOIN ([ORDER] INNER JOIN [ORDER DETAIL] ON ORDER.OID = [ORDER DETAIL].OID) ON CUSTOMER.CID = ORDER.CID) LEFT JOIN EVENT ON ([ORDER DETAIL].[Line No] = EVENT.[Line No]) AND ([ORDER DETAIL].OID = EVENT.OID)
WHERE (((ORDER.[Pd Date 2])=Format(Now(),"mm/dd/yy")))
GROUP BY CUSTOMER.Lname, CUSTOMER.CID, ORDER.OID, ORDER.[Ck # 2], ORDER.[Pd Amt 2], CUSTOMER.[Tax Exempt], [ORDER DETAIL].Accept
HAVING ((([ORDER DETAIL].Accept)=Yes))
ORDER BY CUSTOMER.Lname;

SELECT CUSTOMER.Lname, CUSTOMER.CID, ORDER.OID, ORDER.[Ck # 3], ORDER.[Pd Amt 3], CUSTOMER.[Tax Exempt], Sum([ORDER DETAIL].Price) AS SumOfPrice
FROM (CUSTOMER INNER JOIN ([ORDER] INNER JOIN [ORDER DETAIL] ON ORDER.OID = [ORDER DETAIL].OID) ON CUSTOMER.CID = ORDER.CID) LEFT JOIN EVENT ON ([ORDER DETAIL].[Line No] = EVENT.[Line No]) AND ([ORDER DETAIL].OID = EVENT.OID)
WHERE (((ORDER.[Pd Date 3])=Format(Now(),"mm/dd/yy")))
GROUP BY CUSTOMER.Lname, CUSTOMER.CID, ORDER.OID, ORDER.[Ck # 3], ORDER.[Pd Amt 3], CUSTOMER.[Tax Exempt], [ORDER DETAIL].Accept
HAVING ((([ORDER DETAIL].Accept)=Yes))
ORDER BY CUSTOMER.Lname;

SELECT CUSTOMER.Lname, CUSTOMER.CID, ORDER.OID, ORDER.[Ck # 4], ORDER.[Pd Amt 4], CUSTOMER.[Tax Exempt], Sum([ORDER DETAIL].Price) AS SumOfPrice
FROM (CUSTOMER INNER JOIN ([ORDER] INNER JOIN [ORDER DETAIL] ON ORDER.OID = [ORDER DETAIL].OID) ON CUSTOMER.CID = ORDER.CID) LEFT JOIN EVENT ON ([ORDER DETAIL].[Line No] = EVENT.[Line No]) AND ([ORDER DETAIL].OID = EVENT.OID)
WHERE (((ORDER.[Pd Date 4])=Format(Now(),"mm/dd/yy")))
GROUP BY CUSTOMER.Lname, CUSTOMER.CID, ORDER.OID, ORDER.[Ck # 4], ORDER.[Pd Amt 4], CUSTOMER.[Tax Exempt], [ORDER DETAIL].Accept
HAVING ((([ORDER DETAIL].Accept)=Yes))
ORDER BY CUSTOMER.Lname;

SELECT CUSTOMER.Lname, CUSTOMER.CID, ORDER.OID, ORDER.[Ck # 5], ORDER.[Pd Amt 5], CUSTOMER.[Tax Exempt], Sum([ORDER DETAIL].Price) AS SumOfPrice
FROM (CUSTOMER INNER JOIN ([ORDER] INNER JOIN [ORDER DETAIL] ON ORDER.OID = [ORDER DETAIL].OID) ON CUSTOMER.CID = ORDER.CID) LEFT JOIN EVENT ON ([ORDER DETAIL].[Line No] = EVENT.[Line No]) AND ([ORDER DETAIL].OID = EVENT.OID)
WHERE (((ORDER.[Pd Date 5])=Format(Now(),"mm/dd/yy")))
GROUP BY CUSTOMER.Lname, CUSTOMER.CID, ORDER.OID, ORDER.[Ck # 5], ORDER.[Pd Amt 5], CUSTOMER.[Tax Exempt], [ORDER DETAIL].Accept
HAVING ((([ORDER DETAIL].Accept)=Yes))
ORDER BY CUSTOMER.Lname;

SELECT CUSTOMER.Lname, CUSTOMER.CID, ORDER.OID, ORDER.[Ck # 6], ORDER.[Pd Amt 6], CUSTOMER.[Tax Exempt], Sum([ORDER DETAIL].Price) AS SumOfPrice
FROM (CUSTOMER INNER JOIN ([ORDER] INNER JOIN [ORDER DETAIL] ON ORDER.OID = [ORDER DETAIL].OID) ON CUSTOMER.CID = ORDER.CID) LEFT JOIN EVENT ON ([ORDER DETAIL].[Line No] = EVENT.[Line No]) AND ([ORDER DETAIL].OID = EVENT.OID)
WHERE (((ORDER.[Pd Date 6])=Format(Now(),"mm/dd/yy")))
GROUP BY CUSTOMER.Lname, CUSTOMER.CID, ORDER.OID, ORDER.[Ck # 6], ORDER.[Pd Amt 6], CUSTOMER.[Tax Exempt], [ORDER DETAIL].Accept
HAVING ((([ORDER DETAIL].Accept)=Yes))
ORDER BY CUSTOMER.Lname;

SELECT CUSTOMER.Lname, CUSTOMER.CID, ORDER.OID, ORDER.[Ck # 1], ORDER.[Pd Amt 1], ORDER.[Pd Date 1], [ORDER DETAIL].[Prod Type]
FROM (CUSTOMER INNER JOIN ([ORDER] INNER JOIN [ORDER DETAIL] ON ORDER.OID = [ORDER DETAIL].OID) ON CUSTOMER.CID = ORDER.CID) LEFT JOIN EVENT ON ([ORDER DETAIL].[Line No] = EVENT.[Line No]) AND ([ORDER DETAIL].OID = EVENT.OID)
GROUP BY CUSTOMER.Lname, CUSTOMER.CID, ORDER.OID, ORDER.[Ck # 1], ORDER.[Pd Amt 1], EVENT.[Paid in full], [ORDER DETAIL].Accept, ORDER.[Pd Date 1], [ORDER DETAIL].[Prod Type]
HAVING ((([ORDER DETAIL].Accept)=Yes) AND ((ORDER.[Pd Date 1])>#1/1/2011#))
ORDER BY CUSTOMER.Lname;

SELECT CUSTOMER.Fname, CUSTOMER.Lname, CUSTOMER.CID, CUSTOMER.Street1, CUSTOMER.City, CUSTOMER.State, CUSTOMER.Zip, ORDER.[Proposal Date], ORDER.[Accept Date], ORDER.[Work City], ORDER.[Work State], ORDER.[Work Zip], EVENT.Completed, EVENT.[Paid Amount], EVENT.[Paid Date 1], EVENT.[Paid Amount 2], EVENT.[Paid  date 2], EVENT.[Paid Amount 3], EVENT.[Paid date 3], EVENT.[Paid Date 1], EVENT.[Check Number 1], EVENT.[Check Number 2], EVENT.[Check Number 3], ORDER.OID, Sum([ORDER DETAIL].Price) AS SumOfPrice, [ORDER DETAIL].[Prod Type], CUSTOMER.Title, Sum([ORDER DETAIL].Price) AS SumOfPrice1
FROM (CUSTOMER INNER JOIN ([ORDER] INNER JOIN [ORDER DETAIL] ON ORDER.OID = [ORDER DETAIL].OID) ON CUSTOMER.CID = ORDER.CID) LEFT JOIN EVENT ON ([ORDER DETAIL].[Line No] = EVENT.[Line No]) AND ([ORDER DETAIL].OID = EVENT.OID)
GROUP BY CUSTOMER.Fname, CUSTOMER.Lname, CUSTOMER.CID, CUSTOMER.Street1, CUSTOMER.City, CUSTOMER.State, CUSTOMER.Zip, ORDER.[Proposal Date], ORDER.[Accept Date], ORDER.[Work City], ORDER.[Work State], ORDER.[Work Zip], EVENT.Completed, EVENT.[Paid Amount], EVENT.[Paid Date 1], EVENT.[Paid Amount 2], EVENT.[Paid  date 2], EVENT.[Paid Amount 3], EVENT.[Paid date 3], EVENT.[Paid Date 1], EVENT.[Check Number 1], EVENT.[Check Number 2], EVENT.[Check Number 3], ORDER.OID, [ORDER DETAIL].[Prod Type], CUSTOMER.Title
HAVING (((CUSTOMER.CID)=[Forms]![CUSTOMER]![CID]) AND ((EVENT.Completed)=Yes));

SELECT DISTINCTROW ORDER.OID, CUSTOMER.Lname, [ORDER DETAIL].[Line No], ORDER.[Work Street], CUSTOMER.Map, ORDER.[Work City], CUSTOMER.Grid, CUSTOMER.[Evening Phone], [ORDER DETAIL].Location, [ORDER DETAIL].Plant, [ORDER DETAIL].Description, [ORDER DETAIL].Price, [ORDER DETAIL].[Prod Type], CUSTOMER.[Customer Note], ORDER.[Job Note], CUSTOMER.Company, [ORDER DETAIL].Start, [ORDER DETAIL].Accept, ORDER.CID
FROM (CUSTOMER INNER JOIN ([ORDER] INNER JOIN [ORDER DETAIL] ON ORDER.OID = [ORDER DETAIL].OID) ON CUSTOMER.CID = ORDER.CID) LEFT JOIN EVENT ON ([ORDER DETAIL].[Line No] = EVENT.[Line No]) AND ([ORDER DETAIL].OID = EVENT.OID)
WHERE ((([ORDER DETAIL].Description) Like "*Plant *") AND (([ORDER DETAIL].[Prod Type])="WORKSHEET") AND (([ORDER DETAIL].Accept)=Yes) AND ((EVENT.Completed)=No Or (EVENT.Completed) Is Null))
ORDER BY CUSTOMER.Lname, [ORDER DETAIL].[Line No], [ORDER DETAIL].[Accepted Date] DESC;

SELECT DISTINCTROW ORDER.OID, CUSTOMER.Lname, [ORDER DETAIL].[Line No], ORDER.[Work Street], CUSTOMER.Map, ORDER.[Work City], CUSTOMER.Grid, CUSTOMER.[Evening Phone], [ORDER DETAIL].Location, [ORDER DETAIL].Plant, [ORDER DETAIL].Description, [ORDER DETAIL].Price, [ORDER DETAIL].[Prod Type], CUSTOMER.[Customer Note], ORDER.[Job Note], CUSTOMER.Company, [ORDER DETAIL].Start, [ORDER DETAIL].Accept, ORDER.CID
FROM (CUSTOMER INNER JOIN ([ORDER] INNER JOIN [ORDER DETAIL] ON ORDER.OID = [ORDER DETAIL].OID) ON CUSTOMER.CID = ORDER.CID) LEFT JOIN EVENT ON ([ORDER DETAIL].[Line No] = EVENT.[Line No]) AND ([ORDER DETAIL].OID = EVENT.OID)
WHERE (((ORDER.OID)=[Forms]![ORDER]![OID]) AND (([ORDER DETAIL].Description) Like "*Plant *") AND (([ORDER DETAIL].[Prod Type])="WORKSHEET") AND (([ORDER DETAIL].Accept)=Yes) AND ((EVENT.Completed)=No Or (EVENT.Completed) Is Null))
ORDER BY CUSTOMER.Lname, [ORDER DETAIL].[Line No], [ORDER DETAIL].[Accepted Date] DESC;

SELECT DISTINCTROW ORDER.OID, CUSTOMER.Lname, [ORDER DETAIL].[Line No], ORDER.[Work Street], ORDER.[Work City], [ORDER DETAIL].Location, [ORDER DETAIL].Plant, [ORDER DETAIL].Description, [ORDER DETAIL].Price, ORDER.CID, EVENT.Complete_Date
FROM (CUSTOMER INNER JOIN ([ORDER] INNER JOIN [ORDER DETAIL] ON ORDER.OID = [ORDER DETAIL].OID) ON CUSTOMER.CID = ORDER.CID) LEFT JOIN EVENT ON ([ORDER DETAIL].[Line No] = EVENT.[Line No]) AND ([ORDER DETAIL].OID = EVENT.OID)
WHERE ((([ORDER DETAIL].Description) Like "*Plant *") AND ((EVENT.Complete_Date)>#12/31/2021#) AND (([ORDER DETAIL].Accept)=Yes) AND (([ORDER DETAIL].[Prod Type])="WORKSHEET") AND ((EVENT.Completed)=Yes))
ORDER BY CUSTOMER.Lname, [ORDER DETAIL].[Line No], [ORDER DETAIL].[Accepted Date] DESC;

SELECT DISTINCTROW CUSTOMER.Fname, CUSTOMER.Lname, CUSTOMER.Company, CUSTOMER.[E-Mail]
FROM CUSTOMER INNER JOIN ([ORDER] INNER JOIN [ORDER DETAIL] ON ORDER.OID = [ORDER DETAIL].OID) ON CUSTOMER.CID = ORDER.CID
WHERE (((CUSTOMER.Fname)<>"Current") AND ((CUSTOMER.Lname)<>"Liskiewicz") AND ((CUSTOMER.[E-Mail]) Like "*@*") AND ((ORDER.OID)<>14403) AND (([ORDER DETAIL].[Prod Type])="Spray" Or ([ORDER DETAIL].[Prod Type])="PPHM") AND ((ORDER.[Accept Date]) Is Null) AND ((ORDER.[Proposal Date])<#1/1/2025#) AND ((ORDER.[Service Declined])=No Or (ORDER.[Service Declined]) Is Null))
ORDER BY CUSTOMER.Lname;

SELECT DISTINCTROW CUSTOMER.*, ORDER.*, ORDER.OID, [ORDER DETAIL].[Prod Type], [ORDER DETAIL].Description, [ORDER DETAIL].Application, [ORDER DETAIL].Price, [ORDER DETAIL].Plant, [ORDER DETAIL].Location, [ORDER DETAIL].Accept, [ORDER DETAIL].Start, [ORDER DETAIL].End, [ORDER DETAIL].Pest, [ORDER DETAIL].[Line No], [ORDER DETAIL].Accept, CUSTOMER.[Tax Exempt]
FROM (CUSTOMER INNER JOIN ([ORDER] INNER JOIN [ORDER DETAIL] ON ORDER.OID = [ORDER DETAIL].OID) ON CUSTOMER.CID = ORDER.CID) LEFT JOIN EVENT ON ([ORDER DETAIL].[Line No] = EVENT.[Line No]) AND ([ORDER DETAIL].OID = EVENT.OID)
WHERE ((([ORDER DETAIL].[Prod Type])="pphm"))
ORDER BY ORDER.OID;

SELECT DISTINCTROW CUSTOMER.*, ORDER.*, ORDER.OID, [ORDER DETAIL].[Prod Type], [ORDER DETAIL].Description, [ORDER DETAIL].Application, [ORDER DETAIL].Price, [ORDER DETAIL].Plant, [ORDER DETAIL].Location, [ORDER DETAIL].Accept, [ORDER DETAIL].Start, [ORDER DETAIL].Pest, [ORDER DETAIL].[Line No], CUSTOMER.Map, [ORDER DETAIL].Accept, ORDER.[Work Name], ORDER.[Work Street], ORDER.[Work City], ORDER.[Work State], ORDER.[Work Zip], ORDER.[Work Map], ORDER.[Work Grid]
FROM CUSTOMER INNER JOIN ([ORDER] INNER JOIN [ORDER DETAIL] ON ORDER.OID = [ORDER DETAIL].OID) ON CUSTOMER.CID = ORDER.CID
WHERE ((([ORDER DETAIL].[Prod Type])="IPM DATA") AND (([ORDER DETAIL].Accept)=Yes))
ORDER BY ORDER.OID;

SELECT DISTINCTROW CUSTOMER.Title, CUSTOMER.Fname, CUSTOMER.Lname, CUSTOMER.[Evening Phone], CUSTOMER.Phone, ORDER.OID, ORDER.[Work Name], ORDER.[Work Street], ORDER.[Work City], ORDER.[Work Map], ORDER.[Work Grid], [ORDER DETAIL].[Prod Type], CUSTOMER.CID
FROM CUSTOMER INNER JOIN ([ORDER] INNER JOIN [ORDER DETAIL] ON ORDER.OID = [ORDER DETAIL].OID) ON CUSTOMER.CID = ORDER.CID
GROUP BY CUSTOMER.Title, CUSTOMER.Fname, CUSTOMER.Lname, CUSTOMER.[Evening Phone], CUSTOMER.Phone, ORDER.OID, ORDER.[Work Name], ORDER.[Work Street], ORDER.[Work City], ORDER.[Work Map], ORDER.[Work Grid], CUSTOMER.Street1, CUSTOMER.City, [ORDER DETAIL].Accept, CUSTOMER.Map, CUSTOMER.Grid, [ORDER DETAIL].[Prod Type], CUSTOMER.CID
HAVING ((([ORDER DETAIL].[Prod Type])="PPHM"));

SELECT DISTINCTROW [ORDER DETAIL].[Prod Type], ORDER.CID, CUSTOMER.Title, CUSTOMER.Fname, CUSTOMER.Lname, CUSTOMER.Street1, CUSTOMER.City, CUSTOMER.[Evening Phone], CUSTOMER.Phone, ORDER.OID, CUSTOMER.Map, CUSTOMER.Grid
FROM CUSTOMER INNER JOIN ([ORDER] INNER JOIN [ORDER DETAIL] ON ORDER.OID = [ORDER DETAIL].OID) ON CUSTOMER.CID = ORDER.CID
GROUP BY [ORDER DETAIL].[Prod Type], ORDER.CID, CUSTOMER.Title, CUSTOMER.Fname, CUSTOMER.Lname, CUSTOMER.Street1, CUSTOMER.City, CUSTOMER.[Evening Phone], CUSTOMER.Phone, ORDER.OID, CUSTOMER.Map, CUSTOMER.Grid
HAVING ((([ORDER DETAIL].[Prod Type])="PPHM" Or ([ORDER DETAIL].[Prod Type])="IPM DATA"))
ORDER BY ORDER.CID;

SELECT DISTINCTROW CUSTOMER.Title, CUSTOMER.Fname, CUSTOMER.Lname, CUSTOMER.Street1, CUSTOMER.City, CUSTOMER.State, CUSTOMER.Zip, ORDER.OID, [ORDER DETAIL].[Prod Type]
FROM CUSTOMER INNER JOIN ([ORDER] INNER JOIN [ORDER DETAIL] ON ORDER.OID = [ORDER DETAIL].OID) ON CUSTOMER.CID = ORDER.CID
GROUP BY CUSTOMER.Title, CUSTOMER.Fname, CUSTOMER.Lname, CUSTOMER.Street1, CUSTOMER.City, CUSTOMER.State, CUSTOMER.Zip, ORDER.OID, [ORDER DETAIL].[Prod Type]
HAVING (([ORDER DETAIL].[Prod Type]="PPHM"))
ORDER BY ORDER.OID;

SELECT DISTINCTROW CUSTOMER.Title, CUSTOMER.Fname, CUSTOMER.Lname, CUSTOMER.Company, CUSTOMER.Street1, CUSTOMER.City, CUSTOMER.State, CUSTOMER.Zip, ORDER.OID, Sum([ORDER DETAIL].Price) AS SumOfPrice
FROM (CUSTOMER INNER JOIN ([ORDER] INNER JOIN [ORDER DETAIL] ON ORDER.OID = [ORDER DETAIL].OID) ON CUSTOMER.CID = ORDER.CID) LEFT JOIN EVENT ON ([ORDER DETAIL].[Line No] = EVENT.[Line No]) AND ([ORDER DETAIL].OID = EVENT.OID)
GROUP BY CUSTOMER.Title, CUSTOMER.Fname, CUSTOMER.Lname, CUSTOMER.Company, CUSTOMER.Street1, CUSTOMER.City, CUSTOMER.State, CUSTOMER.Zip, ORDER.OID, [ORDER DETAIL].[Prod Type], [ORDER DETAIL].Accept, EVENT.Completed, EVENT.[To Bill], EVENT.[Paid in full], EVENT.Billed
HAVING ((([ORDER DETAIL].[Prod Type])="WORKSHEET") AND (([ORDER DETAIL].Accept)=Yes) AND ((EVENT.Completed)=Yes) AND ((EVENT.[To Bill])=Yes) AND ((EVENT.[Paid in full])=No) AND ((EVENT.Billed)=No))
ORDER BY CUSTOMER.Lname;

SELECT DISTINCTROW ORDER.OID, CUSTOMER.Lname, ORDER.[Work Street], CUSTOMER.Map, ORDER.[Work City], CUSTOMER.Grid, [ORDER DETAIL].Pest, EVENT.Completed, EVENT.Complete_Date
FROM (CUSTOMER INNER JOIN ([ORDER] INNER JOIN [ORDER DETAIL] ON ORDER.OID = [ORDER DETAIL].OID) ON CUSTOMER.CID = ORDER.CID) LEFT JOIN EVENT ON ([ORDER DETAIL].[Line No] = EVENT.[Line No]) AND ([ORDER DETAIL].OID = EVENT.OID)
GROUP BY ORDER.OID, CUSTOMER.Lname, ORDER.[Work Street], CUSTOMER.Map, ORDER.[Work City], CUSTOMER.Grid, [ORDER DETAIL].Pest, EVENT.Completed, EVENT.Complete_Date, [ORDER DETAIL].[Prod Type], [ORDER DETAIL].Accept
HAVING ((([ORDER DETAIL].Pest) Like "1st*") AND ((EVENT.Completed)=Yes) AND (([ORDER DETAIL].[Prod Type])="PPHM") AND (([ORDER DETAIL].Accept)=Yes))
ORDER BY EVENT.Complete_Date;

SELECT DISTINCTROW ORDER.OID, CUSTOMER.Lname, ORDER.[Work Street], CUSTOMER.Map, ORDER.[Work City], CUSTOMER.Grid, [ORDER DETAIL].Pest, EVENT.Completed, EVENT.Complete_Date
FROM (CUSTOMER INNER JOIN ([ORDER] INNER JOIN [ORDER DETAIL] ON ORDER.OID = [ORDER DETAIL].OID) ON CUSTOMER.CID = ORDER.CID) LEFT JOIN EVENT ON ([ORDER DETAIL].[Line No] = EVENT.[Line No]) AND ([ORDER DETAIL].OID = EVENT.OID)
GROUP BY ORDER.OID, CUSTOMER.Lname, ORDER.[Work Street], CUSTOMER.Map, ORDER.[Work City], CUSTOMER.Grid, [ORDER DETAIL].Pest, EVENT.Completed, EVENT.Complete_Date, [ORDER DETAIL].[Prod Type], [ORDER DETAIL].Accept
HAVING ((([ORDER DETAIL].Pest) Like "5th*") AND ((EVENT.Completed)=Yes) AND (([ORDER DETAIL].[Prod Type])="PPHM") AND (([ORDER DETAIL].Accept)=Yes))
ORDER BY EVENT.Complete_Date;

SELECT DISTINCTROW CUSTOMER.*, ORDER.*, ORDER.OID, [ORDER DETAIL].[Prod Type], [ORDER DETAIL].Description, [ORDER DETAIL].Price, [ORDER DETAIL].Plant, [ORDER DETAIL].Location, [ORDER DETAIL].Start, [ORDER DETAIL].Pest, [ORDER DETAIL].[Line No], [ORDER DETAIL].Accept, CUSTOMER.[Tax Exempt], ORDER.[Proposal Date], ORDER.[Service Declined], ORDER.[Accept Date]
FROM (CUSTOMER INNER JOIN ([ORDER] INNER JOIN [ORDER DETAIL] ON ORDER.OID = [ORDER DETAIL].OID) ON CUSTOMER.CID = ORDER.CID) LEFT JOIN EVENT ON ([ORDER DETAIL].[Line No] = EVENT.[Line No]) AND ([ORDER DETAIL].OID = EVENT.OID)
WHERE (((ORDER.OID)<>14403) AND (([ORDER DETAIL].[Prod Type])="Spray") AND ((ORDER.[Proposal Date])<#1/1/2025#) AND ((ORDER.[Service Declined])=No Or (ORDER.[Service Declined]) Is Null))
ORDER BY ORDER.OID;

SELECT DISTINCTROW CUSTOMER.*, ORDER.*, ORDER.OID, [ORDER DETAIL].[Prod Type], [ORDER DETAIL].Description, [ORDER DETAIL].Price, [ORDER DETAIL].Plant, [ORDER DETAIL].Location, [ORDER DETAIL].Accept, [ORDER DETAIL].Start, [ORDER DETAIL].Pest, [ORDER DETAIL].[Line No], [ORDER DETAIL].Accept, CUSTOMER.[Tax Exempt]

SELECT DISTINCTROW CUSTOMER.*, ORDER.*, ORDER.OID, [ORDER DETAIL].[Prod Type], [ORDER DETAIL].Description, [ORDER DETAIL].Application, [ORDER DETAIL].Price, [ORDER DETAIL].Plant, [ORDER DETAIL].Location, [ORDER DETAIL].Accept, [ORDER DETAIL].Start, [ORDER DETAIL].End, [ORDER DETAIL].Pest, [ORDER DETAIL].[Line No], [ORDER DETAIL].Accept
