SELECT CUSTOMER.Title, CUSTOMER.Fname, CUSTOMER.Lname, CUSTOMER.Company, CUSTOMER.Street1, CUSTOMER.City, CUSTOMER.State, CUSTOMER.Zip, Sum([ORDER DETAIL].Price) AS SumOfPrice, ORDER.OID, Sum([ORDER DETAIL].[10 Price]) AS [SumOf10 Price]
FROM ((CUSTOMER INNER JOIN [ORDER] ON CUSTOMER.CID = ORDER.CID) INNER JOIN [ORDER DETAIL] ON ORDER.OID = [ORDER DETAIL].OID) LEFT JOIN EVENT ON ([ORDER DETAIL].[Line No] = EVENT.[Line No]) AND ([ORDER DETAIL].OID = EVENT.OID)
GROUP BY CUSTOMER.Title, CUSTOMER.Fname, CUSTOMER.Lname, CUSTOMER.Company, CUSTOMER.Street1, CUSTOMER.City, CUSTOMER.State, CUSTOMER.Zip, ORDER.OID, ORDER.[2010 Accepted], [ORDER DETAIL].[Prod Type], ORDER.[Proposal Date]
HAVING (((ORDER.[2010 Accepted])=Yes) AND (([ORDER DETAIL].[Prod Type])="Spray") AND ((ORDER.[Proposal Date])<#1/1/2010#))
ORDER BY Sum([ORDER DETAIL].Price) DESC;

TRANSFORM Sum([OID]) AS [The Value]
SELECT [Product type], Sum([OID]) AS [Total Of OID]
FROM [ORDER DETAIL]
GROUP BY [Product type]
PIVOT [Price];

SELECT DISTINCTROW CUSTOMER.Lname, CUSTOMER.Title, CUSTOMER.Fname, CUSTOMER.Street1, CUSTOMER.City, CUSTOMER.State, CUSTOMER.Zip, CUSTOMER.Phone, [ORDER DETAIL].Price, [ORDER DETAIL].[Line No], [ORDER DETAIL].Plant, [ORDER DETAIL].Description, [ORDER DETAIL].Pest, ORDER.OID, ORDER.CID, ORDER.[Proposal Date], ORDER.[Accept Date], CUSTOMER.[Customer Note], ORDER.[Annual Contract], [ORDER DETAIL].Location, [ORDER DETAIL].Accept, CUSTOMER.[Evening Phone], CUSTOMER.Fax, CUSTOMER.Phone, [ORDER DETAIL].[Prod Type]
FROM (CUSTOMER INNER JOIN ([ORDER] INNER JOIN [ORDER DETAIL] ON ORDER.OID = [ORDER DETAIL].OID) ON CUSTOMER.CID = ORDER.CID) LEFT JOIN EVENT ON [ORDER DETAIL].OID = EVENT.OID
WHERE (((ORDER.CID)=[Forms]![CUSTOMER]![CID]) AND ((ORDER.[Accept Date])>#12/31/98# And (ORDER.[Accept Date])<#1/1/00#) AND (([ORDER DETAIL].Accept)=Yes) AND (([ORDER DETAIL].[Prod Type]) Not Like "IPM DATA"))
ORDER BY ORDER.OID DESC , ORDER.[Proposal Date] DESC;

SELECT DISTINCTROW CUSTOMER.*, ORDER.*, ORDER.OID, [ORDER DETAIL].[Prod Type], [ORDER DETAIL].Description, [ORDER DETAIL].Application, [ORDER DETAIL].Price, [ORDER DETAIL].Plant, [ORDER DETAIL].Location, [ORDER DETAIL].Accept, [ORDER DETAIL].Start, [ORDER DETAIL].End, [ORDER DETAIL].Pest, [ORDER DETAIL].[Line No]
FROM (CUSTOMER INNER JOIN [ORDER] ON CUSTOMER.CID = ORDER.CID) INNER JOIN [ORDER DETAIL] ON ORDER.OID = [ORDER DETAIL].OID
WHERE ((ORDER.OID=[Forms]![ORDER]![OID]) AND ([ORDER DETAIL].[Prod Type]="LAWN "))
ORDER BY ORDER.OID;

SELECT DISTINCTROW CUSTOMER.*, ORDER.*, ORDER.OID, [ORDER DETAIL].[Prod Type], [ORDER DETAIL].Description, [ORDER DETAIL].Price, [ORDER DETAIL].Plant, [ORDER DETAIL].Location, [ORDER DETAIL].Accept, [ORDER DETAIL].Start, [ORDER DETAIL].Pest, [ORDER DETAIL].[Line No], CUSTOMER.Company
FROM CUSTOMER INNER JOIN ([ORDER] INNER JOIN [ORDER DETAIL] ON ORDER.OID = [ORDER DETAIL].OID) ON CUSTOMER.CID = ORDER.CID
WHERE (((ORDER.OID)=[Forms]![ORDER]![OID]) AND (([ORDER DETAIL].[Prod Type])="PPHM "))
ORDER BY [ORDER DETAIL].Start;

SELECT DISTINCTROW CUSTOMER.*, ORDER.*, ORDER.OID, [ORDER DETAIL].[Prod Type], [ORDER DETAIL].Description, [ORDER DETAIL].Price, [ORDER DETAIL].Plant, [ORDER DETAIL].Location, [ORDER DETAIL].Accept, [ORDER DETAIL].Start, [ORDER DETAIL].[Line No], ORDER.[Proposal Date], ORDER.[Job Note], CUSTOMER.[Customer Note], EVENT.Completed, EVENT.Complete_Date, CUSTOMER.[Tax Exempt], ORDER.[Annual Contract], CUSTOMER.Source
FROM (CUSTOMER INNER JOIN ([ORDER] INNER JOIN [ORDER DETAIL] ON ORDER.OID = [ORDER DETAIL].OID) ON CUSTOMER.CID = ORDER.CID) LEFT JOIN EVENT ON ([ORDER DETAIL].[Line No] = EVENT.[Line No]) AND ([ORDER DETAIL].OID = EVENT.OID)
WHERE (((ORDER.OID)=[Forms]![ORDER]![OID]) AND (([ORDER DETAIL].[Prod Type])="WORKSHEET " Or ([ORDER DETAIL].[Prod Type])="Hide" Or ([ORDER DETAIL].[Prod Type])="Chips" Or ([ORDER DETAIL].[Prod Type])="INFO"))
ORDER BY [ORDER DETAIL].Start;

SELECT DISTINCTROW CUSTOMER.*, ORDER.*, ORDER.OID, [ORDER DETAIL].[Prod Type], [ORDER DETAIL].Description, [ORDER DETAIL].Price, [ORDER DETAIL].Plant, [ORDER DETAIL].Location, [ORDER DETAIL].Accept, [ORDER DETAIL].Start, [ORDER DETAIL].[Line No], ORDER.[Proposal Date], ORDER.[Job Note], CUSTOMER.[Customer Note], EVENT.Completed, EVENT.Complete_Date, CUSTOMER.CID
FROM (CUSTOMER INNER JOIN ([ORDER] INNER JOIN [ORDER DETAIL] ON ORDER.OID = [ORDER DETAIL].OID) ON CUSTOMER.CID = ORDER.CID) LEFT JOIN EVENT ON ([ORDER DETAIL].[Line No] = EVENT.[Line No]) AND ([ORDER DETAIL].OID = EVENT.OID)
WHERE ((([ORDER DETAIL].[Prod Type])="WORKSHEET ") AND ((CUSTOMER.CID)=[Forms]![CUSTOMER]![CID]))
ORDER BY [ORDER DETAIL].Start;

SELECT DISTINCTROW CUSTOMER.*, ORDER.*, ORDER.OID, [ORDER DETAIL].[Prod Type], [ORDER DETAIL].Pest, [ORDER DETAIL].Price, [ORDER DETAIL].Plant, [ORDER DETAIL].Location, [ORDER DETAIL].Accept, [ORDER DETAIL].Start, [ORDER DETAIL].[Line No], ORDER.[Proposal Date], ORDER.[Job Note], CUSTOMER.[Customer Note], EVENT.Completed, EVENT.Complete_Date
FROM (CUSTOMER INNER JOIN ([ORDER] INNER JOIN [ORDER DETAIL] ON ORDER.OID = [ORDER DETAIL].OID) ON CUSTOMER.CID = ORDER.CID) LEFT JOIN EVENT ON ([ORDER DETAIL].[Line No] = EVENT.[Line No]) AND ([ORDER DETAIL].OID = EVENT.OID)
WHERE (((ORDER.OID)=[Forms]![ORDER]![OID]) AND (([ORDER DETAIL].[Prod Type])="SPRAY" Or ([ORDER DETAIL].[Prod Type])="PPHM" Or ([ORDER DETAIL].[Prod Type])="IPM DATA" Or ([ORDER DETAIL].[Prod Type])="LAWN" Or ([ORDER DETAIL].[Prod Type])="Hide" Or ([ORDER DETAIL].[Prod Type])="info" Or ([ORDER DETAIL].[Prod Type])="info pphm" Or ([ORDER DETAIL].[Prod Type])="info spray" Or ([ORDER DETAIL].[Prod Type])="info merit" Or ([ORDER DETAIL].[Prod Type])="info drf"))
ORDER BY [ORDER DETAIL].Start;

SELECT DISTINCTROW CUSTOMER.*, ORDER.*, ORDER.OID, [ORDER DETAIL].[Prod Type], [ORDER DETAIL].Description, [ORDER DETAIL].Price, [ORDER DETAIL].Plant, [ORDER DETAIL].Location, [ORDER DETAIL].Accept, [ORDER DETAIL].Start, [ORDER DETAIL].[Line No], CUSTOMER.[Tax Exempt]
FROM CUSTOMER INNER JOIN ([ORDER] INNER JOIN [ORDER DETAIL] ON ORDER.OID = [ORDER DETAIL].OID) ON CUSTOMER.CID = ORDER.CID
WHERE (((ORDER.OID)=[Forms]![ORDER]![OID]) AND (([ORDER DETAIL].[Prod Type])="WORKSHEET "))
ORDER BY [ORDER DETAIL].Start;

SELECT DISTINCTROW CUSTOMER.Title, CUSTOMER.Fname, CUSTOMER.Lname, [ORDER DETAIL].[Prod Type], ORDER.OID, Sum([ORDER DETAIL].Price) AS SumOfPrice, CUSTOMER.Phone, CUSTOMER.[Evening Phone], ORDER.[Proposal Date], ORDER.[Accept Date], [ORDER DETAIL].Accept
FROM ((CUSTOMER INNER JOIN [ORDER] ON CUSTOMER.CID = ORDER.CID) INNER JOIN [ORDER DETAIL] ON ORDER.OID = [ORDER DETAIL].OID) LEFT JOIN EVENT ON ([ORDER DETAIL].[Line No] = EVENT.[Line No]) AND ([ORDER DETAIL].OID = EVENT.OID)
GROUP BY CUSTOMER.Title, CUSTOMER.Fname, CUSTOMER.Lname, [ORDER DETAIL].[Prod Type], ORDER.OID, CUSTOMER.Phone, CUSTOMER.[Evening Phone], ORDER.[Proposal Date], ORDER.[Accept Date], [ORDER DETAIL].Accept, ORDER.[Job Note], ORDER.[Accept Date]
HAVING ((([ORDER DETAIL].[Prod Type])="SPRAY" Or ([ORDER DETAIL].[Prod Type])="PPHM") AND (([ORDER DETAIL].Accept)=Yes))
ORDER BY CUSTOMER.Lname, [ORDER DETAIL].[Prod Type], ORDER.OID;

SELECT DISTINCTROW CUSTOMER.Title, CUSTOMER.Fname, CUSTOMER.Lname, [ORDER DETAIL].[Prod Type], ORDER.OID, Sum([ORDER DETAIL].Price) AS SumOfPrice, CUSTOMER.Phone, CUSTOMER.[Evening Phone], ORDER.[Proposal Date], ORDER.[Accept Date]
FROM ((CUSTOMER INNER JOIN [ORDER] ON CUSTOMER.CID = ORDER.CID) INNER JOIN [ORDER DETAIL] ON ORDER.OID = [ORDER DETAIL].OID) LEFT JOIN EVENT ON ([ORDER DETAIL].[Line No] = EVENT.[Line No]) AND ([ORDER DETAIL].OID = EVENT.OID)
GROUP BY CUSTOMER.Title, CUSTOMER.Fname, CUSTOMER.Lname, [ORDER DETAIL].[Prod Type], ORDER.OID, CUSTOMER.Phone, CUSTOMER.[Evening Phone], ORDER.[Proposal Date], ORDER.[Accept Date], ORDER.[Job Note], ORDER.[Accept Date]
HAVING (((ORDER.[Accept Date])=Format(Now(),"mm/dd/yy")))
ORDER BY CUSTOMER.Lname, [ORDER DETAIL].[Prod Type], ORDER.OID;

SELECT DISTINCTROW CUSTOMER.Title, CUSTOMER.Fname, CUSTOMER.Lname, [ORDER DETAIL].[Prod Type], ORDER.OID, Sum([ORDER DETAIL].Price) AS SumOfPrice, CUSTOMER.Phone, CUSTOMER.[Evening Phone], ORDER.[Proposal Date], ORDER.[Accept Date]
FROM ((CUSTOMER INNER JOIN [ORDER] ON CUSTOMER.CID = ORDER.CID) INNER JOIN [ORDER DETAIL] ON ORDER.OID = [ORDER DETAIL].OID) LEFT JOIN EVENT ON ([ORDER DETAIL].[Line No] = EVENT.[Line No]) AND ([ORDER DETAIL].OID = EVENT.OID)
WHERE ((([ORDER DETAIL].Accept)=Yes))
GROUP BY CUSTOMER.Title, CUSTOMER.Fname, CUSTOMER.Lname, [ORDER DETAIL].[Prod Type], ORDER.OID, CUSTOMER.Phone, CUSTOMER.[Evening Phone], ORDER.[Proposal Date], ORDER.[Accept Date], ORDER.[Job Note], ORDER.[Accept Date]
HAVING ((([ORDER DETAIL].[Prod Type])<>"ipm data" And ([ORDER DETAIL].[Prod Type])<>"info") AND ((ORDER.[Accept Date])>#12/31/2014#))
ORDER BY CUSTOMER.Lname, [ORDER DETAIL].[Prod Type], ORDER.OID;

nodes.id: query:Proposals - Line Item Acceptances w/o Order Accept Date
nodes.name: Proposals - Line Item Acceptances w/o Order Accept Date

properties.sql:
SELECT DISTINCTROW CUSTOMER.Title, CUSTOMER.Fname, CUSTOMER.Lname, [ORDER DETAIL].[Prod Type], ORDER.OID, Sum([ORDER DETAIL].Price) AS SumOfPrice, CUSTOMER.Phone, CUSTOMER.[Evening Phone], ORDER.[Proposal Date], ORDER.[Job Note], ORDER.[2008 Accepted], ORDER.[2007 Accepted]
FROM ((CUSTOMER INNER JOIN [ORDER] ON CUSTOMER.CID = ORDER.CID) INNER JOIN [ORDER DETAIL] ON ORDER.OID = [ORDER DETAIL].OID) LEFT JOIN EVENT ON ([ORDER DETAIL].[Line No] = EVENT.[Line No]) AND ([ORDER DETAIL].OID = EVENT.OID)
GROUP BY CUSTOMER.Title, CUSTOMER.Fname, CUSTOMER.Lname, [ORDER DETAIL].[Prod Type], ORDER.OID, CUSTOMER.Phone, CUSTOMER.[Evening Phone], ORDER.[Proposal Date], ORDER.[Job Note], ORDER.[2008 Accepted], ORDER.[2007 Accepted], ORDER.[Accept Date]
HAVING (((ORDER.[Proposal Date])<#2/9/2018#) AND ((ORDER.[Accept Date])=No Or (ORDER.[Accept Date]) Is Null))
ORDER BY ORDER.OID DESC , ORDER.[Proposal Date] DESC;

SELECT DISTINCTROW CUSTOMER.Title, CUSTOMER.Fname, CUSTOMER.Lname, [ORDER DETAIL].[Prod Type], ORDER.OID, Sum([ORDER DETAIL].Price) AS SumOfPrice, CUSTOMER.Phone, CUSTOMER.[Evening Phone], ORDER.[Proposal Date], ORDER.[Job Note]
FROM ((CUSTOMER INNER JOIN [ORDER] ON CUSTOMER.CID = ORDER.CID) INNER JOIN [ORDER DETAIL] ON ORDER.OID = [ORDER DETAIL].OID) LEFT JOIN EVENT ON ([ORDER DETAIL].[Line No] = EVENT.[Line No]) AND ([ORDER DETAIL].OID = EVENT.OID)
GROUP BY CUSTOMER.Title, CUSTOMER.Fname, CUSTOMER.Lname, [ORDER DETAIL].[Prod Type], ORDER.OID, CUSTOMER.Phone, CUSTOMER.[Evening Phone], ORDER.[Proposal Date], ORDER.[Job Note], ORDER.[Accept Date]
HAVING (((ORDER.[Proposal Date])>#10/1/2010#) AND ((ORDER.[Accept Date])=No Or (ORDER.[Accept Date]) Is Null))
ORDER BY ORDER.OID DESC , ORDER.[Proposal Date] DESC;

SELECT ORDER.OID, [ORDER DETAIL].[Line No], [ORDER DETAIL].[Prod Type], [ORDER DETAIL].Start
FROM [ORDER] INNER JOIN [ORDER DETAIL] ON ORDER.OID = [ORDER DETAIL].OID
WHERE ((([ORDER DETAIL].[Prod Type])="PPHM" Or ([ORDER DETAIL].[Prod Type])="Spray" Or ([ORDER DETAIL].[Prod Type])="Info DRF" Or ([ORDER DETAIL].[Prod Type])="Info Merit" Or ([ORDER DETAIL].[Prod Type])="info PPHM" Or ([ORDER DETAIL].[Prod Type])="info spray") AND (([ORDER DETAIL].Start) Is Null))
ORDER BY ORDER.OID, [ORDER DETAIL].[Line No];

SELECT DISTINCTROW CUSTOMER.Title, CUSTOMER.Lname, CUSTOMER.Fname, [ORDER DETAIL].[Prod Type], ORDER.OID, Sum([ORDER DETAIL].Price) AS SumOfPrice, ORDER.[Proposal Date], ORDER.[Accept Date]
FROM ((CUSTOMER INNER JOIN [ORDER] ON CUSTOMER.CID = ORDER.CID) INNER JOIN [ORDER DETAIL] ON ORDER.OID = [ORDER DETAIL].OID) LEFT JOIN EVENT ON ([ORDER DETAIL].[Line No] = EVENT.[Line No]) AND ([ORDER DETAIL].OID = EVENT.OID)
GROUP BY CUSTOMER.Title, CUSTOMER.Lname, CUSTOMER.Fname, [ORDER DETAIL].[Prod Type], ORDER.OID, CUSTOMER.[E-Mail], ORDER.[Proposal Date], ORDER.[Job Note], ORDER.[Accept Date]
HAVING ((([ORDER DETAIL].[Prod Type])="worksheet") AND ((ORDER.[Proposal Date])>#2/25/2018#))
ORDER BY ORDER.OID DESC;

SELECT DISTINCTROW ORDER.OID, [ORDER DETAIL].[Prod Type], [ORDER DETAIL].Description, [ORDER DETAIL].Price, [ORDER DETAIL].Plant, [ORDER DETAIL].Location, [ORDER DETAIL].Accept, [ORDER DETAIL].Start, [ORDER DETAIL].[Line No], ORDER.[Proposal Date], ORDER.[Job Note], CUSTOMER.[Customer Note], EVENT.Completed, EVENT.Complete_Date, CUSTOMER.[Tax Exempt], CUSTOMER.CID, CUSTOMER.Title, CUSTOMER.Fname, CUSTOMER.Lname, CUSTOMER.Company, CUSTOMER.Street1, CUSTOMER.City, CUSTOMER.State, CUSTOMER.Zip, CUSTOMER.Source, CUSTOMER.Map, CUSTOMER.Grid, CUSTOMER.Phone, CUSTOMER.Fax, CUSTOMER.[Evening Phone], CUSTOMER.[Customer Note], CUSTOMER.Referance, CUSTOMER.[Cell Phone], CUSTOMER.[E-Mail], CUSTOMER.[Tax Exempt], CUSTOMER.[Wood Chips], CUSTOMER.Firewood, ORDER.OID, ORDER.Order, ORDER.[Proposal Date], ORDER.[Accept Date], ORDER.[Work Street], ORDER.[Work City], ORDER.[Work State], ORDER.[Work Zip], ORDER.[Paid Amount], ORDER.[Job Note], ORDER.[Annual Contract], ORDER.[Work Name], ORDER.[Work Map], ORDER.[Work Grid], ORDER.CID, ORDER.[Proposal Date]
FROM (CUSTOMER INNER JOIN ([ORDER] INNER JOIN [ORDER DETAIL] ON ORDER.OID = [ORDER DETAIL].OID) ON CUSTOMER.CID = ORDER.CID) LEFT JOIN EVENT ON ([ORDER DETAIL].[Line No] = EVENT.[Line No]) AND ([ORDER DETAIL].OID = EVENT.OID)
WHERE ((([ORDER DETAIL].[Prod Type])="WORKSHEET " Or ([ORDER DETAIL].[Prod Type])="Hide") AND ((ORDER.[Proposal Date])>Now()-31) AND ((ORDER.[Accept Date]) Is Null))
ORDER BY [ORDER DETAIL].Start;

SELECT DISTINCTROW ORDER.OID, [ORDER DETAIL].[Prod Type], [ORDER DETAIL].Description, [ORDER DETAIL].Price, [ORDER DETAIL].Plant, [ORDER DETAIL].Location, [ORDER DETAIL].Accept, [ORDER DETAIL].Start, [ORDER DETAIL].[Line No], ORDER.[Proposal Date], ORDER.[Job Note], CUSTOMER.[Customer Note], EVENT.Completed, EVENT.Complete_Date, CUSTOMER.[Tax Exempt], CUSTOMER.CID, CUSTOMER.Title, CUSTOMER.Fname, CUSTOMER.Lname, CUSTOMER.Company, CUSTOMER.Street1, CUSTOMER.City, CUSTOMER.State, CUSTOMER.Zip, CUSTOMER.Source, CUSTOMER.Map, CUSTOMER.Grid, CUSTOMER.Phone, CUSTOMER.Fax, CUSTOMER.[Evening Phone], CUSTOMER.[Customer Note], CUSTOMER.Referance, CUSTOMER.[Cell Phone], CUSTOMER.[E-Mail], CUSTOMER.[Tax Exempt], CUSTOMER.[Wood Chips], CUSTOMER.Firewood, ORDER.OID, ORDER.Order, ORDER.[Proposal Date], ORDER.[Accept Date], ORDER.[Work Street], ORDER.[Work City], ORDER.[Work State], ORDER.[Work Zip], ORDER.[Paid Amount], ORDER.[Job Note], ORDER.[Annual Contract], ORDER.[Work Name], ORDER.[Work Map], ORDER.[Work Grid], ORDER.CID, ORDER.[Proposal Date], [ORDER DETAIL].Pest
FROM (CUSTOMER INNER JOIN ([ORDER] INNER JOIN [ORDER DETAIL] ON ORDER.OID = [ORDER DETAIL].OID) ON CUSTOMER.CID = ORDER.CID) LEFT JOIN EVENT ON ([ORDER DETAIL].[Line No] = EVENT.[Line No]) AND ([ORDER DETAIL].OID = EVENT.OID)
WHERE (((ORDER.[Proposal Date])>Now()-31) AND ((ORDER.[Accept Date]) Is Null))
ORDER BY [ORDER DETAIL].Start;

SELECT DISTINCTROW ([Fname])+" "+[CUSTOMER]![Lname] AS Expr1, CUSTOMER.Lname, CUSTOMER.CID
FROM CUSTOMER;

SELECT DISTINCTROW CUSTOMER.CID, ORDER.*, CUSTOMER.Title, CUSTOMER.Title, CUSTOMER.Fname, CUSTOMER.Lname, CUSTOMER.Company, CUSTOMER.Street1, CUSTOMER.City, CUSTOMER.State, CUSTOMER.Zip, CUSTOMER.Source, CUSTOMER.Map, CUSTOMER.Grid, CUSTOMER.Phone, CUSTOMER.Fax, CUSTOMER.[Evening Phone], CUSTOMER.[Customer Note], CUSTOMER.Referance, CUSTOMER.[Cell Phone], CUSTOMER.[E-Mail], CUSTOMER.[Wood Chips], CUSTOMER.Firewood, CUSTOMER.[Tax Exempt], ORDER.[Service Declined]
FROM CUSTOMER INNER JOIN [ORDER] ON CUSTOMER.CID = ORDER.CID;

SELECT DISTINCTROW CUSTOMER.Lname, CUSTOMER.CID, CUSTOMER.[E-Mail], CUSTOMER.Title, CUSTOMER.Fname, CUSTOMER.Company, CUSTOMER.Street1, CUSTOMER.City, CUSTOMER.State, CUSTOMER.Zip, CUSTOMER.Source, CUSTOMER.Map, CUSTOMER.Grid, CUSTOMER.Phone, CUSTOMER.Fax, CUSTOMER.[Evening Phone], CUSTOMER.[Customer Note], CUSTOMER.Referance, CUSTOMER.[Cell Phone], CUSTOMER.[E-Mail], CUSTOMER.[Wood Chips], CUSTOMER.Firewood, CUSTOMER.[Tax Exempt]
FROM CUSTOMER
WHERE (((CUSTOMER.Lname)=[Forms]![CUSTOMER]![lname]))
ORDER BY CUSTOMER.Lname;

SELECT DISTINCTROW CUSTOMER.Title, CUSTOMER.Fname, CUSTOMER.Lname, CUSTOMER.Company, CUSTOMER.Street1, CUSTOMER.City, CUSTOMER.State, CUSTOMER.Zip, CUSTOMER.Source, CUSTOMER.Map, CUSTOMER.Grid, CUSTOMER.Phone, CUSTOMER.Fax, CUSTOMER.[Evening Phone], CUSTOMER.[Customer Note], CUSTOMER.Referance, CUSTOMER.CID, ORDER.OID, [ORDER DETAIL].[Prod Type]
FROM CUSTOMER INNER JOIN ([ORDER] INNER JOIN [ORDER DETAIL] ON ORDER.OID = [ORDER DETAIL].OID) ON CUSTOMER.CID = ORDER.CID
GROUP BY CUSTOMER.Title, CUSTOMER.Fname, CUSTOMER.Lname, CUSTOMER.Company, CUSTOMER.Street1, CUSTOMER.City, CUSTOMER.State, CUSTOMER.Zip, CUSTOMER.Source, CUSTOMER.Map, CUSTOMER.Grid, CUSTOMER.Phone, CUSTOMER.Fax, CUSTOMER.[Evening Phone], CUSTOMER.[Customer Note], CUSTOMER.Referance, CUSTOMER.CID, ORDER.OID, [ORDER DETAIL].[Prod Type]
ORDER BY CUSTOMER.Lname;

SELECT DISTINCTROW CUSTOMER.*, ORDER.*, [ORDER DETAIL].*, EVENT.*, EVENT.Completed, EVENT.Event_Date, [ORDER DETAIL].[Prod Type]
FROM ((CUSTOMER INNER JOIN [ORDER] ON CUSTOMER.CID = ORDER.CID) INNER JOIN [ORDER DETAIL] ON ORDER.OID = [ORDER DETAIL].OID) LEFT JOIN EVENT ON ([ORDER DETAIL].[Line No] = EVENT.[Line No]) AND ([ORDER DETAIL].OID = EVENT.OID)
WHERE ((EVENT.Completed=False))
ORDER BY EVENT.Event_Date, [ORDER DETAIL].[Prod Type];

SELECT CUSTOMER.CID, CUSTOMER.Company AS Company, CUSTOMER.Fname AS Fname, CUSTOMER.Lname, CUSTOMER.Street1, CUSTOMER.City, SUM([ORDER DETAIL].Price) AS CompletedWork, Nz (
        DSum (
            "Nz(ORDER.[PrePaid Disc Given],0)",
            "ORDER",
            "CID=" & CUSTOMER.CID
        ),
        0
    ) AS PrepaidDiscount, Nz (
        DSum (
            "Nz(ORDER.[Write-Off Given],0)",
            "ORDER",
            "CID=" & CUSTOMER.CID
        ),
        0
    ) AS WriteOff, SUM([ORDER DETAIL].Price) - Nz (
        DSum (
            "Nz(ORDER.[PrePaid Disc Given],0)",
            "ORDER",
            "CID=" & CUSTOMER.CID
        ),
        0
    ) - Nz (
        DSum (
            "Nz(ORDER.[Write-Off Given],0)",
            "ORDER",
            "CID=" & CUSTOMER.CID
        ),
        0
    ) AS AdjustedSubtotal, CUSTOMER.[Tax Exempt], ROUND(
        IIf(
            CUSTOMER.[Tax Exempt] = True,
            0,
            0.0635 * (
                SUM([ORDER DETAIL].Price) - Nz (
                    DSum (
                        "Nz(ORDER.[PrePaid Disc Given],0)",
                        "ORDER",
                        "CID=" & CUSTOMER.CID
                    ),
                    0
                ) - Nz (
                    DSum (
                        "Nz(ORDER.[Write-Off Given],0)",
                        "ORDER",
                        "CID=" & CUSTOMER.CID
                    ),
                    0
                )
            )
        ),
        2
    ) AS TaxAmount, SUM([ORDER DETAIL].Price) - Nz (
        DSum (
            "Nz(ORDER.[PrePaid Disc Given],0)",
            "ORDER",
            "CID=" & CUSTOMER.CID
        ),
        0
    ) - Nz (
        DSum (
            "Nz(ORDER.[Write-Off Given],0)",
            "ORDER",
            "CID=" & CUSTOMER.CID
        ),
        0
    ) + ROUND(
        IIf(
            CUSTOMER.[Tax Exempt] = True,
            0,
            0.0635 * (
                SUM([ORDER DETAIL].Price) - Nz (
                    DSum (
                        "Nz(ORDER.[PrePaid Disc Given],0)",
                        "ORDER",
                        "CID=" & CUSTOMER.CID
                    ),
                    0
                ) - Nz (
                    DSum (
                        "Nz(ORDER.[Write-Off Given],0)",
                        "ORDER",
                        "CID=" & CUSTOMER.CID
                    ),
                    0
                )
            )
        ),
        2
    ) AS InvoiceAmount, Nz (
        DSum (
            "Nz([Pd Amt 1],0)+Nz([Pd Amt 2],0)+Nz([Pd Amt 3],0)+Nz([Pd Amt 4],0)+Nz([Pd Amt 5],0)+Nz([Pd Amt 6],0)",
            "ORDER",
            "CID=" & CUSTOMER.CID
        ),
        0
    ) AS PaidAmount, SUM([ORDER DETAIL].Price) - Nz (
        DSum (
            "Nz(ORDER.[PrePaid Disc Given],0)",
            "ORDER",
            "CID=" & CUSTOMER.CID
        ),
        0
    ) - Nz (
        DSum (
            "Nz(ORDER.[Write-Off Given],0)",
            "ORDER",
            "CID=" & CUSTOMER.CID
        ),
        0
    ) + ROUND(
        IIf(
            CUSTOMER.[Tax Exempt] = True,
            0,
            0.0635 * (
                SUM([ORDER DETAIL].Price) - Nz (
                    DSum (
                        "Nz(ORDER.[PrePaid Disc Given],0)",
                        "ORDER",
                        "CID=" & CUSTOMER.CID
                    ),
                    0
                ) - Nz (
                    DSum (
                        "Nz(ORDER.[Write-Off Given],0)",
                        "ORDER",
                        "CID=" & CUSTOMER.CID
                    ),
                    0
                )
            )
        ),
        2
    ) - Nz (
        DSum (
            "Nz([Pd Amt 1],0)+Nz([Pd Amt 2],0)+Nz([Pd Amt 3],0)+Nz([Pd Amt 4],0)+Nz([Pd Amt 5],0)+Nz([Pd Amt 6],0)",
            "ORDER",
            "CID=" & CUSTOMER.CID
        ),
        0
    ) AS BalanceDue
FROM (CUSTOMER INNER JOIN ([ORDER] INNER JOIN [ORDER DETAIL] ON [ORDER].OID = [ORDER DETAIL].OID) ON CUSTOMER.CID = [ORDER].CID) LEFT JOIN EVENT ON ([ORDER DETAIL].OID = EVENT.OID) AND ([ORDER DETAIL].[Line No] = EVENT.[Line No])
WHERE EVENT.Completed = Yes
    AND (
        EVENT.[Paid in full] = No
        OR EVENT.[Paid in full] IS NULL
    )
    AND [ORDER DETAIL].Price IS NOT NULL
    AND [ORDER DETAIL].Price <> 0
GROUP BY CUSTOMER.CID, CUSTOMER.Company, CUSTOMER.Fname, CUSTOMER.Lname, CUSTOMER.Street1, CUSTOMER.City, CUSTOMER.[Tax Exempt]
HAVING (SUM([ORDER DETAIL].Price)
		- Nz (
				DSum (
					"Nz(ORDER.[PrePaid Disc Given],0)",
					"ORDER",
					"CID=" & CUSTOMER.CID
				), 0
			) 
		- Nz (
				DSum (
					"Nz(ORDER.[Write-Off Given],0)",
					"ORDER",
					"CID=" & CUSTOMER.CID
				), 0
			)
		+ ROUND(
			IIf(
				CUSTOMER.[Tax Exempt] = True, 0
				, 0.0635 * 
					(SUM([ORDER DETAIL].Price)
						- Nz (
								DSum (
									"Nz(ORDER.[PrePaid Disc Given],0)",
									"ORDER",
									"CID=" & CUSTOMER.CID
								), 0
							) 
						- Nz (
								DSum (
									"Nz(ORDER.[Write-Off Given],0)",
									"ORDER",
									"CID=" & CUSTOMER.CID
								), 0
							)
					)
				)
			, 2)
		- Nz (
				DSum (
					"Nz([Pd Amt 1],0)+Nz([Pd Amt 2],0)+Nz([Pd Amt 3],0)+Nz([Pd Amt 4],0)+Nz([Pd Amt 5],0)+Nz([Pd Amt 6],0)",
					"ORDER",
					"CID=" & CUSTOMER.CID
				), 0
			)
	) > 0
ORDER BY SUM([ORDER DETAIL].Price) - Nz (
        DSum (
            "Nz(ORDER.[PrePaid Disc Given],0)",
            "ORDER",
            "CID=" & CUSTOMER.CID
        ),
        0
    ) - Nz (
        DSum (
            "Nz(ORDER.[Write-Off Given],0)",
            "ORDER",
            "CID=" & CUSTOMER.CID
        ),
        0
    ) + ROUND(
        IIf(
            CUSTOMER.[Tax Exempt] = True,
            0,
            0.0635 * (
                SUM([ORDER DETAIL].Price) - Nz (
                    DSum (
                        "Nz(ORDER.[PrePaid Disc Given],0)",
                        "ORDER",
                        "CID=" & CUSTOMER.CID
                    ),
                    0
                ) - Nz (
                    DSum (
                        "Nz(ORDER.[Write-Off Given],0)",
                        "ORDER",
                        "CID=" & CUSTOMER.CID
                    ),
                    0
                )
            )
        ),
        2
    ) - Nz (
        DSum (
            "Nz([Pd Amt 1],0)+Nz([Pd Amt 2],0)+Nz([Pd Amt 3],0)+Nz([Pd Amt 4],0)+Nz([Pd Amt 5],0)+Nz([Pd Amt 6],0)",
            "ORDER",
            "CID=" & CUSTOMER.CID
        ),
        0
    ) DESC;

SELECT CUSTOMER.CID, CUSTOMER.Fname, CUSTOMER.Lname, CUSTOMER.Street1, CUSTOMER.City, SUM([ORDER DETAIL].Price) AS TotalBilled, Nz (
        DSum ("AmountPaid", "Payments", "CID=" & CUSTOMER.CID),
        0
    ) AS AmountPaid, SUM([ORDER DETAIL].Price) - Nz (
        DSum ("AmountPaid", "Payments", "CID=" & CUSTOMER.CID),
        0
    ) AS AmountDue
FROM (CUSTOMER INNER JOIN ([ORDER] INNER JOIN [ORDER DETAIL] ON [ORDER].OID = [ORDER DETAIL].OID) ON CUSTOMER.CID = [ORDER].CID) LEFT JOIN EVENT ON ([ORDER DETAIL].[Line No] = EVENT.[Line No]) AND ([ORDER DETAIL].OID = EVENT.OID)
WHERE EVENT.Completed = Yes
    AND (
        EVENT.[Paid in full] = No
        OR EVENT.[Paid in full] IS NULL
    )
    AND [ORDER DETAIL].Price IS NOT NULL
    AND [ORDER DETAIL].Price <> 0
GROUP BY CUSTOMER.CID, CUSTOMER.Fname, CUSTOMER.Lname, CUSTOMER.Street1, CUSTOMER.City
HAVING SUM([ORDER DETAIL].Price) - Nz (
        DSum ("AmountPaid", "Payments", "CID=" & CUSTOMER.CID),
        0
    ) >= 0
ORDER BY SUM([ORDER DETAIL].Price) DESC;

SELECT B.CID, B.Fname, B.Lname, B.Street1, B.City, B.TotalBilled, Nz(P.TotalPaid,0) AS TotalPaid, B.TotalBilled - Nz(P.TotalPaid,0) AS AmountDue
FROM qryTotalBilled AS B LEFT JOIN qryTotalPaid AS P ON B.CID = P.CID
WHERE B.TotalBilled - Nz(P.TotalPaid,0) > 0
ORDER BY B.TotalBilled - Nz(P.TotalPaid,0) DESC;

SELECT O.CID, SUM(OrderTotals.OrderTotal) AS TotalBilled, Nz(SUM(P.AmountPaid),0) AS TotalPaid, SUM(OrderTotals.OrderTotal) - Nz(SUM(P.AmountPaid),0) AS Balance
FROM (SELECT
         O.OID,
         O.CID,
         SUM(OD.Price) AS OrderTotal
     FROM
         [ORDER] AS O
     INNER JOIN
         [ORDER DETAIL] AS OD
     ON
         O.OID = OD.OID
     GROUP BY
         O.OID,
         O.CID
    )  AS OrderTotals LEFT JOIN Payments AS P ON OrderTotals.CID = P.CID
GROUP BY O.CID;

SELECT C.CID, C.Lname, C.Fname, C.Street1, O.[Work Street], O.[Work City], C.City, C.State, C.Zip, C.Map, C.Grid, C.Phone, OD.OID, OD.[Line No], OD.[Prod Type], OD.Location, OD.Plant, OD.Pest, OD.Start, OD.Price, OD.LargeTree, OD.Priority, OD.Accept, E.Completed, E.Event_Date, E.Complete_Date, CA.AssignID, CA.Crew, CA.RouteOrder, CA.ScheduleDate, CA.Notes
FROM (((CUSTOMER AS C INNER JOIN [ORDER] AS O ON C.CID = O.CID) INNER JOIN [ORDER DETAIL] AS OD ON O.OID = OD.OID) LEFT JOIN EVENT AS E ON OD.OID = E.OID AND OD.[Line No] = E.[Line No]) INNER JOIN tblCrewAssignments AS CA ON OD.OID = CA.OID AND OD.[Line No] = CA.LineNo
WHERE OD.Accept = Yes AND (E.Completed = No OR E.Completed IS NULL) AND OD.[Prod Type] IN ('SPRAY','PPHM') AND CA.Crew IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY CA.Crew, CA.RouteOrder, C.Lname;

SELECT o.CID, sum(od.[Price]) AS Price
FROM [order] AS o INNER JOIN ([order detail] AS od INNER JOIN EVENT AS e ON (e.OID = od.OID) AND (e.[Line No] = od.[Line No])) ON od.OID = o.OID
WHERE e.Completed = Yes
    and (od.[Price]) <> 0
    and (od.[Price]) is not null
GROUP BY o.CID
ORDER BY o.CID;

SELECT o.CID, sum(
        od.[Price] - o.[PrePaid Disc Given] - o.[Write-Off Given]
    ) AS Price
FROM [order] AS o INNER JOIN ([order detail] AS od INNER JOIN EVENT AS e ON (e.[Line No] = od.[Line No]) AND (e.OID = od.OID)) ON od.OID = o.OID
WHERE e.Completed = Yes
    AND (od.[Price]) <> 0
    AND (od.[Price]) IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY o.CID
ORDER BY o.CID;

SELECT C.CID, C.Lname, C.Fname, C.Street1, C.City
FROM CUSTOMER AS C;

SELECT c.CID AS CustomerID, c.LName, sum(p.[Price]) AS TotalBillable, Sum(pd.[TotalPaid]) AS TotalPaid, sum(p.[Price]) - Sum(pd.[TotalPaid]) AS BalanceDue
FROM Customer AS c INNER JOIN (qryCustomerBillable AS p INNER JOIN qryCustomerTotalPaid AS pd ON pd.CID = p.CID) ON p.CID = c.CID
GROUP BY c.CID, c.LName
ORDER BY (sum(p.[Price]) - Sum(pd.[TotalPaid])) DESC;

SELECT c.CID AS CustomerID, c.LName, SUM(p.[Price]) AS TotalBillable, SUM(pd.[TotalPaid]) AS TotalPaid, SUM(p.[Price]) - SUM(pd.[TotalPaid]) AS BalanceDue
FROM Customer AS c INNER JOIN (qryCustomerBillable2 AS p INNER JOIN qryCustomerTotalPaid AS pd ON pd.CID = p.CID) ON p.CID = c.CID
GROUP BY c.CID, c.LName
HAVING SUM(p.[Price]) - SUM(pd.[TotalPaid]) >= 0
ORDER BY (SUM(p.[Price]) - SUM(pd.[TotalPaid])) DESC;

SELECT DISTINCT O.OID, O.CID
FROM [ORDER] AS O;

SELECT OD.OID, OD.[Line No], OD.[Prod Type], OD.Pest, OD.Start
FROM [ORDER DETAIL] AS OD LEFT JOIN EVENT AS E ON (OD.[Line No] = E.[Line No]) AND (OD.OID = E.OID)
WHERE OD.Accept = Yes
AND OD.[Prod Type] IN ('SPRAY','PPHM','INFO PPHM','INFO SPRAY')
AND (E.Completed = No OR E.Completed IS NULL)
AND (OD.Start IS NULL OR Year(OD.Start) <> 2026);

SELECT [OID], [Line No], [Prod Type], [Location], [Plant], [Description], [Pest], [Start], [Price]
FROM [ORDER DETAIL];

SELECT QD.*, E.[Completed], E.[Paid in full], IIf(E.[Completed]=Yes AND (E.[Paid in full]=No OR E.[Paid in full] Is Null), QD.[Price], 0) AS OrderLineTotal
FROM qryOrderDetailLines AS QD LEFT JOIN EVENT AS E ON (QD.[Line No] = E.[Line No]) AND (QD.[OID] = E.[OID]);

SELECT OID, CID, [Order] AS OrderTotal, [Pd Amt 1], [Pd Amt 2], [Pd Amt 3], [Pd Amt 4], [Pd Amt 5], [Pd Amt 6], [Pd Date 1], [Pd Date 2], [Pd Date 3], [Pd Date 4], [Pd Date 5], [Pd Date 6]
FROM OrderSource;

INSERT INTO Payments ( OrderID, CID, PaymentDate, AmountPaid, PaidIndex )
SELECT OID, CID, [Pd Date 1], [Pd Amt 1], 1
FROM OrderSource
WHERE [Pd Amt 1] <> 0
  AND NOT EXISTS (
      SELECT 1 FROM Payments
      WHERE Payments.OrderID = OrderSource.OID
        AND Payments.PaidIndex = 1
  );

INSERT INTO Payments ( OrderID, CID, PaymentDate, AmountPaid, PaidIndex )
SELECT OID, CID, [Pd Date 2], [Pd Amt 2], 2
FROM OrderSource
WHERE [Pd Amt 2] <> 0
  AND NOT EXISTS (
      SELECT 1 FROM Payments
      WHERE Payments.OrderID = OrderSource.OID
        AND Payments.PaidIndex = 2
  );

INSERT INTO Payments ( OrderID, CID, PaymentDate, AmountPaid, PaidIndex )
SELECT OID, CID, [Pd Date 3], [Pd Amt 3], 3
FROM OrderSource
WHERE [Pd Amt 3] <> 0
  AND NOT EXISTS (
      SELECT 1 FROM Payments
      WHERE Payments.OrderID = OrderSource.OID
        AND Payments.PaidIndex = 3
  );

INSERT INTO Payments ( OrderID, CID, PaymentDate, AmountPaid, PaidIndex )
SELECT OID, CID, [Pd Date 4], [Pd Amt 4], 4
FROM OrderSource
WHERE [Pd Amt 4] <> 0
  AND NOT EXISTS (
      SELECT 1 FROM Payments
      WHERE Payments.OrderID = OrderSource.OID
        AND Payments.PaidIndex = 4
  );

INSERT INTO Payments ( OrderID, CID, PaymentDate, AmountPaid, PaidIndex )
SELECT OID, CID, [Pd Date 5], [Pd Amt 5], 5
FROM OrderSource
WHERE [Pd Amt 5] <> 0
  AND NOT EXISTS (
      SELECT 1 FROM Payments
      WHERE Payments.OrderID = OrderSource.OID
        AND Payments.PaidIndex = 5
  );

INSERT INTO Payments ( OrderID, CID, PaymentDate, AmountPaid, PaidIndex )

FROM OrderSource
WHERE [Pd Amt 6] <> 0
  AND NOT EXISTS (
      SELECT 1 FROM Payments
      WHERE Payments.OrderID = OrderSource.OID
        AND Payments.PaidIndex = 6
  );

SELECT PaymentID, OrderID, ScheduledSprayID, CID, PaymentDate, AmountPaid, PaidIndex, Notes
FROM Payments;

SELECT CUSTOMER.Fname, CUSTOMER.Lname, CUSTOMER.Street1, CUSTOMER.City, SUM( [ORDER DETAIL].Price)
FROM (CUSTOMER INNER JOIN ([ORDER] INNER JOIN [ORDER DETAIL] ON ORDER.OID = [ORDER DETAIL].OID) ON CUSTOMER.CID = ORDER.CID) LEFT JOIN EVENT ON ([ORDER DETAIL].OID = EVENT.OID) AND ([ORDER DETAIL].[Line No] = EVENT.[Line No])
WHERE EVENT.Completed = Yes
    AND (
        (EVENT.[Paid in full]) = No
        OR (EVENT.[Paid in full]) IS NULL
    )
    AND [ORDER DETAIL].Price IS NOT NULL
    AND [ORDER DETAIL].Price <> 0
GROUP BY CUSTOMER.Fname, CUSTOMER.Lname, CUSTOMER.Street1, CUSTOMER.City
ORDER BY SUM( [ORDER DETAIL].Price) DESC;

SELECT C.[Fname], C.[Lname], C.[Street1], C.[City], SUM(qo.OrderTotal - qo.Payments) AS AmountDueNumeric, Format(SUM(qo.OrderTotal - qo.Payments), "$#,##0.00") AS AmountDue
FROM CUSTOMER AS C LEFT JOIN qryOrderTotals AS qo ON C.[CID] = qo.[CID]
GROUP BY C.[Fname], C.[Lname], C.[Street1], C.[City]
HAVING SUM(qo.OrderTotal - qo.Payments) > 0
ORDER BY SUM(qo.OrderTotal - qo.Payments) DESC;

SELECT DISTINCTROW CUSTOMER.Fname, CUSTOMER.Lname, CUSTOMER.Street1, CUSTOMER.City, ORDER.OID, [ORDER DETAIL].[Line No], [ORDER DETAIL].Location, [ORDER DETAIL].Plant, [ORDER DETAIL].Description, [ORDER DETAIL].Price, EVENT.Billed, EVENT.Bill_Date, EVENT.[Billed 2], EVENT.[Bill_Date 2]
FROM (CUSTOMER INNER JOIN ([ORDER] INNER JOIN [ORDER DETAIL] ON ORDER.OID = [ORDER DETAIL].OID) ON CUSTOMER.CID = ORDER.CID) LEFT JOIN EVENT ON ([ORDER DETAIL].OID = EVENT.OID) AND ([ORDER DETAIL].[Line No] = EVENT.[Line No])
WHERE EVENT.Completed = Yes
    AND (
        (EVENT.[Paid in full]) = No
        OR (EVENT.[Paid in full]) IS NULL
    )
    AND [ORDER DETAIL].Price IS NOT NULL
    AND [ORDER DETAIL].Price <> 0
ORDER BY CUSTOMER.Lname, ORDER.OID;

SELECT SUM([ORDER DETAIL].Price)
FROM (CUSTOMER INNER JOIN ([ORDER] INNER JOIN [ORDER DETAIL] ON ORDER.OID = [ORDER DETAIL].OID) ON CUSTOMER.CID = ORDER.CID) LEFT JOIN EVENT ON ([ORDER DETAIL].[Line No] = EVENT.[Line No]) AND ([ORDER DETAIL].OID = EVENT.OID)
WHERE EVENT.Completed = Yes
    AND (
        (EVENT.[Paid in full]) = No
        OR (EVENT.[Paid in full]) IS NULL
    )
    AND [ORDER DETAIL].Price IS NOT NULL
    AND [ORDER DETAIL].Price <> 0;

SELECT C.CID, C.Lname, C.Fname, C.Street1, O.[Work Street], O.[Work City], C.City, C.State, C.Zip, C.Map, C.Grid, C.Phone, OD.OID, OD.[Line No], OD.[Prod Type], OD.Location, OD.Plant, OD.Pest, OD.Start, OD.Price, OD.LargeTree, OD.Priority, OD.Accept, E.Completed, E.Event_Date, E.Complete_Date, CA.AssignID, CA.Crew, CA.RouteOrder, CA.ScheduleDate, CA.Notes, IIf(CA.Selected IS NULL, False, CA.Selected) AS Selected
FROM (((CUSTOMER AS C INNER JOIN [ORDER] AS O ON C.CID = O.CID) INNER JOIN [ORDER DETAIL] AS OD ON O.OID = OD.OID) LEFT JOIN EVENT AS E ON (OD.OID = E.OID) AND (OD.[Line No] = E.[Line No])) LEFT JOIN tblCrewAssignments AS CA ON (OD.OID = CA.OID) AND (OD.[Line No] = CA.LineNo)
WHERE OD.Accept = Yes
    AND (
        E.Completed = No
        OR E.Completed IS NULL
    )
    AND OD.[Prod Type] IN ('SPRAY', 'PPHM')
    AND CA.Crew IS NULL
ORDER BY C.City, C.Lname, OD.Start;

SELECT [Scheduled Sprays].SprayID, [Scheduled Sprays].CompletedDate, [Scheduled Sprays].AmountDueNumeric, [Scheduled Sprays].IsBilled, Customer.CustomerID, Customer.CustomerName
FROM Customer INNER JOIN [Scheduled Sprays] ON Customer.CustomerID = [Scheduled Sprays].CustomerID;

SELECT Nz(SUM(AmountDueNumeric),0) AS TotalAmountDue
FROM qryReceivablesByClient;

SELECT CUSTOMER.Fname, CUSTOMER.Lname, CUSTOMER.Company, CUSTOMER.Street1, CUSTOMER.City, CUSTOMER.State, CUSTOMER.Zip, CUSTOMER.[Evening Phone]
FROM CUSTOMER
GROUP BY CUSTOMER.Fname, CUSTOMER.Lname, CUSTOMER.Company, CUSTOMER.Street1, CUSTOMER.City, CUSTOMER.State, CUSTOMER.Zip, CUSTOMER.[Evening Phone], CUSTOMER.Referance
HAVING (((CUSTOMER.Referance)=Yes))
ORDER BY CUSTOMER.Lname;

SELECT DISTINCTROW CUSTOMER.*, ORDER.*, ORDER.OID, [ORDER DETAIL].[Prod Type], [ORDER DETAIL].Pest, [ORDER DETAIL].Price, [ORDER DETAIL].Plant, [ORDER DETAIL].Location, [ORDER DETAIL].Accept, [ORDER DETAIL].Start, [ORDER DETAIL].[Line No], ORDER.[Proposal Date], ORDER.[Job Note], CUSTOMER.[Customer Note], EVENT.Completed, EVENT.Complete_Date, [ORDER DETAIL].Accept, ORDER.[Accept Date], CUSTOMER.[Cell Phone]
FROM (CUSTOMER INNER JOIN ([ORDER] INNER JOIN [ORDER DETAIL] ON ORDER.OID = [ORDER DETAIL].OID) ON CUSTOMER.CID = ORDER.CID) LEFT JOIN EVENT ON ([ORDER DETAIL].[Line No] = EVENT.[Line No]) AND ([ORDER DETAIL].OID = EVENT.OID)
WHERE ((([ORDER DETAIL].[Prod Type])="PPHM") AND ((ORDER.[Accept Date]) Is Not Null))
ORDER BY [ORDER DETAIL].Start;

SELECT DISTINCTROW CUSTOMER.Lname, [ORDER DETAIL].Location, [ORDER DETAIL].Plant, [ORDER DETAIL].Pest, ORDER.OID, [ORDER DETAIL].[Line No], [ORDER DETAIL].Start, [ORDER DETAIL].Accept
FROM (CUSTOMER INNER JOIN ([ORDER] INNER JOIN [ORDER DETAIL] ON ORDER.OID = [ORDER DETAIL].OID) ON CUSTOMER.CID = ORDER.CID) LEFT JOIN EVENT ON ([ORDER DETAIL].[Line No] = EVENT.[Line No]) AND ([ORDER DETAIL].OID = EVENT.OID)
WHERE ((([ORDER DETAIL].Pest) Like "*scale*" And ([ORDER DETAIL].Pest) Like "*safari*"))
ORDER BY [ORDER DETAIL].Pest, ORDER.OID, [ORDER DETAIL].[Line No], [ORDER DETAIL].[Accepted Date] DESC;

SELECT ORDER.CID, ORDER.OID, ORDER.[Proposal Date], ORDER.[Accept Date], Sum([ORDER DETAIL].Price) AS SumOfPrice, [ORDER DETAIL].[Prod Type], [ORDER DETAIL].Accept
FROM [ORDER] INNER JOIN [ORDER DETAIL] ON ORDER.OID = [ORDER DETAIL].OID
GROUP BY ORDER.CID, ORDER.OID, ORDER.[Proposal Date], ORDER.[Accept Date], [ORDER DETAIL].[Prod Type], [ORDER DETAIL].Accept
HAVING (((ORDER.CID)=6246) AND (([ORDER DETAIL].[Prod Type])="spray" Or ([ORDER DETAIL].[Prod Type])="worksheet") AND (([ORDER DETAIL].Accept)=Yes));

SELECT CUSTOMER.Source, Sum([ORDER DETAIL].Price) AS SumOfPrice, [ORDER DETAIL].Accept
FROM (CUSTOMER INNER JOIN [ORDER] ON CUSTOMER.CID = ORDER.CID) INNER JOIN [ORDER DETAIL] ON ORDER.OID = [ORDER DETAIL].OID
GROUP BY CUSTOMER.Source, [ORDER DETAIL].Accept
HAVING ((([ORDER DETAIL].Accept)=Yes))
ORDER BY Sum([ORDER DETAIL].Price) DESC;

SELECT DISTINCTROW CUSTOMER.*

SELECT DISTINCTROW CUSTOMER.Title, CUSTOMER.Lname, CUSTOMER.Fname, CUSTOMER.Company, CUSTOMER.Street1, CUSTOMER.City, CUSTOMER.State, CUSTOMER.Zip, ORDER.OID, EVENT.[Paid in full]

GROUP BY CUSTOMER.Title, CUSTOMER.Lname, CUSTOMER.Fname, CUSTOMER.Company, CUSTOMER.Street1, CUSTOMER.City, CUSTOMER.State, CUSTOMER.Zip, ORDER.OID, EVENT.[Paid in full], [ORDER DETAIL].[Prod Type], EVENT.[Billed 3], EVENT.Completed, [ORDER DETAIL].Accept

ORDER BY CUSTOMER.Lname, CUSTOMER.Fname;

SELECT DISTINCTROW CUSTOMER.CID, ORDER.OID, CUSTOMER.Title, CUSTOMER.Fname, CUSTOMER.Lname, CUSTOMER.Company, CUSTOMER.Street1, CUSTOMER.City, CUSTOMER.State, CUSTOMER.Zip, [ORDER DETAIL].[Prod Type], [ORDER DETAIL].[Line No]

SELECT DISTINCTROW CUSTOMER.Lname, ORDER.OID, Sum([ORDER DETAIL].Price) AS SumOfPrice, [ORDER DETAIL].[Prod Type], [ORDER DETAIL].Accept
FROM ((CUSTOMER INNER JOIN [ORDER] ON CUSTOMER.CID = ORDER.CID) INNER JOIN [ORDER DETAIL] ON ORDER.OID = [ORDER DETAIL].OID) LEFT JOIN EVENT ON ([ORDER DETAIL].[Line No] = EVENT.[Line No]) AND ([ORDER DETAIL].OID = EVENT.OID)

SELECT DISTINCTROW CUSTOMER.*, ORDER.*, ORDER.OID, [ORDER DETAIL].[Prod Type], [ORDER DETAIL].Description, [ORDER DETAIL].Price, Round([Order Detail.24 Price]*1.03,0) AS Expr1, [ORDER DETAIL].Plant, [ORDER DETAIL].Location, [ORDER DETAIL].Accept, [ORDER DETAIL].Start, [ORDER DETAIL].Pest, [ORDER DETAIL].[Line No], ORDER.[Job Note], ORDER.[Annual Contract], CUSTOMER.[Customer Note], ORDER.[Proposal Date], ORDER.[Accept Date], EVENT.Gallonage, ORDER.[2024 Accepted], ORDER.[2023 Accepted], ORDER.[2022 Accepted], ORDER.[2021 Accepted], ORDER.[2020 Accepted], ORDER.[2019 Accepted], ORDER.[2018 Accepted], ORDER.[2017 Accepted], ORDER.[2016 Accepted], ORDER.[2015 Accepted], [ORDER DETAIL].[24 Accepted], [ORDER DETAIL].[23 Accepted], [ORDER DETAIL].[22 Accepted], [ORDER DETAIL].[21 Accepted], [ORDER DETAIL].[20 Accepted], [ORDER DETAIL].[19 Accepted], [ORDER DETAIL].[18 Accepted], [ORDER DETAIL].[17 Accepted], [ORDER DETAIL].[16 Accepted], [ORDER DETAIL].[15 Accepted], [ORDER DETAIL].[24 Price], [ORDER DETAIL].[23 Price], [ORDER DETAIL].[22 Price], [ORDER DETAIL].[21 Price], [ORDER DETAIL].[20 Price], [ORDER DETAIL].[19 Price], [ORDER DETAIL].[18 Price], [ORDER DETAIL].[17 Price], [ORDER DETAIL].[16 Price], [ORDER DETAIL].[15 Price], [ORDER DETAIL].Price, CUSTOMER.Source, CUSTOMER.Lname

SELECT DISTINCTROW CUSTOMER.Title, CUSTOMER.Lname, CUSTOMER.Fname, CUSTOMER.Company, CUSTOMER.Street1, CUSTOMER.City, CUSTOMER.State, CUSTOMER.Zip, ORDER.OID, [ORDER DETAIL].[Prod Type]

SELECT DISTINCTROW CUSTOMER.*, ORDER.*, ORDER.OID, [ORDER DETAIL].[Prod Type], [ORDER DETAIL].Description, [ORDER DETAIL].Application, [ORDER DETAIL].Price, [ORDER DETAIL].Plant, [ORDER DETAIL].Location, [ORDER DETAIL].Accept, [ORDER DETAIL].Start, [ORDER DETAIL].End, [ORDER DETAIL].Pest, [ORDER DETAIL].[Line No]

SELECT DISTINCTROW CUSTOMER.Lname, ORDER.[Work Street], EVENT.Completed, EVENT.Complete_Date, [ORDER DETAIL].OID, [ORDER DETAIL].[Line No], [ORDER DETAIL].Location, [ORDER DETAIL].Plant, [ORDER DETAIL].Pest, EVENT.Completed, [ORDER DETAIL].Price, [ORDER DETAIL].Start, [ORDER DETAIL].[Prod Type], [ORDER DETAIL].Accept, [ORDER DETAIL].End, [ORDER DETAIL].Application, CUSTOMER.Title

SELECT DISTINCTROW CUSTOMER.Lname, [ORDER DETAIL].OID, [ORDER DETAIL].[Line No], ORDER.[Work Street], EVENT.Completed, EVENT.Complete_Date, EVENT.Gallonage, [ORDER DETAIL].Location, [ORDER DETAIL].Plant, [ORDER DETAIL].Pest, [ORDER DETAIL].Price

WHERE (((CUSTOMER.Lname)=[Forms]![CUSTOMER]![lname]) AND (([ORDER DETAIL].Pest) Not Like "Health****" And ([ORDER DETAIL].Pest) Not Like "*inject*") AND (([ORDER DETAIL].Start)<Now()+30) AND (([ORDER DETAIL].[Prod Type])="SPRAY" Or ([ORDER DETAIL].[Prod Type])="PPHM" Or ([ORDER DETAIL].[Prod Type])="LAWN" Or ([ORDER DETAIL].[Prod Type])="info pphm" Or ([ORDER DETAIL].[Prod Type])="info spray") AND (([ORDER DETAIL].Accept)=Yes))
ORDER BY [ORDER DETAIL].[Line No], [ORDER DETAIL].Start;

SELECT DISTINCTROW CUSTOMER.Lname, ORDER.[Work Street], EVENT.Completed, EVENT.Complete_Date, EVENT.Gallonage, [ORDER DETAIL].OID, [ORDER DETAIL].[Line No], [ORDER DETAIL].Location, [ORDER DETAIL].Plant, [ORDER DETAIL].Pest, [ORDER DETAIL].Price, [ORDER DETAIL].Accept
FROM (CUSTOMER INNER JOIN ([ORDER] INNER JOIN [ORDER DETAIL] ON ORDER.OID = [ORDER DETAIL].OID) ON CUSTOMER.CID = ORDER.CID) LEFT JOIN EVENT ON ([ORDER DETAIL].[Line No] = EVENT.[Line No]) AND ([ORDER DETAIL].OID = EVENT.OID)
WHERE ((([ORDER DETAIL].OID)=[Forms]![ORDER]![OID]) AND (([ORDER DETAIL].Pest) Not Like "Health****" And ([ORDER DETAIL].Pest) Not Like "*inject*") AND (([ORDER DETAIL].Accept)=Yes) AND (([ORDER DETAIL].[Prod Type])="SPRAY" Or ([ORDER DETAIL].[Prod Type])="PPHM" Or ([ORDER DETAIL].[Prod Type])="LAWN" Or ([ORDER DETAIL].[Prod Type])="Info PPHM" Or ([ORDER DETAIL].[Prod Type])="info spray"))
ORDER BY [ORDER DETAIL].[Line No], [ORDER DETAIL].Start;

SELECT DISTINCTROW [Sequence] AS Expr1, ORDER.OID, [ORDER DETAIL].[Line No], ORDER.[Work Name], ORDER.[Work Street], ORDER.[Work Map], ORDER.[Work City], ORDER.[Work Grid], CUSTOMER.[Evening Phone], [ORDER DETAIL].Location, [ORDER DETAIL].Plant, [ORDER DETAIL].Pest, [ORDER DETAIL].Price, [ORDER DETAIL].[Prod Type], CUSTOMER.[Customer Note], ORDER.[Job Note], CUSTOMER.Company
FROM (CUSTOMER INNER JOIN ([ORDER] INNER JOIN [ORDER DETAIL] ON ORDER.OID = [ORDER DETAIL].OID) ON CUSTOMER.CID = ORDER.CID) LEFT JOIN EVENT ON ([ORDER DETAIL].[Line No] = EVENT.[Line No]) AND ([ORDER DETAIL].OID = EVENT.OID)
WHERE ((([ORDER DETAIL].Pest) Like "Health****") AND (([ORDER DETAIL].[Prod Type])="PPHM" Or ([ORDER DETAIL].[Prod Type])="SPRAY") AND ((EVENT.Completed)=No Or (EVENT.Completed) Is Null) AND (([ORDER DETAIL].Start)<Now()+20) AND (([ORDER DETAIL].Accept)=Yes)) OR ((([ORDER DETAIL].[Prod Type])="INFO DRF") AND ((EVENT.Completed)=No Or (EVENT.Completed) Is Null) AND (([ORDER DETAIL].Start)<Now()+20) AND (([ORDER DETAIL].Accept)=Yes))
ORDER BY [ORDER DETAIL].[Accepted Date] DESC;

SELECT DISTINCTROW CUSTOMER.Lname, ORDER.[Work Street], ORDER.[Work City], [ORDER DETAIL].Location, [ORDER DETAIL].Plant, [ORDER DETAIL].Pest, [ORDER DETAIL].Price, EVENT.Complete_Date

WHERE (((EVENT.Completed)=Yes) AND (([ORDER DETAIL].Start)<Now()) AND (([ORDER DETAIL].[Prod Type])="LAWN") AND (([ORDER DETAIL].Accept)=Yes))
ORDER BY ORDER.[Proposal Date] DESC;

SELECT DISTINCTROW [Sequence] AS Expr1, ORDER.OID, [ORDER DETAIL].[Line No], CUSTOMER.Lname, ORDER.[Work Street], CUSTOMER.Map, ORDER.[Work City], CUSTOMER.Grid, CUSTOMER.[Evening Phone], [ORDER DETAIL].Location, [ORDER DETAIL].Plant, [ORDER DETAIL].Pest, [ORDER DETAIL].Price, [ORDER DETAIL].[Prod Type], CUSTOMER.[Customer Note], ORDER.[Job Note], CUSTOMER.Company

SELECT DISTINCTROW [Sequence] AS Expr1, ORDER.OID, [ORDER DETAIL].[Line No], ORDER.[Work Name], ORDER.[Work Street], ORDER.[Work Map], ORDER.[Work City], ORDER.[Work Grid], CUSTOMER.[Evening Phone], [ORDER DETAIL].Location, [ORDER DETAIL].Plant, [ORDER DETAIL].Pest, [ORDER DETAIL].Price, [ORDER DETAIL].[Prod Type], CUSTOMER.[Customer Note], ORDER.[Job Note], CUSTOMER.Company, [ORDER DETAIL].Start

WHERE ((([ORDER DETAIL].Pest) Like "*inject*") AND (([ORDER DETAIL].[Prod Type])="PPHM" Or ([ORDER DETAIL].[Prod Type])="SPRAY") AND (([ORDER DETAIL].Start)<Now()+20) AND ((EVENT.Completed)=No Or (EVENT.Completed) Is Null) AND (([ORDER DETAIL].Accept)=Yes)) OR ((([ORDER DETAIL].[Prod Type])="info merit") AND (([ORDER DETAIL].Start)<Now()+20) AND ((EVENT.Completed)=No Or (EVENT.Completed) Is Null) AND (([ORDER DETAIL].Accept)=Yes))
ORDER BY [ORDER DETAIL].[Accepted Date] DESC;

SELECT DISTINCTROW [Sequence] AS Expr1, ORDER.OID, [ORDER DETAIL].[Line No], ORDER.[Work Name], ORDER.[Work Street], ORDER.[Work Map], ORDER.[Work City], ORDER.[Work Grid], CUSTOMER.[Evening Phone], [ORDER DETAIL].Location, [ORDER DETAIL].Plant, [ORDER DETAIL].Pest, [ORDER DETAIL].Price, [ORDER DETAIL].[Prod Type], CUSTOMER.[Customer Note], ORDER.[Job Note], CUSTOMER.Company, [ORDER DETAIL].Start

ORDER BY [ORDER DETAIL].[Accepted Date] DESC , ORDER.OID, [ORDER DETAIL].[Line No];

SELECT DISTINCTROW EVENT.Complete_Date, ORDER.OID, [ORDER DETAIL].[Line No], ORDER.[Work Name], ORDER.[Work Street], ORDER.[Work Map], ORDER.[Work City], ORDER.[Work Grid], CUSTOMER.[Evening Phone], [ORDER DETAIL].Location, [ORDER DETAIL].Plant, [ORDER DETAIL].Pest, [ORDER DETAIL].Price, [ORDER DETAIL].[Prod Type], CUSTOMER.[Customer Note], ORDER.[Job Note], CUSTOMER.Company, [ORDER DETAIL].Start

SELECT DISTINCTROW ORDER.OID, [ORDER DETAIL].[Line No], CUSTOMER.Lname, ORDER.[Work Street], CUSTOMER.Map, ORDER.[Work City], CUSTOMER.Grid, CUSTOMER.[Evening Phone], [ORDER DETAIL].Location, [ORDER DETAIL].Plant, [ORDER DETAIL].Pest, [ORDER DETAIL].Price, [ORDER DETAIL].[Prod Type]
