WHERE ((([ORDER DETAIL].Pest) Not Like "Health****") AND (([ORDER DETAIL].[Prod Type])="SPRAY") AND ((EVENT.Completed)=No Or (EVENT.Completed) Is Null) AND (([ORDER DETAIL].Start)<Date()) AND (([ORDER DETAIL].Accept)=Yes))
ORDER BY ORDER.[Proposal Date] DESC;

SELECT DISTINCTROW [Sequence] AS Expr1, ORDER.OID, [ORDER DETAIL].[Line No], ORDER.[Work Name], ORDER.[Work Street], ORDER.[Work Map], ORDER.[Work City], ORDER.[Work Grid], CUSTOMER.[Evening Phone], [ORDER DETAIL].Location, [ORDER DETAIL].Plant, [ORDER DETAIL].Pest, [ORDER DETAIL].Price, [ORDER DETAIL].[Prod Type], CUSTOMER.[Customer Note], ORDER.[Job Note], CUSTOMER.Company, [ORDER DETAIL].Start
FROM (CUSTOMER INNER JOIN ([ORDER] INNER JOIN [ORDER DETAIL] ON ORDER.OID = [ORDER DETAIL].OID) ON CUSTOMER.CID = ORDER.CID) LEFT JOIN EVENT ON ([ORDER DETAIL].[Line No] = EVENT.[Line No]) AND ([ORDER DETAIL].OID = EVENT.OID)
WHERE ((([ORDER DETAIL].Pest) Not Like "Health*" And ([ORDER DETAIL].Pest) Not Like "*inject*") AND (([ORDER DETAIL].[Prod Type])="SPRAY" Or ([ORDER DETAIL].[Prod Type])="info spray") AND (([ORDER DETAIL].Start)<Now()+28) AND (([ORDER DETAIL].Accept)=Yes) AND ((EVENT.Completed)=No Or (EVENT.Completed) Is Null))
ORDER BY [ORDER DETAIL].[Accepted Date] DESC , ORDER.OID, [ORDER DETAIL].[Line No];

SELECT DISTINCTROW EVENT.Complete_Date, ORDER.OID, [ORDER DETAIL].[Line No], ORDER.[Work Name], ORDER.[Work Street], ORDER.[Work Map], ORDER.[Work City], ORDER.[Work Grid], CUSTOMER.[Evening Phone], [ORDER DETAIL].Location, [ORDER DETAIL].Plant, [ORDER DETAIL].Pest, [ORDER DETAIL].Price, [ORDER DETAIL].[Prod Type], CUSTOMER.[Customer Note], ORDER.[Job Note], CUSTOMER.Company, [ORDER DETAIL].Start
FROM (CUSTOMER INNER JOIN ([ORDER] INNER JOIN [ORDER DETAIL] ON ORDER.OID = [ORDER DETAIL].OID) ON CUSTOMER.CID = ORDER.CID) LEFT JOIN EVENT ON ([ORDER DETAIL].[Line No] = EVENT.[Line No]) AND ([ORDER DETAIL].OID = EVENT.OID)
WHERE ((([ORDER DETAIL].Pest) Like "Scab/Rust*1st*") AND (([ORDER DETAIL].[Prod Type])="SPRAY") AND (([ORDER DETAIL].Accept)=Yes) AND ((EVENT.Completed)=Yes))
ORDER BY [ORDER DETAIL].[Accepted Date] DESC;

SELECT DISTINCTROW CUSTOMER.Lname, CUSTOMER.Street1, CUSTOMER.City, CUSTOMER.Map, CUSTOMER.Grid, CUSTOMER.[Evening Phone], [ORDER DETAIL].Location, [ORDER DETAIL].Plant, [ORDER DETAIL].Pest, [Rate] AS Expr1, [Amount] AS Expr2, [ORDER DETAIL].Price, Left([Pest],6) AS Expr3
FROM (CUSTOMER INNER JOIN [ORDER] ON CUSTOMER.CID = ORDER.CID) INNER JOIN ([ORDER DETAIL] LEFT JOIN EVENT ON [ORDER DETAIL].[Line No] = EVENT.[Line No]) ON ORDER.OID = [ORDER DETAIL].OID
WHERE (([ORDER DETAIL].[Prod Type]="SPRAY") AND ([ORDER DETAIL].Accept=Yes) AND ([ORDER DETAIL].Start>#03/30/95#) AND (Not (Left([Pest],6))="Health") AND ([ORDER DETAIL].End<#05/16/95#))
ORDER BY [ORDER DETAIL].Pest;

SELECT DISTINCTROW CUSTOMER.Lname, CUSTOMER.Street1, CUSTOMER.City, CUSTOMER.Map, CUSTOMER.Grid, CUSTOMER.[Evening Phone], [ORDER DETAIL].Location, [ORDER DETAIL].Plant, [ORDER DETAIL].Pest, [Rate] AS Expr1, [Amount] AS Expr2, [ORDER DETAIL].Price
FROM ((CUSTOMER INNER JOIN [ORDER] ON CUSTOMER.CID = ORDER.CID) INNER JOIN [ORDER DETAIL] ON ORDER.OID = [ORDER DETAIL].OID) LEFT JOIN EVENT ON ([ORDER DETAIL].[Line No] = EVENT.[Line No]) AND ([ORDER DETAIL].OID = EVENT.OID)
WHERE (([ORDER DETAIL].Pest Like "Ticks***********************") AND ([ORDER DETAIL].[Prod Type]="SPRAY") AND ([ORDER DETAIL].Accept=Yes) AND (EVENT.Completed=No Or EVENT.Completed Is Null))
ORDER BY [ORDER DETAIL].Pest;

SELECT ORDER.CID, Sum(EVENT.[Event Price]) AS [SumOfEvent Price]
FROM EVENT INNER JOIN [ORDER] ON EVENT.OID = ORDER.OID
WHERE (((EVENT.Completed)=Yes) AND ((EVENT.[To Bill])=No))
GROUP BY ORDER.CID
HAVING (((Sum(EVENT.[Event Price]))>0));

SELECT [ORDER DETAIL].[Prod Type], ORDER.OID, [ORDER DETAIL].[Line No], [ORDER DETAIL].Start, [ORDER DETAIL].Pest
FROM ((CUSTOMER INNER JOIN [ORDER] ON CUSTOMER.CID = ORDER.CID) INNER JOIN [ORDER DETAIL] ON ORDER.OID = [ORDER DETAIL].OID) LEFT JOIN EVENT ON ([ORDER DETAIL].[Line No] = EVENT.[Line No]) AND ([ORDER DETAIL].OID = EVENT.OID)
WHERE ((([ORDER DETAIL].[Prod Type])="SPRAY" Or ([ORDER DETAIL].[Prod Type])="Hide" Or ([ORDER DETAIL].[Prod Type])="LAWN" Or ([ORDER DETAIL].[Prod Type])="PPHM") AND (([ORDER DETAIL].Start) Is Null))
ORDER BY [ORDER DETAIL].[Prod Type], ORDER.OID, [ORDER DETAIL].[Line No];

SELECT DISTINCTROW Sum([ORDER DETAIL].Price) AS SumOfPrice, ORDER.OID, [ORDER DETAIL].[Prod Type], EVENT.[Paid Amount], EVENT.[Paid Amount 2], EVENT.[Paid Amount 3], EVENT.[Paid  date 2], EVENT.[Paid date 3], EVENT.[Paid Date 1], EVENT.[Check Number 1], EVENT.[Check Number 2], EVENT.[Check Number 3], CUSTOMER.Fname, CUSTOMER.Company, CUSTOMER.Street1, CUSTOMER.City, CUSTOMER.State, CUSTOMER.Zip, CUSTOMER.Title, CUSTOMER.CID, ORDER.[Accept Date], ORDER.[Proposal Date], EVENT.[Paid Amount 4], EVENT.[Paid date 4], EVENT.[Check Number 4]
FROM (CUSTOMER INNER JOIN ([ORDER] INNER JOIN [ORDER DETAIL] ON ORDER.OID = [ORDER DETAIL].OID) ON CUSTOMER.CID = ORDER.CID) LEFT JOIN EVENT ON ([ORDER DETAIL].[Line No] = EVENT.[Line No]) AND ([ORDER DETAIL].OID = EVENT.OID)
WHERE ((([ORDER DETAIL].Accept)=Yes))
GROUP BY ORDER.OID, [ORDER DETAIL].[Prod Type], EVENT.[Paid Amount], EVENT.[Paid Amount 2], EVENT.[Paid Amount 3], EVENT.[Paid  date 2], EVENT.[Paid date 3], EVENT.[Paid Date 1], EVENT.[Check Number 1], EVENT.[Check Number 2], EVENT.[Check Number 3], CUSTOMER.Fname, CUSTOMER.Company, CUSTOMER.Street1, CUSTOMER.City, CUSTOMER.State, CUSTOMER.Zip, CUSTOMER.Title, CUSTOMER.CID, ORDER.[Accept Date], ORDER.[Proposal Date], EVENT.[Paid Amount 4], EVENT.[Paid date 4], EVENT.[Check Number 4], CUSTOMER.Lname
HAVING (((CUSTOMER.Lname)=[Forms]![CUSTOMER]![lname]));

SELECT DISTINCTROW ORDER.OID, CUSTOMER.CID, CUSTOMER.[Tax Exempt], CUSTOMER.Title, CUSTOMER.Fname, CUSTOMER.Lname, CUSTOMER.Company, CUSTOMER.Street1, CUSTOMER.City, CUSTOMER.State, CUSTOMER.Zip, ORDER.[Accept Date], ORDER.[Proposal Date], Sum([ORDER DETAIL].Price) AS SumOfPrice, ORDER.[Pd Amt 1], ORDER.[Pd Amt 2], ORDER.[Pd Amt 3], ORDER.[Pd Amt 4], ORDER.[Pd Amt 5], ORDER.[Pd Amt 6], [ORDER DETAIL].Accept, ORDER.[Work Name], ORDER.[Work Street], ORDER.[Work City], ORDER.[Work State], [Pd Amt 1]+[Pd Amt 2]+[Pd Amt 3]+[Pd Amt 4]+[Pd Amt 5]+[Pd Amt 6] AS PaidAmount, EVENT.Completed, Sum([ORDER DETAIL.Price]*[Completed]*-1) AS CompletedWork, Sum([Order Detail.Price]*[Order Detail.Accept]) AS AcceptedWork
FROM (CUSTOMER INNER JOIN ([ORDER] INNER JOIN [ORDER DETAIL] ON ORDER.OID = [ORDER DETAIL].OID) ON CUSTOMER.CID = ORDER.CID) LEFT JOIN EVENT ON ([ORDER DETAIL].[Line No] = EVENT.[Line No]) AND ([ORDER DETAIL].OID = EVENT.OID)
GROUP BY ORDER.OID, CUSTOMER.CID, CUSTOMER.[Tax Exempt], CUSTOMER.Title, CUSTOMER.Fname, CUSTOMER.Lname, CUSTOMER.Company, CUSTOMER.Street1, CUSTOMER.City, CUSTOMER.State, CUSTOMER.Zip, ORDER.[Accept Date], ORDER.[Proposal Date], ORDER.[Pd Amt 1], ORDER.[Pd Amt 2], ORDER.[Pd Amt 3], ORDER.[Pd Amt 4], ORDER.[Pd Amt 5], ORDER.[Pd Amt 6], [ORDER DETAIL].Accept, ORDER.[Work Name], ORDER.[Work Street], ORDER.[Work City], ORDER.[Work State], [Pd Amt 1]+[Pd Amt 2]+[Pd Amt 3]+[Pd Amt 4]+[Pd Amt 5]+[Pd Amt 6], EVENT.Completed, ORDER.[Ck # 1], ORDER.[Ck # 2], ORDER.[Ck # 3], ORDER.[Ck # 4], ORDER.[Ck # 5], ORDER.[Ck # 6]
HAVING (((CUSTOMER.Lname)=[Forms]![CUSTOMER]![lname]) AND (([ORDER DETAIL].Accept)=Yes));

SELECT DISTINCTROW CUSTOMER.Lname, ORDER.OID, Sum([ORDER DETAIL].Price) AS SumOfPrice, [ORDER DETAIL].[Prod Type], EVENT.[Paid Amount], EVENT.[Paid Amount 2], EVENT.[Paid Amount 3], EVENT.[Paid Date], EVENT.[Paid  date 2], EVENT.[Paid date 3], EVENT.[Paid Date 1], EVENT.[Check Number 1], EVENT.[Check Number 2], EVENT.[Check Number 3], CUSTOMER.Fname, CUSTOMER.Company, CUSTOMER.Street1, CUSTOMER.City, CUSTOMER.State, CUSTOMER.Zip, CUSTOMER.Title, CUSTOMER.CID, ORDER.[Accept Date], ORDER.[Proposal Date], EVENT.[Event Price]
FROM (CUSTOMER INNER JOIN ([ORDER] INNER JOIN [ORDER DETAIL] ON ORDER.OID = [ORDER DETAIL].OID) ON CUSTOMER.CID = ORDER.CID) LEFT JOIN EVENT ON ([ORDER DETAIL].[Line No] = EVENT.[Line No]) AND ([ORDER DETAIL].OID = EVENT.OID)
GROUP BY CUSTOMER.Lname, ORDER.OID, [ORDER DETAIL].[Prod Type], EVENT.[Paid Amount], EVENT.[Paid Amount 2], EVENT.[Paid Amount 3], EVENT.[Paid Date], EVENT.[Paid  date 2], EVENT.[Paid date 3], EVENT.[Paid Date 1], EVENT.[Check Number 1], EVENT.[Check Number 2], EVENT.[Check Number 3], CUSTOMER.Fname, CUSTOMER.Company, CUSTOMER.Street1, CUSTOMER.City, CUSTOMER.State, CUSTOMER.Zip, CUSTOMER.Title, CUSTOMER.CID, ORDER.[Accept Date], ORDER.[Proposal Date], EVENT.[Event Price], [ORDER DETAIL].Accept
HAVING (((CUSTOMER.Lname)=[Forms]![CUSTOMER]![lname]) AND (([ORDER DETAIL].Accept)=Yes));

SELECT DISTINCTROW CUSTOMER.Lname, ORDER.OID, Sum([ORDER DETAIL].Price) AS SumOfPrice, [ORDER DETAIL].[Prod Type], EVENT.[Paid Amount], EVENT.[Paid Amount 2], EVENT.[Paid Amount 3], EVENT.Completed
FROM (CUSTOMER INNER JOIN ([ORDER] INNER JOIN [ORDER DETAIL] ON ORDER.OID = [ORDER DETAIL].OID) ON CUSTOMER.CID = ORDER.CID) LEFT JOIN EVENT ON ([ORDER DETAIL].[Line No] = EVENT.[Line No]) AND ([ORDER DETAIL].OID = EVENT.OID)
GROUP BY CUSTOMER.Lname, ORDER.OID, [ORDER DETAIL].[Prod Type], [ORDER DETAIL].Accept, EVENT.[Paid Amount], EVENT.[Paid Amount 2], EVENT.[Paid Amount 3], EVENT.Completed
HAVING (((CUSTOMER.Lname)="FRANK") AND (([ORDER DETAIL].Accept)=Yes) AND ((EVENT.Completed)=Yes));

SELECT DISTINCTROW [Sequence] AS Expr1, ORDER.OID, [ORDER DETAIL].[Line No], CUSTOMER.Lname, ORDER.[Work Street], CUSTOMER.Map, ORDER.[Work City], CUSTOMER.Grid, CUSTOMER.[Evening Phone], [ORDER DETAIL].Location, [ORDER DETAIL].Plant, [ORDER DETAIL].Description, [ORDER DETAIL].Price, [ORDER DETAIL].[Prod Type], CUSTOMER.[Customer Note], ORDER.[Job Note], CUSTOMER.Company, [ORDER DETAIL].Start, [ORDER DETAIL].Accept
FROM (CUSTOMER INNER JOIN ([ORDER] INNER JOIN [ORDER DETAIL] ON ORDER.OID = [ORDER DETAIL].OID) ON CUSTOMER.CID = ORDER.CID) LEFT JOIN EVENT ON ([ORDER DETAIL].[Line No] = EVENT.[Line No]) AND ([ORDER DETAIL].OID = EVENT.OID)
WHERE ((([ORDER DETAIL].Description) Like "*grind*") AND (([ORDER DETAIL].[Prod Type])="WORKSHEET") AND (([ORDER DETAIL].Accept)=Yes) AND ((EVENT.Completed)=No Or (EVENT.Completed) Is Null))
ORDER BY [ORDER DETAIL].[Accepted Date] DESC;

SELECT DISTINCTROW CUSTOMER.Lname, ORDER.OID, [ORDER DETAIL].Accept, EVENT.Bill_Date, [ORDER DETAIL].[Line No], [ORDER DETAIL].Location, [ORDER DETAIL].Plant, [ORDER DETAIL].Start, EVENT.Completed, EVENT.Complete_Date, [ORDER DETAIL].Pest, [ORDER DETAIL].Description, [ORDER DETAIL].Price, [ORDER DETAIL].[Prod Type], EVENT.Billed, EVENT.[To Bill], EVENT.[Billed 2], EVENT.[Bill_Date 2], EVENT.[Billed 3], EVENT.[Bill_Date 3], EVENT.[Billed 4], EVENT.[Bill_Date 4], EVENT.[Paid in full], [ORDER DETAIL].[24 Price], [ORDER DETAIL].[24 Accepted], [ORDER DETAIL].[23 Price], [ORDER DETAIL].[23 Accepted], [ORDER DETAIL].[22 Price], [ORDER DETAIL].[22 Accepted], [ORDER DETAIL].[21 Price], [ORDER DETAIL].[21 Accepted], [ORDER DETAIL].[20 Price], [ORDER DETAIL].[20 Accepted], [ORDER DETAIL].[19 Price], [ORDER DETAIL].[19 Accepted], [ORDER DETAIL].[18 Price], [ORDER DETAIL].[18 Accepted], [ORDER DETAIL].[17 Price], [ORDER DETAIL].[17 Accepted], [ORDER DETAIL].[16 Price], [ORDER DETAIL].[16 Accepted], [ORDER DETAIL].[15 Price], [ORDER DETAIL].[15 Accepted], [ORDER DETAIL].[14 Price], [ORDER DETAIL].[14 Accepted], [ORDER DETAIL].[13 Price], [ORDER DETAIL].[13 Accepted], [ORDER DETAIL].[12 Price], [ORDER DETAIL].[12 Accepted], [ORDER DETAIL].[11 Price], [ORDER DETAIL].[11 Accepted], [ORDER DETAIL].[10 Price], [ORDER DETAIL].[10 Accepted], [ORDER DETAIL].[09 Price], [ORDER DETAIL].[09 Accepted], [ORDER DETAIL].[08 Price], [ORDER DETAIL].[08 Accepted], [ORDER DETAIL].[07 Price], [ORDER DETAIL].[07 Accepted]
FROM (CUSTOMER INNER JOIN ([ORDER] INNER JOIN [ORDER DETAIL] ON ORDER.OID = [ORDER DETAIL].OID) ON CUSTOMER.CID = ORDER.CID) LEFT JOIN EVENT ON ([ORDER DETAIL].[Line No] = EVENT.[Line No]) AND ([ORDER DETAIL].OID = EVENT.OID)
WHERE (((ORDER.OID)=[Forms]![ORDER]![OID]))
ORDER BY EVENT.Bill_Date DESC , [ORDER DETAIL].[Line No];

SELECT DISTINCTROW ORDER.OID, [ORDER DETAIL].[Line No], CUSTOMER.Lname, [ORDER DETAIL].Location, [ORDER DETAIL].Plant, [ORDER DETAIL].Pest, [ORDER DETAIL].Price, [ORDER DETAIL].[Prod Type], CUSTOMER.[Customer Note], ORDER.[Job Note], CUSTOMER.Company, [ORDER DETAIL].Start, [ORDER DETAIL].Accept
FROM (CUSTOMER INNER JOIN ([ORDER] INNER JOIN [ORDER DETAIL] ON ORDER.OID = [ORDER DETAIL].OID) ON CUSTOMER.CID = ORDER.CID) LEFT JOIN EVENT ON ([ORDER DETAIL].[Line No] = EVENT.[Line No]) AND ([ORDER DETAIL].OID = EVENT.OID)
WHERE ((([ORDER DETAIL].Pest) Like "*TICK*") AND ((EVENT.Completed)=No Or (EVENT.Completed) Is Null))
ORDER BY ORDER.OID, [ORDER DETAIL].[Accepted Date] DESC;

SELECT DISTINCTROW CUSTOMER.Title, CUSTOMER.Fname, CUSTOMER.Lname, ORDER.CID, ORDER.OID, [ORDER DETAIL].[Prod Type], EVENT.Bill_Date, EVENT.[Paid Amount], EVENT.[Check Number 1], EVENT.[Paid in full], EVENT.Deposited
FROM (CUSTOMER INNER JOIN ([ORDER] INNER JOIN [ORDER DETAIL] ON ORDER.OID = [ORDER DETAIL].OID) ON CUSTOMER.CID = ORDER.CID) LEFT JOIN EVENT ON ([ORDER DETAIL].[Line No] = EVENT.[Line No]) AND ([ORDER DETAIL].OID = EVENT.OID)
WHERE (((EVENT.[To be Deposited])=Yes))
GROUP BY CUSTOMER.Title, CUSTOMER.Fname, CUSTOMER.Lname, ORDER.CID, ORDER.OID, [ORDER DETAIL].[Prod Type], EVENT.Bill_Date, EVENT.[Paid Amount], EVENT.[Check Number 1], EVENT.[Paid in full], EVENT.Deposited
HAVING (((EVENT.Deposited)=No))
ORDER BY CUSTOMER.Lname;

SELECT DISTINCTROW [ORDER DETAIL].[Prod Type], [ORDER DETAIL].Accept, Sum([ORDER DETAIL].Price) AS SumOfPrice, Count([ORDER DETAIL].OID) AS CountOfOID, Avg([ORDER DETAIL].Price) AS AvgOfPrice, EVENT.Completed
FROM (CUSTOMER INNER JOIN ([ORDER] INNER JOIN [ORDER DETAIL] ON ORDER.OID = [ORDER DETAIL].OID) ON CUSTOMER.CID = ORDER.CID) LEFT JOIN EVENT ON ([ORDER DETAIL].[Line No] = EVENT.[Line No]) AND ([ORDER DETAIL].OID = EVENT.OID)
WHERE (((EVENT.Complete_Date)>#12/31/97# And (EVENT.Complete_Date)<#4/26/98#))
GROUP BY [ORDER DETAIL].[Prod Type], [ORDER DETAIL].Accept, EVENT.Completed
HAVING ((([ORDER DETAIL].Accept)=Yes));

SELECT DISTINCTROW [ORDER DETAIL].[Prod Type], [ORDER DETAIL].Accept, Sum([ORDER DETAIL].Price) AS SumOfPrice, Count([ORDER DETAIL].OID) AS CountOfOID, Avg([ORDER DETAIL].Price) AS AvgOfPrice
FROM CUSTOMER INNER JOIN ([ORDER] INNER JOIN [ORDER DETAIL] ON ORDER.OID = [ORDER DETAIL].OID) ON CUSTOMER.CID = ORDER.CID
WHERE (((ORDER.[Accept Date])>#12/31/1999#))
GROUP BY [ORDER DETAIL].[Prod Type], [ORDER DETAIL].Accept
HAVING ((([ORDER DETAIL].[Prod Type]) Not Like "IPM DATA") AND (([ORDER DETAIL].Accept)=Yes));

SELECT DISTINCTROW Sum([ORDER DETAIL].Price) AS SumOfPrice, [ORDER DETAIL].Accept, Count([ORDER DETAIL].[Line No]) AS [CountOfLine No], EVENT.Completed
FROM [ORDER DETAIL] LEFT JOIN EVENT ON ([ORDER DETAIL].[Line No] = EVENT.[Line No]) AND ([ORDER DETAIL].OID = EVENT.OID)
WHERE (((EVENT.Complete_Date)>#12/31/97#))
GROUP BY [ORDER DETAIL].Accept, EVENT.Completed
HAVING ((([ORDER DETAIL].Accept)=Yes) AND ((EVENT.Completed)=Yes));

SELECT DISTINCTROW CUSTOMER.Lname, ORDER.OID, Sum(EVENT.Price) AS SumOfPrice, [ORDER DETAIL].[Prod Type], [ORDER DETAIL].Accept, ORDER.[Paid Amount]
FROM ((CUSTOMER INNER JOIN [ORDER] ON CUSTOMER.CID = ORDER.CID) INNER JOIN [ORDER DETAIL] ON ORDER.OID = [ORDER DETAIL].OID) LEFT JOIN EVENT ON ([ORDER DETAIL].[Line No] = EVENT.[Line No]) AND ([ORDER DETAIL].OID = EVENT.OID)
GROUP BY CUSTOMER.Lname, ORDER.OID, [ORDER DETAIL].[Prod Type], [ORDER DETAIL].Accept, ORDER.[Paid Amount]
HAVING (([ORDER DETAIL].[Prod Type]="LAWN") AND ([ORDER DETAIL].Accept=Yes))
ORDER BY Sum(EVENT.Price) DESC;

SELECT DISTINCTROW CUSTOMER.Lname, ORDER.OID, Sum(EVENT.Price) AS SumOfPrice, [ORDER DETAIL].[Prod Type], [ORDER DETAIL].Accept, ORDER.[Paid Amount], EVENT.Event_Date
FROM (CUSTOMER INNER JOIN ([ORDER] INNER JOIN [ORDER DETAIL] ON ORDER.OID = [ORDER DETAIL].OID) ON CUSTOMER.CID = ORDER.CID) LEFT JOIN EVENT ON ([ORDER DETAIL].[Line No] = EVENT.[Line No]) AND ([ORDER DETAIL].OID = EVENT.OID)
GROUP BY CUSTOMER.Lname, ORDER.OID, [ORDER DETAIL].[Prod Type], [ORDER DETAIL].Accept, ORDER.[Paid Amount], EVENT.Event_Date
HAVING ((([ORDER DETAIL].[Prod Type])="PPHM"))
ORDER BY Sum(EVENT.Price) DESC;

SELECT DISTINCTROW Sum([ORDER DETAIL].Price) AS SumOfPrice, [ORDER DETAIL].Accept, Count([ORDER DETAIL].[Line No]) AS [CountOfLine No], Max(ORDER.[Proposal Date]) AS [MaxOfProposal Date]
FROM ([ORDER DETAIL] INNER JOIN (CUSTOMER INNER JOIN [ORDER] ON CUSTOMER.CID = ORDER.CID) ON [ORDER DETAIL].OID = ORDER.OID) LEFT JOIN EVENT ON ([ORDER DETAIL].[Line No] = EVENT.[Line No]) AND ([ORDER DETAIL].OID = EVENT.OID)
GROUP BY [ORDER DETAIL].Accept
HAVING (([ORDER DETAIL].Accept=False) AND ((Max(ORDER.[Proposal Date]))>#12/30/95#)) OR (([ORDER DETAIL].Accept=True) AND ((Max(ORDER.[Proposal Date]))>#12/30/95#));

SELECT DISTINCTROW Sum([ORDER DETAIL].Price) AS SumOfPrice, Count([ORDER DETAIL].OID) AS CountOfOID
FROM (CUSTOMER INNER JOIN ([ORDER] INNER JOIN [ORDER DETAIL] ON ORDER.OID = [ORDER DETAIL].OID) ON CUSTOMER.CID = ORDER.CID) LEFT JOIN EVENT ON ([ORDER DETAIL].[Line No] = EVENT.[Line No]) AND ([ORDER DETAIL].OID = EVENT.OID)
WHERE (((ORDER.[Accept Date])>#12/31/97#))
GROUP BY [ORDER DETAIL].[Prod Type], [ORDER DETAIL].Accept, EVENT.Completed, [ORDER DETAIL].Start, [ORDER DETAIL].Pest
HAVING ((([ORDER DETAIL].[Prod Type])="Worksheet") AND (([ORDER DETAIL].Accept)=Yes) AND ((EVENT.Completed)=No));

SELECT DISTINCTROW CUSTOMER.Lname, CUSTOMER.[Evening Phone], ORDER.OID, CUSTOMER.CID, Sum([ORDER DETAIL].Price) AS SumOfPrice, [ORDER DETAIL].Accept, Count([ORDER DETAIL].[Line No]) AS [CountOfLine No], [ORDER DETAIL].[Prod Type], ORDER.[PrePaid Disc Given], CUSTOMER.[Tax Exempt]
FROM (CUSTOMER INNER JOIN ([ORDER DETAIL] INNER JOIN [ORDER] ON [ORDER DETAIL].OID = ORDER.OID) ON CUSTOMER.CID = ORDER.CID) LEFT JOIN EVENT ON ([ORDER DETAIL].[Line No] = EVENT.[Line No]) AND ([ORDER DETAIL].OID = EVENT.OID)
GROUP BY CUSTOMER.Lname, CUSTOMER.[Evening Phone], ORDER.OID, CUSTOMER.CID, [ORDER DETAIL].Accept, [ORDER DETAIL].[Prod Type], ORDER.[PrePaid Disc Given], CUSTOMER.[Tax Exempt]
HAVING ((([ORDER DETAIL].Accept)=True) AND (([ORDER DETAIL].[Prod Type])="SPRAY" Or ([ORDER DETAIL].[Prod Type])="PPHM" Or ([ORDER DETAIL].[Prod Type])="LAWN"))
ORDER BY Sum([ORDER DETAIL].Price) DESC;

SELECT DISTINCTROW Sum([ORDER DETAIL].Price) AS SumOfPrice, [ORDER DETAIL].Accept, Count([ORDER DETAIL].[Line No]) AS [CountOfLine No], EVENT.Completed, [ORDER DETAIL].[Prod Type]
FROM (CUSTOMER INNER JOIN ([ORDER DETAIL] INNER JOIN [ORDER] ON [ORDER DETAIL].OID = ORDER.OID) ON CUSTOMER.CID = ORDER.CID) LEFT JOIN EVENT ON ([ORDER DETAIL].[Line No] = EVENT.[Line No]) AND ([ORDER DETAIL].OID = EVENT.OID)
GROUP BY [ORDER DETAIL].Accept, EVENT.Completed, [ORDER DETAIL].[Prod Type]
HAVING (([ORDER DETAIL].Accept=True) AND (EVENT.Completed=No) AND ([ORDER DETAIL].[Prod Type]="WORKSHEET"));

SELECT DISTINCTROW Sum([ORDER DETAIL].Price) AS SumOfPrice, [ORDER DETAIL].Accept, Count([ORDER DETAIL].[Line No]) AS [CountOfLine No], EVENT.Completed, [ORDER DETAIL].[Prod Type], EVENT.[Paid in full], EVENT.[To Bill], EVENT.Billed
FROM (CUSTOMER INNER JOIN ([ORDER DETAIL] INNER JOIN [ORDER] ON [ORDER DETAIL].OID = ORDER.OID) ON CUSTOMER.CID = ORDER.CID) LEFT JOIN EVENT ON ([ORDER DETAIL].[Line No] = EVENT.[Line No]) AND ([ORDER DETAIL].OID = EVENT.OID)
GROUP BY [ORDER DETAIL].Accept, EVENT.Completed, [ORDER DETAIL].[Prod Type], EVENT.[Paid in full], EVENT.[To Bill], EVENT.Billed
HAVING ((([ORDER DETAIL].Accept)=True) AND ((EVENT.Completed)=Yes) AND (([ORDER DETAIL].[Prod Type])="WORKSHEET") AND ((EVENT.[Paid in full])=No) AND ((EVENT.[To Bill])=Yes) AND ((EVENT.Billed)=Yes));

SELECT DISTINCTROW Sum([ORDER DETAIL].Price) AS SumOfPrice, [ORDER DETAIL].Accept, Count([ORDER DETAIL].[Line No]) AS [CountOfLine No], EVENT.Completed, [ORDER DETAIL].[Prod Type], EVENT.[Paid in full]
FROM (CUSTOMER INNER JOIN ([ORDER DETAIL] INNER JOIN [ORDER] ON [ORDER DETAIL].OID = ORDER.OID) ON CUSTOMER.CID = ORDER.CID) LEFT JOIN EVENT ON ([ORDER DETAIL].[Line No] = EVENT.[Line No]) AND ([ORDER DETAIL].OID = EVENT.OID)
GROUP BY [ORDER DETAIL].Accept, EVENT.Completed, [ORDER DETAIL].[Prod Type], EVENT.[Paid in full]
HAVING ((([ORDER DETAIL].Accept)=True) AND ((EVENT.Completed)=Yes) AND (([ORDER DETAIL].[Prod Type])="WORKSHEET") AND ((EVENT.[Paid in full])=No));

SELECT DISTINCTROW CUSTOMER.Title, CUSTOMER.Fname, CUSTOMER.Lname, CUSTOMER.Street1, CUSTOMER.City, CUSTOMER.State, CUSTOMER.Zip, CUSTOMER.CID, Sum([ORDER DETAIL].Price) AS SumOfPrice1, [ORDER DETAIL].Accept
FROM (CUSTOMER INNER JOIN ([ORDER] INNER JOIN [ORDER DETAIL] ON ORDER.OID = [ORDER DETAIL].OID) ON CUSTOMER.CID = ORDER.CID) LEFT JOIN EVENT ON ([ORDER DETAIL].[Line No] = EVENT.[Line No]) AND ([ORDER DETAIL].OID = EVENT.OID)
WHERE (((EVENT.Complete_Date)>#12/31/97#))
GROUP BY CUSTOMER.Title, CUSTOMER.Fname, CUSTOMER.Lname, CUSTOMER.Street1, CUSTOMER.City, CUSTOMER.State, CUSTOMER.Zip, CUSTOMER.CID, [ORDER DETAIL].Accept
HAVING ((([ORDER DETAIL].Accept)=Yes))
ORDER BY Sum([ORDER DETAIL].Price) DESC;

SELECT DISTINCTROW [ORDER DETAIL].[Prod Type], [ORDER DETAIL].Pest, Sum([ORDER DETAIL].Price) AS SumOfPrice, [ORDER DETAIL].Accept
FROM ((CUSTOMER INNER JOIN [ORDER] ON CUSTOMER.CID = ORDER.CID) INNER JOIN [ORDER DETAIL] ON ORDER.OID = [ORDER DETAIL].OID) LEFT JOIN EVENT ON ([ORDER DETAIL].[Line No] = EVENT.[Line No]) AND ([ORDER DETAIL].OID = EVENT.OID)
GROUP BY [ORDER DETAIL].[Prod Type], [ORDER DETAIL].Pest, [ORDER DETAIL].Accept
HAVING (([ORDER DETAIL].[Prod Type]="SPRAY") AND ([ORDER DETAIL].Accept=Yes))
ORDER BY [ORDER DETAIL].Pest;

SELECT DISTINCTROW CUSTOMER.Title, CUSTOMER.Fname, CUSTOMER.Lname, CUSTOMER.Company, CUSTOMER.Street1, CUSTOMER.City, CUSTOMER.State, CUSTOMER.Zip, CUSTOMER.Source, ORDER.OID, ORDER.[Work Street], ORDER.[Work City], ORDER.[Work State], ORDER.[Work Zip], [ORDER DETAIL].[Prod Type], [ORDER DETAIL].Plant, [ORDER DETAIL].Location, [ORDER DETAIL].Description, [ORDER DETAIL].Price, ORDER.CID, CUSTOMER.Map, CUSTOMER.Grid, CUSTOMER.[Evening Phone], CUSTOMER.Fax, CUSTOMER.Phone, ORDER.[Accept Date], ORDER.[Job Note], [ORDER DETAIL].[Line No], EVENT.Complete_Date, EVENT.Bill_Date, ORDER.[Paid Amount]
FROM (CUSTOMER INNER JOIN ([ORDER] INNER JOIN [ORDER DETAIL] ON ORDER.OID = [ORDER DETAIL].OID) ON CUSTOMER.CID = ORDER.CID) LEFT JOIN EVENT ON ([ORDER DETAIL].[Line No] = EVENT.[Line No]) AND ([ORDER DETAIL].OID = EVENT.OID)
WHERE (((ORDER.OID)=[Forms]![ORDER]![OID]) AND (([ORDER DETAIL].[Prod Type])="Worksheet") AND (([ORDER DETAIL].Accept)=Yes) AND ((EVENT.Completed)=Yes) AND ((EVENT.[To Bill])=Yes))
ORDER BY [ORDER DETAIL].[Line No];

SELECT DISTINCTROW CUSTOMER.Lname, ORDER.OID, Sum([ORDER DETAIL].Price) AS SumOfPrice, ORDER.[Work Street], ORDER.[Work City], ORDER.[Work State], ORDER.[Job Note], CUSTOMER.[Customer Note], ORDER.[Accept Date], CUSTOMER.[Evening Phone]
FROM (CUSTOMER INNER JOIN ([ORDER] INNER JOIN [ORDER DETAIL] ON ORDER.OID = [ORDER DETAIL].OID) ON CUSTOMER.CID = ORDER.CID) LEFT JOIN EVENT ON ([ORDER DETAIL].[Line No] = EVENT.[Line No]) AND ([ORDER DETAIL].OID = EVENT.OID)
WHERE ((([ORDER DETAIL].[Prod Type])="Worksheet") AND (([ORDER DETAIL].Accept)=Yes) AND ((ORDER.[Winter Work])=No Or (ORDER.[Winter Work]) Is Null) AND ((EVENT.Completed)=No Or (EVENT.Completed) Is Null))
GROUP BY CUSTOMER.Lname, ORDER.OID, ORDER.[Work Street], ORDER.[Work City], ORDER.[Work State], ORDER.[Job Note], CUSTOMER.[Customer Note], ORDER.[Accept Date], CUSTOMER.[Evening Phone], ORDER.[Accept Date]
ORDER BY ORDER.[Accept Date];

SELECT DISTINCTROW CUSTOMER.Lname, ORDER.OID, [ORDER DETAIL].Accept, [ORDER DETAIL].[Line No], ORDER.[Accept Date], [ORDER DETAIL].Location, [ORDER DETAIL].Plant, [ORDER DETAIL].Description, EVENT.Completed, EVENT.Complete_Date, [ORDER DETAIL].Price, EVENT.[To Bill], EVENT.Billed, EVENT.Bill_Date
FROM (CUSTOMER INNER JOIN ([ORDER] INNER JOIN [ORDER DETAIL] ON ORDER.OID = [ORDER DETAIL].OID) ON CUSTOMER.CID = ORDER.CID) LEFT JOIN EVENT ON ([ORDER DETAIL].[Line No] = EVENT.[Line No]) AND ([ORDER DETAIL].OID = EVENT.OID)
WHERE (((CUSTOMER.Lname)=[Forms]![CUSTOMER]![lname]) AND (([ORDER DETAIL].Accept)=Yes) AND ((EVENT.Completed)=No Or (EVENT.Completed) Is Null) AND (([ORDER DETAIL].[Prod Type])="WORKSHEET"))
ORDER BY ORDER.OID, [ORDER DETAIL].[Line No];

SELECT DISTINCTROW CUSTOMER.Lname, ORDER.OID, [ORDER DETAIL].[Line No], [ORDER DETAIL].Location, [ORDER DETAIL].Plant, [ORDER DETAIL].Description, EVENT.Completed, EVENT.Complete_Date, [ORDER DETAIL].Price, EVENT.[To Bill], EVENT.Billed, EVENT.Bill_Date, EVENT.[Paid in full], [ORDER DETAIL].Accept
FROM (CUSTOMER INNER JOIN ([ORDER] INNER JOIN [ORDER DETAIL] ON ORDER.OID = [ORDER DETAIL].OID) ON CUSTOMER.CID = ORDER.CID) LEFT JOIN EVENT ON ([ORDER DETAIL].[Line No] = EVENT.[Line No]) AND ([ORDER DETAIL].OID = EVENT.OID)
WHERE (((ORDER.OID)=[Forms]![ORDER]![OID]) AND (([ORDER DETAIL].Accept)=Yes) AND (([ORDER DETAIL].[Prod Type])="WORKSHEET"))
ORDER BY [ORDER DETAIL].[Line No];

SELECT DISTINCTROW CUSTOMER.Lname, ORDER.[Work Street], ORDER.OID, EVENT.Completed, EVENT.Complete_Date, [ORDER DETAIL].Location, [ORDER DETAIL].Plant, [ORDER DETAIL].Description, [ORDER DETAIL].Price
FROM (CUSTOMER INNER JOIN ([ORDER] INNER JOIN [ORDER DETAIL] ON ORDER.OID = [ORDER DETAIL].OID) ON CUSTOMER.CID = ORDER.CID) LEFT JOIN EVENT ON ([ORDER DETAIL].[Line No] = EVENT.[Line No]) AND ([ORDER DETAIL].OID = EVENT.OID)
WHERE ((CUSTOMER.Lname=[Forms]![CUSTOMER]![lname]) AND ([ORDER DETAIL].[Prod Type]="WORKSHEET") AND ([ORDER DETAIL].Accept=Yes))
ORDER BY EVENT.Complete_Date;

SELECT DISTINCTROW [Sequence] AS Expr1, ORDER.OID, [ORDER DETAIL].[Line No], CUSTOMER.Lname, ORDER.[Work Street], CUSTOMER.Map, ORDER.[Work City], CUSTOMER.Grid, CUSTOMER.[Evening Phone], [ORDER DETAIL].Location, [ORDER DETAIL].Plant, [ORDER DETAIL].Description, [ORDER DETAIL].Price, [ORDER DETAIL].[Prod Type], CUSTOMER.[Customer Note], ORDER.[Job Note], CUSTOMER.Company, [ORDER DETAIL].Start, [ORDER DETAIL].Accept
FROM (CUSTOMER INNER JOIN ([ORDER] INNER JOIN [ORDER DETAIL] ON ORDER.OID = [ORDER DETAIL].OID) ON CUSTOMER.CID = ORDER.CID) LEFT JOIN EVENT ON ([ORDER DETAIL].[Line No] = EVENT.[Line No]) AND ([ORDER DETAIL].OID = EVENT.OID)
WHERE ((([ORDER DETAIL].Description) Like "*Vertical Mulch**") AND (([ORDER DETAIL].[Prod Type])="WORKSHEET") AND (([ORDER DETAIL].Accept)=Yes) AND ((EVENT.Completed)=No Or (EVENT.Completed) Is Null))
ORDER BY [ORDER DETAIL].[Accepted Date] DESC;

SELECT DISTINCTROW CUSTOMER.Lname, ORDER.OID, [ORDER DETAIL].[Line No], ORDER.[Work Street], CUSTOMER.Map, ORDER.[Work City], CUSTOMER.Grid, [ORDER DETAIL].Location, [ORDER DETAIL].Plant, [ORDER DETAIL].Description, [ORDER DETAIL].Price, EVENT.Complete_Date
FROM (CUSTOMER INNER JOIN ([ORDER] INNER JOIN [ORDER DETAIL] ON ORDER.OID = [ORDER DETAIL].OID) ON CUSTOMER.CID = ORDER.CID) LEFT JOIN EVENT ON ([ORDER DETAIL].[Line No] = EVENT.[Line No]) AND ([ORDER DETAIL].OID = EVENT.OID)
WHERE ((([ORDER DETAIL].Description) Like "*Vertical Mulch**") AND ((EVENT.Complete_Date)>#12/31/2019#) AND (([ORDER DETAIL].[Prod Type])="WORKSHEET") AND (([ORDER DETAIL].Accept)=Yes) AND ((EVENT.Completed)=Yes))
ORDER BY CUSTOMER.Lname, ORDER.OID, [ORDER DETAIL].[Line No];

SELECT DISTINCTROW [Sequence] AS Expr1, ORDER.OID, [ORDER DETAIL].[Line No], CUSTOMER.Lname, ORDER.[Work Street], CUSTOMER.Map, ORDER.[Work City], CUSTOMER.Grid, CUSTOMER.[Evening Phone], [ORDER DETAIL].Location, [ORDER DETAIL].Plant, [ORDER DETAIL].Description, [ORDER DETAIL].Price, [ORDER DETAIL].[Prod Type], CUSTOMER.[Customer Note], ORDER.[Job Note], CUSTOMER.Company, [ORDER DETAIL].Start, [ORDER DETAIL].Accept, ORDER.[Accept Date]
FROM (CUSTOMER INNER JOIN ([ORDER] INNER JOIN [ORDER DETAIL] ON ORDER.OID = [ORDER DETAIL].OID) ON CUSTOMER.CID = ORDER.CID) LEFT JOIN EVENT ON ([ORDER DETAIL].[Line No] = EVENT.[Line No]) AND ([ORDER DETAIL].OID = EVENT.OID)
WHERE ((([ORDER DETAIL].Plant) Like "*chip*") AND (([ORDER DETAIL].[Prod Type])="chips") AND (([ORDER DETAIL].Accept)=Yes) AND ((EVENT.Completed)=No Or (EVENT.Completed) Is Null)) OR ((([ORDER DETAIL].Description) Like "deliver*") AND (([ORDER DETAIL].[Prod Type])="worksheet") AND (([ORDER DETAIL].Accept)=Yes) AND ((EVENT.Completed)=No Or (EVENT.Completed) Is Null))
ORDER BY ORDER.[Accept Date];

SELECT DISTINCTROW CUSTOMER.Fname, CUSTOMER.Lname, CUSTOMER.Company, CUSTOMER.Street1, CUSTOMER.City, CUSTOMER.State, CUSTOMER.Zip, ORDER.OID, [ORDER DETAIL].[Line No], [ORDER DETAIL].Location, [ORDER DETAIL].Plant, [ORDER DETAIL].Description, [ORDER DETAIL].Price, ORDER.[Accept Date], EVENT.Complete_Date, EVENT.Completed, EVENT.[To Bill]
FROM (CUSTOMER INNER JOIN ([ORDER] INNER JOIN [ORDER DETAIL] ON ORDER.OID = [ORDER DETAIL].OID) ON CUSTOMER.CID = ORDER.CID) LEFT JOIN EVENT ON ([ORDER DETAIL].[Line No] = EVENT.[Line No]) AND ([ORDER DETAIL].OID = EVENT.OID)
WHERE (((EVENT.Completed)=Yes) AND ((EVENT.[To Bill])=No Or (EVENT.[To Bill]) Is Null) AND (([ORDER DETAIL].[Prod Type])="Worksheet" Or ([ORDER DETAIL].[Prod Type])="info") AND (([ORDER DETAIL].Accept)=Yes) AND ((EVENT.[Paid in full])=No Or (EVENT.[Paid in full]) Is Null))
ORDER BY CUSTOMER.Lname, ORDER.[Accept Date];

SELECT DISTINCTROW CUSTOMER.Lname, ORDER.[Work Street], ORDER.[Work City], [ORDER DETAIL].Description, [ORDER DETAIL].Price, [ORDER DETAIL].Accept, EVENT.Completed, [ORDER DETAIL].[Prod Type]
FROM ((CUSTOMER INNER JOIN [ORDER] ON CUSTOMER.CID = ORDER.CID) INNER JOIN [ORDER DETAIL] ON ORDER.OID = [ORDER DETAIL].OID) LEFT JOIN EVENT ON ([ORDER DETAIL].[Line No] = EVENT.[Line No]) AND ([ORDER DETAIL].OID = EVENT.OID)
WHERE ((([ORDER DETAIL].Accept)=Yes) AND ((EVENT.Completed)=No) AND (([ORDER DETAIL].[Prod Type])="worksheet"))
ORDER BY ORDER.[Accept Date];

SELECT DISTINCTROW CUSTOMER.Lname, ORDER.OID, [ORDER DETAIL].Accept, EVENT.Bill_Date, [ORDER DETAIL].[Line No], [ORDER DETAIL].Location, [ORDER DETAIL].Plant, EVENT.Completed, EVENT.Complete_Date, [ORDER DETAIL].Pest, [ORDER DETAIL].Description, [ORDER DETAIL].Price, EVENT.Billed, EVENT.[To Bill], EVENT.[Billed 2], EVENT.[Bill_Date 2], EVENT.[Billed 3], EVENT.[Bill_Date 3], EVENT.[Billed 4], EVENT.[Bill_Date 4], EVENT.[Paid in full]
FROM (CUSTOMER INNER JOIN ([ORDER] INNER JOIN [ORDER DETAIL] ON ORDER.OID = [ORDER DETAIL].OID) ON CUSTOMER.CID = ORDER.CID) LEFT JOIN EVENT ON ([ORDER DETAIL].[Line No] = EVENT.[Line No]) AND ([ORDER DETAIL].OID = EVENT.OID)
WHERE (((ORDER.OID)=[Forms]![ORDER]![OID]) AND (([ORDER DETAIL].Accept)=Yes))
ORDER BY EVENT.Bill_Date, [ORDER DETAIL].[Line No];

SELECT DISTINCTROW CUSTOMER.Lname, ORDER.OID, [ORDER DETAIL].Accept, [ORDER DETAIL].[Line No], [ORDER DETAIL].Location, [ORDER DETAIL].Plant, EVENT.Completed, [ORDER DETAIL].Pest, [ORDER DETAIL].Description, [ORDER DETAIL].Price, EVENT.Billed, EVENT.[To Bill], EVENT.Bill_Date, EVENT.[Paid Amount], EVENT.[Paid Date 1], EVENT.[Check Number 1], EVENT.[To be Deposited], EVENT.[Paid Amount 2], EVENT.[Paid  date 2], EVENT.[Check Number 2], EVENT.[Paid Amount 3], EVENT.[Paid date 3], EVENT.[Check Number 3], EVENT.[Paid in full], EVENT.[Billed 2], EVENT.Deposited, EVENT.[Deposited date]
FROM (CUSTOMER INNER JOIN ([ORDER] INNER JOIN [ORDER DETAIL] ON ORDER.OID = [ORDER DETAIL].OID) ON CUSTOMER.CID = ORDER.CID) LEFT JOIN EVENT ON ([ORDER DETAIL].[Line No] = EVENT.[Line No]) AND ([ORDER DETAIL].OID = EVENT.OID)
WHERE (((CUSTOMER.Lname)=[Forms]![CUSTOMER]![lname]) AND (([ORDER DETAIL].Accept)=Yes))
ORDER BY ORDER.OID DESC;

SELECT DISTINCTROW CUSTOMER.Title, CUSTOMER.Fname, CUSTOMER.Lname, CUSTOMER.Company, CUSTOMER.Street1, CUSTOMER.City, CUSTOMER.State, CUSTOMER.Zip, CUSTOMER.Source, ORDER.OID, ORDER.[Work Street], ORDER.[Work City], ORDER.[Work State], ORDER.[Work Zip], [ORDER DETAIL].[Prod Type], [ORDER DETAIL].Plant, [ORDER DETAIL].Location, [ORDER DETAIL].Accept, [ORDER DETAIL].Description, [ORDER DETAIL].Price, ORDER.CID, CUSTOMER.Map, CUSTOMER.Grid, CUSTOMER.[Evening Phone], CUSTOMER.Phone, ORDER.[Accept Date], ORDER.[Job Note], [ORDER DETAIL].[Line No], EVENT.Completed, EVENT.Complete_Date, ORDER.[Annual Contract], ORDER.[Winter Work], CUSTOMER.[Customer Note], ORDER.[Work Name], CUSTOMER.[Cell Phone], CUSTOMER.[Tax Exempt]
FROM (CUSTOMER INNER JOIN ([ORDER] INNER JOIN [ORDER DETAIL] ON ORDER.OID = [ORDER DETAIL].OID) ON CUSTOMER.CID = ORDER.CID) LEFT JOIN EVENT ON ([ORDER DETAIL].[Line No] = EVENT.[Line No]) AND ([ORDER DETAIL].OID = EVENT.OID)
WHERE ((([ORDER DETAIL].[Prod Type])="Worksheet") AND (([ORDER DETAIL].Accept)=Yes) AND ((EVENT.Completed)=No Or (EVENT.Completed) Is Null) AND ((ORDER.[Winter Work])=No Or (ORDER.[Winter Work]) Is Null))
ORDER BY [ORDER DETAIL].[Line No];

SELECT DISTINCTROW CUSTOMER.Title, CUSTOMER.Fname, CUSTOMER.Lname, CUSTOMER.Company, CUSTOMER.Street1, CUSTOMER.City, CUSTOMER.State, CUSTOMER.Zip, CUSTOMER.Source, ORDER.OID, ORDER.[Work Street], ORDER.[Work City], ORDER.[Work State], ORDER.[Work Zip], [ORDER DETAIL].[Prod Type], [ORDER DETAIL].Plant, [ORDER DETAIL].Location, [ORDER DETAIL].Accept, [ORDER DETAIL].Description, [ORDER DETAIL].Price, ORDER.CID, CUSTOMER.Map, CUSTOMER.Grid, CUSTOMER.[Evening Phone], CUSTOMER.Phone, ORDER.[Accept Date], ORDER.[Job Note], [ORDER DETAIL].[Line No], EVENT.Completed, EVENT.Complete_Date, ORDER.[Annual Contract], ORDER.[Winter Work], CUSTOMER.[Customer Note], ORDER.[Work Name], CUSTOMER.[Cell Phone], CUSTOMER.[Tax Exempt]
FROM (CUSTOMER INNER JOIN ([ORDER] INNER JOIN [ORDER DETAIL] ON ORDER.OID = [ORDER DETAIL].OID) ON CUSTOMER.CID = ORDER.CID) LEFT JOIN EVENT ON ([ORDER DETAIL].[Line No] = EVENT.[Line No]) AND ([ORDER DETAIL].OID = EVENT.OID)
WHERE (((ORDER.OID)=[Forms]![ORDER]![OID]) AND (([ORDER DETAIL].[Prod Type])="Worksheet" Or ([ORDER DETAIL].[Prod Type])="Info" Or ([ORDER DETAIL].[Prod Type])="Chips") AND (([ORDER DETAIL].Accept)=Yes) AND ((EVENT.Completed)=No Or (EVENT.Completed) Is Null) AND ((ORDER.[Winter Work])=No Or (ORDER.[Winter Work]) Is Null))
ORDER BY [ORDER DETAIL].[Line No];

SELECT DISTINCTROW CUSTOMER.Title, CUSTOMER.Fname, CUSTOMER.Lname, CUSTOMER.Company, CUSTOMER.Street1, CUSTOMER.City, CUSTOMER.State, CUSTOMER.Zip, CUSTOMER.Source, ORDER.OID, ORDER.[Work Street], ORDER.[Work City], ORDER.[Work State], ORDER.[Work Zip], [ORDER DETAIL].[Prod Type], [ORDER DETAIL].Plant, [ORDER DETAIL].Location, [ORDER DETAIL].Accept, [ORDER DETAIL].Description, [ORDER DETAIL].Price, ORDER.CID, CUSTOMER.Map, CUSTOMER.Grid, CUSTOMER.[Evening Phone], CUSTOMER.Phone, ORDER.[Accept Date], ORDER.[Job Note], [ORDER DETAIL].[Line No], EVENT.Completed, EVENT.Complete_Date
FROM (CUSTOMER INNER JOIN ([ORDER] INNER JOIN [ORDER DETAIL] ON ORDER.OID = [ORDER DETAIL].OID) ON CUSTOMER.CID = ORDER.CID) LEFT JOIN EVENT ON ([ORDER DETAIL].[Line No] = EVENT.[Line No]) AND ([ORDER DETAIL].OID = EVENT.OID)
WHERE ((CUSTOMER.Lname=[reports]![WORKFORM]![lname]) AND ([ORDER DETAIL].[Prod Type]="Worksheet") AND ([ORDER DETAIL].Accept=Yes) AND (EVENT.Completed=No Or EVENT.Completed Is Null))
ORDER BY [ORDER DETAIL].[Line No];

SELECT DISTINCTROW Sum([ORDER DETAIL].Price) AS SumOfPrice, ORDER.[Winter Work]
FROM (CUSTOMER INNER JOIN ([ORDER] INNER JOIN [ORDER DETAIL] ON ORDER.OID = [ORDER DETAIL].OID) ON CUSTOMER.CID = ORDER.CID) LEFT JOIN EVENT ON ([ORDER DETAIL].[Line No] = EVENT.[Line No]) AND ([ORDER DETAIL].OID = EVENT.OID)
WHERE ((([ORDER DETAIL].[Prod Type])="Worksheet") AND ((EVENT.Completed)=No Or (EVENT.Completed) Is Null))
GROUP BY ORDER.[Winter Work], [ORDER DETAIL].Accept
HAVING (((ORDER.[Winter Work])=No Or (ORDER.[Winter Work]) Is Null) AND (([ORDER DETAIL].Accept)=Yes));

SELECT DISTINCTROW CUSTOMER.Title, CUSTOMER.Fname, CUSTOMER.Lname, CUSTOMER.Company, CUSTOMER.Street1, CUSTOMER.City, CUSTOMER.State, CUSTOMER.Zip, CUSTOMER.Source, ORDER.OID, ORDER.[Work Street], ORDER.[Work City], ORDER.[Work State], ORDER.[Work Zip], [ORDER DETAIL].[Prod Type], [ORDER DETAIL].Plant, [ORDER DETAIL].Location, [ORDER DETAIL].Accept, [ORDER DETAIL].Description, [ORDER DETAIL].Price, ORDER.CID, CUSTOMER.Map, CUSTOMER.Grid, CUSTOMER.[Evening Phone], CUSTOMER.Phone, ORDER.[Accept Date], ORDER.[Job Note], [ORDER DETAIL].[Line No], EVENT.Completed, EVENT.Complete_Date, ORDER.[Annual Contract], ORDER.[Winter Work], CUSTOMER.[Customer Note], ORDER.[Work Name], CUSTOMER.[Cell Phone], CUSTOMER.[Tax Exempt]
FROM (CUSTOMER INNER JOIN ([ORDER] INNER JOIN [ORDER DETAIL] ON ORDER.OID = [ORDER DETAIL].OID) ON CUSTOMER.CID = ORDER.CID) LEFT JOIN EVENT ON ([ORDER DETAIL].[Line No] = EVENT.[Line No]) AND ([ORDER DETAIL].OID = EVENT.OID)
WHERE ((([ORDER DETAIL].[Prod Type])="Chips") AND (([ORDER DETAIL].Accept)=Yes) AND ((EVENT.Completed)=No Or (EVENT.Completed) Is Null) AND ((ORDER.[Winter Work])=No Or (ORDER.[Winter Work]) Is Null))
ORDER BY [ORDER DETAIL].[Line No];

SELECT DISTINCTROW CUSTOMER.Title, CUSTOMER.Fname, CUSTOMER.Lname, CUSTOMER.Company, CUSTOMER.Street1, CUSTOMER.City, CUSTOMER.State, CUSTOMER.Zip, CUSTOMER.Source, ORDER.OID, ORDER.[Work Street], ORDER.[Work City], ORDER.[Work State], ORDER.[Work Zip], [ORDER DETAIL].[Prod Type], [ORDER DETAIL].Plant, [ORDER DETAIL].Location, [ORDER DETAIL].Accept, [ORDER DETAIL].Description, [ORDER DETAIL].Price, ORDER.CID, CUSTOMER.Map, CUSTOMER.Grid, CUSTOMER.[Evening Phone], CUSTOMER.Phone, ORDER.[Accept Date], ORDER.[Job Note], [ORDER DETAIL].[Line No], EVENT.Completed, EVENT.Complete_Date, ORDER.[Annual Contract], ORDER.[Winter Work], CUSTOMER.[Customer Note]
FROM (CUSTOMER INNER JOIN ([ORDER] INNER JOIN [ORDER DETAIL] ON ORDER.OID = [ORDER DETAIL].OID) ON CUSTOMER.CID = ORDER.CID) LEFT JOIN EVENT ON ([ORDER DETAIL].[Line No] = EVENT.[Line No]) AND ([ORDER DETAIL].OID = EVENT.OID)
WHERE ((([ORDER DETAIL].[Prod Type])="Worksheet") AND (([ORDER DETAIL].Accept)=Yes) AND ((EVENT.Completed)=No Or (EVENT.Completed) Is Null) AND ((ORDER.[Winter Work])=Yes))
ORDER BY [ORDER DETAIL].[Line No];

SELECT DISTINCTROW [ORDER DETAIL].[Prod Type], [ORDER DETAIL].Accept, EVENT.Completed, Sum([ORDER DETAIL].Price) AS SumOfPrice, Count([ORDER DETAIL].OID) AS CountOfOID, Avg([ORDER DETAIL].Price) AS AvgOfPrice
FROM (CUSTOMER INNER JOIN ([ORDER] INNER JOIN [ORDER DETAIL] ON ORDER.OID = [ORDER DETAIL].OID) ON CUSTOMER.CID = ORDER.CID) LEFT JOIN EVENT ON ([ORDER DETAIL].[Line No] = EVENT.[Line No]) AND ([ORDER DETAIL].OID = EVENT.OID)
GROUP BY [ORDER DETAIL].[Prod Type], [ORDER DETAIL].Accept, EVENT.Completed
HAVING (([ORDER DETAIL].[Prod Type]="worksheet") AND ([ORDER DETAIL].Accept=Yes) AND (EVENT.Completed=No)) OR (([ORDER DETAIL].[Prod Type]="Worksheet") AND ([ORDER DETAIL].Accept=Yes) AND (EVENT.Completed=Yes));

SELECT DISTINCTROW [Sequence] AS Expr1, ORDER.OID, [ORDER DETAIL].[Line No], CUSTOMER.Lname, ORDER.[Work Street], CUSTOMER.Map, ORDER.[Work City], CUSTOMER.Grid, CUSTOMER.[Evening Phone], [ORDER DETAIL].Location, [ORDER DETAIL].Plant, [ORDER DETAIL].Description, [ORDER DETAIL].Price, [ORDER DETAIL].[Prod Type], CUSTOMER.[Customer Note], ORDER.[Job Note], CUSTOMER.Company, [ORDER DETAIL].Accept, [ORDER DETAIL].[Accepted Date]
FROM (CUSTOMER INNER JOIN ([ORDER] INNER JOIN [ORDER DETAIL] ON ORDER.OID = [ORDER DETAIL].OID) ON CUSTOMER.CID = ORDER.CID) LEFT JOIN EVENT ON ([ORDER DETAIL].[Line No] = EVENT.[Line No]) AND ([ORDER DETAIL].OID = EVENT.OID)
WHERE ((([ORDER DETAIL].[Prod Type])="WORKSHEET") AND (([ORDER DETAIL].Accept)=Yes) AND ((EVENT.Completed)=No Or (EVENT.Completed) Is Null))
ORDER BY [ORDER DETAIL].[Accepted Date] DESC;

SELECT CUSTOMER.Title, CUSTOMER.Fname, CUSTOMER.Lname, CUSTOMER.Company, CUSTOMER.Street1, CUSTOMER.City, CUSTOMER.State, CUSTOMER.Zip, Sum([ORDER DETAIL].Price) AS SumOfPrice, CUSTOMER.CID
FROM ((CUSTOMER INNER JOIN [ORDER] ON CUSTOMER.CID = ORDER.CID) INNER JOIN [ORDER DETAIL] ON ORDER.OID = [ORDER DETAIL].OID) LEFT JOIN EVENT ON ([ORDER DETAIL].[Line No] = EVENT.[Line No]) AND ([ORDER DETAIL].OID = EVENT.OID)
GROUP BY CUSTOMER.Title, CUSTOMER.Fname, CUSTOMER.Lname, CUSTOMER.Company, CUSTOMER.Street1, CUSTOMER.City, CUSTOMER.State, CUSTOMER.Zip, CUSTOMER.CID, [ORDER DETAIL].Accept
HAVING (((CUSTOMER.CID)<>8) AND (([ORDER DETAIL].Accept)=Yes))
ORDER BY Sum([ORDER DETAIL].Price) DESC;

SELECT [ORDER DETAIL].[Prod Type], [ORDER DETAIL].Price, [ORDER DETAIL].[23 Price], [ORDER DETAIL].Accept, [ORDER DETAIL].[23 Accepted]
FROM [ORDER DETAIL];

SELECT DISTINCTROW CUSTOMER.CID, ORDER.OID, ORDER.[Proposal Date], ORDER.[Accept Date], ORDER.[2008 Accepted], ORDER.[2007 Accepted], ORDER.[2006 Accepted], ORDER.[2005 Accepted]
FROM (CUSTOMER INNER JOIN ([ORDER] INNER JOIN [ORDER DETAIL] ON ORDER.OID = [ORDER DETAIL].OID) ON CUSTOMER.CID = ORDER.CID) LEFT JOIN EVENT ON ([ORDER DETAIL].[Line No] = EVENT.[Line No]) AND ([ORDER DETAIL].OID = EVENT.OID);

SELECT CUSTOMER.Lname, CUSTOMER.Fname, CUSTOMER.Street1, CUSTOMER.City, ORDER.OID, Sum([ORDER DETAIL].Price) AS SumOfPrice, ORDER.[Accept Date]
FROM (CUSTOMER INNER JOIN [ORDER] ON CUSTOMER.CID = ORDER.CID) INNER JOIN [ORDER DETAIL] ON ORDER.OID = [ORDER DETAIL].OID
GROUP BY CUSTOMER.Lname, CUSTOMER.Fname, CUSTOMER.Street1, CUSTOMER.City, ORDER.OID, [ORDER DETAIL].[Prod Type], ORDER.[Accept Date]

ORDER BY CUSTOMER.Lname, CUSTOMER.Fname;

properties.source:
Option Compare Database Option Explicit ' ============================================================ ' frmSuperScheduler VBA v10 ' Filters: Priority, Zip, City, Map, Grid, Last Name, ' Pest, Prod Type, Crew, Schedule Date ' Schedule Date scopes job list, crew panels, and assignments ' ============================================================ Public Sub RefreshAllSubforms() Me.frmSuperSchedulerSub.Form.Requery Me.frmCrew1Sub.Form.Requery Me.frmCrew2Sub.Form.Requery End Sub Private Sub Form_Load() Call RefreshSubform End Sub Public Function GetScheduleDate() As String If Not IsNull(Me.cmbScheduleDate) And Me.cmbScheduleDate <> "" Then GetScheduleDate = Format(Me.cmbScheduleDate, "mm/dd/yyyy") Else GetScheduleDate = Format(Date, "mm/dd/yyyy") End If End Function ' ---- FILTER ------------------------------------------------ Private Function BuildFilter() As String Dim f As String f = "" If Not IsNull(Me.cmbLname) And Me.cmbLname <> "" Then f = f & " AND Lname = '" & Replace(Me.cmbLname, "'", "''") & "'" End If If Not IsNull(Me.cmbCity) And Me.cmbCity <> "" Then f = f & " AND City = '" & Replace(Me.cmbCity, "'", "''") & "'" End If If Not IsNull(Me.cmbZip) And Me.cmbZip <> "" Then f = f & " AND Zip = '" & Replace(Me.cmbZip, "'", "''") & "'" End If If Not IsNull(Me.cmbMap) And Me.cmbMap <> "" Then f = f & " AND Map = '" & Replace(Me.cmbMap, "'", "''") & "'" End If If Not IsNull(Me.cmbGrid) And Me.cmbGrid <> "" Then f = f & " AND Grid = '" & Replace(Me.cmbGrid, "'", "''") & "'" End If If Not IsNull(Me.cmbPriority) And Me.cmbPriority <> "" Then f = f & " AND AutoPriority = '" & Me.cmbPriority & "'" End If If Not IsNull(Me.cmbPest) And Me.cmbPest <> "" Then f = f & " AND Pest = '" & Replace(Me.cmbPest, "'", "''") & "'" End If If Not IsNull(Me.cmbProdType) And Me.cmbProdType <> "" Then If Me.cmbProdType = "Both" Then f = f & " AND [Prod Type] IN ('SPRAY','PPHM')" Else f = f & " AND [Prod Type] = '" & Me.cmbProdType & "'" End If End If If Not IsNull(Me.cmbCrew) And Me.cmbCrew <> "" Then If Me.cmbCrew = "Unassigned" Then f = f & " AND (Crew IS NULL OR Crew = '')" Else f = f & " AND Crew = '" & Me.cmbCrew & "'" End If End If If Left(f, 5) = " AND " Then f = Mid(f, 6) BuildFilter = f End Function Private Sub RefreshSubform() Dim f As String Dim sDate As String f = BuildFilter() sDate = GetScheduleDate() With Me.frmSuperSchedulerSub.Form If f = "" Then .Filter = "" .FilterOn = False Else .Filter = f .FilterOn = True End If .Requery End With ' Refresh crew panels with date scope Dim sDateFilter As String sDateFilter = "Format(ScheduleDate,'mm/dd/yyyy') = '" & sDate & "'" With Me.frmCrew1Sub.Form .Filter = "Crew = 'Crew 1' AND " & sDateFilter .FilterOn = True .Requery End With With Me.frmCrew2Sub.Form .Filter = "Crew = 'Crew 2' AND " & sDateFilter .FilterOn = True .Requery End With End Sub ' ---- DROPDOWN EVENTS -------------------------------------- Private Sub cmbLname_AfterUpdate() Call RefreshSubform End Sub Private Sub cmbCity_AfterUpdate() Call RefreshSubform End Sub Private Sub cmbZip_AfterUpdate() Call RefreshSubform End Sub Private Sub cmbMap_AfterUpdate() Call RefreshSubform End Sub Private Sub cmbGrid_AfterUpdate() Call RefreshSubform End Sub Private Sub cmbPriority_AfterUpdate() Call RefreshSubform End Sub Private Sub cmbPest_AfterUpdate() Call RefreshSubform End Sub Private Sub cmbProdType_AfterUpdate() Call RefreshSubform End Sub Private Sub cmbCrew_AfterUpdate() Call RefreshSubform End Sub Private Sub cmbScheduleDate_AfterUpdate() Call RefreshSubform End Sub ' ---- RESET ------------------------------------------------ Private Sub cmdReset_Click() Me.cmbLname = Null Me.cmbCity = Null Me.cmbZip = Null Me.cmbMap = Null Me.cmbGrid = Null Me.cmbPriority = Null Me.cmbPest = Null Me.cmbProdType = Null Me.cmbCrew = Null Me.cmbScheduleDate = Null Call RefreshSubform End Sub ' ---- PDF EXPORT (opens Print Preview) --------------------- Private Sub ExportCrewPDF(strCrew As String) Dim strFilter As String Dim strDate As String strDate = GetScheduleDate() strFilter = "Crew = '" & strCrew & "' AND " & _ "Format(ScheduleDate,'mm/dd/yyyy') = '" & strDate & "'" DoCmd.OpenReport "rptCrewSchedule", acViewPreview, , strFilter End Sub Private Sub cmdExportCrew1_Click() Call ExportCrewPDF("Crew 1") End Sub Private Sub cmdExportCrew2_Click() Call ExportCrewPDF("Crew 2") End Sub ' ---- GEOCODE (Nominatim + CartoDB tiles) ------------------- Private Function NormalizeCity(sCity As String) As String Select Case Trim(LCase(sCity)) Case "old greenwich": NormalizeCity = "Greenwich" Case "cos cob": NormalizeCity = "Greenwich" Case "riverside": NormalizeCity = "Greenwich" Case "southport": NormalizeCity = "Fairfield" Case Else: NormalizeCity = sCity End Select End Function Private Function FetchLatLon(sURL As String) As String Dim http As Object Dim sResponse As String Dim latStart As Long, latEnd As Long Dim lonStart As Long, lonEnd As Long Dim sLat As String, sLon As String Set http = CreateObject("WinHttp.WinHttpRequest.5.1") http.Open "GET", sURL, False http.SetRequestHeader "User-Agent", "GreenleafSuperScheduler/1.0" http.Send sResponse = http.ResponseText If sResponse = "[]" Or sResponse = "" Then FetchLatLon = "" Exit Function End If latStart = InStr(sResponse, Chr(34) & "lat" & Chr(34) & ":" & Chr(34)) + 7 latEnd = InStr(latStart, sResponse, Chr(34)) sLat = Mid(sResponse, latStart, latEnd - latStart) lonStart = InStr(sResponse, Chr(34) & "lon" & Chr(34) & ":" & Chr(34)) + 7 lonEnd = InStr(lonStart, sResponse, Chr(34)) sLon = Mid(sResponse, lonStart, lonEnd - lonStart) If sLat = "" Or sLon = "" Or latStart <= 7 Then FetchLatLon = "" Else FetchLatLon = sLat & "," & sLon End If Set http = Nothing End Function Private Function GeoCode(sStreet As String, sCity As String, sZip As String) As String Dim sNormCity As String Dim sURL As String Dim sResult As String Dim sBBox As String sBBox = "&bounded=1&viewbox=-80%2C45%2C-66%2C38" sNormCity = NormalizeCity(sCity) sURL = "https://nominatim.openstreetmap.org/search?format=json&limit=1&q=" & _ EncodeURL(sStreet & ", " & sNormCity & ", CT") & sBBox sResult = FetchLatLon(sURL) If sResult <> "" Then GeoCode = sResult Exit Function End If If sZip <> "" Then sURL = "https://nominatim.openstreetmap.org/search?format=json&limit=1&q=" & _ EncodeURL(sStreet & ", " & sZip) & sBBox sResult = FetchLatLon(sURL) If sResult <> "" Then GeoCode = sResult Exit Function End If End If sURL = "WHERE (((EVENT.Completed)=Yes) AND ((EVENT.[To Bill])=No)) " + _
"GROUP BY ORDER.CID " + _
" HAVING (((Sum(EVENT.[Event Price]))>0)); "

    Rem     Create a query set of all customers that need an invoice
    
    Rem     Loop thru the records of the query
    
    Rem         For each record insert a record into the invoice table for that cusomer
    Rem         update the event table
    
    Rem     end loop
    
    Rem     generate the invoices
    
    Rem     print invoice
    
    Rem     update invoice table that we printed
End Function

Function Create_Event(Order As Integer, LN As Integer, EVNT As Integer, Freq As Integer, Price As Double)
    
    Dim mydb As Database, MyT As Table, New_Event As Recordset
    Dim Recs, i, J  As Integer
    Dim Line_Price, Event_Price As Double
    
    Set mydb = DBEngine.Workspaces(0).Databases(0)
Rem    Freq = Forms![app_PPHM_Completed]![Frequency]
Rem    EVNT = Forms![app_PPHM_Completed]![Application]
Rem    Event_Price = Forms![app_PPHM_Completed]![Event Price]
    Event_Price = Price / Freq
    If EVNT = 0 Then
        EVNT = 1
    End If
    If Line_Price = 0 Then
        Line_Price = 1
    End If
    For J = 1 To EVNT
        Set New_Event = mydb.OpenRecordset("EVENT")
        New_Event.AddNew
        New_Event.Fields("OID") = Forms!Order!OID
        New_Event.Fields("[Line No]") = i
        New_Event.Fields("Event_No") = J
        If J = EVNT Then
            New_Event.Fields("Price") = Line_Price
        Else
            New_Event.Fields("Price") = Event_Price
        End If
        Line_Price = Line_Price - Event_Price

        New_Event.Fields("[Event_Date]") = DateAdd("d", (J - 1) * Freq, Date)

        New_Event.Fields("[Prod Type]") = Forms!Order!ORDER_DETAIL.Form![Prod Type]
        New_Event.Fields("Completed") = False
        New_Event.Fields("Complete_Date") = Null
        New_Event.Fields("Billed") = False
        New_Event.Fields("Bill_Date") = Null
        New_Event.Update
        New_Event.Close
    Next J
    mydb.Close
    DoCmd.Requery
    
End Function

Function Create_Events()

    Dim mydb As Variant, MyT As Table, New_Event As Recordset
    Dim Recs, i, EVNT, J, Freq As Integer
    Dim Line_Price, Event_Price As Double
    
    Set mydb = DBEngine.Workspaces(0).Databases(0)
Rem    Forms!Order![Accept_date].Text = Date
    Recs = DMax("[Line No]", "[ORDER DETAIL]", "OID = Forms!ORDER!OID")
    Forms!Order!Accept_date = Date$
    
    Forms!Order!Order = True
    For i = 1 To Recs
      If Forms![Order]![ORDER_DETAIL].Form![Accept] Then
        II = i
        EVNT = DLookup("[Application]", "[ORDER DETAIL]", "OID = FORMS!ORDER!OID and [Line No] =" & i)
        Line_Price = DLookup("[Price]", "[ORDER DETAIL]", "OID = FORMS!ORDER!OID and [Line No] =" & i)
        If EVNT = 0 Then
            EVNT = 1
        End If
        If Line_Price = 0 Or Line_Price = Null Then
            Line_Price = 1
        End If
        Event_Price = Line_Price / EVNT
        Freq = DLookup("[Frequency]", "[ORDER DETAIL]", "OID = FORMS!ORDER!OID and [Line No] =" & i)
        For J = 1 To EVNT
            Set New_Event = mydb.OpenRecordset("EVENT")
            New_Event.AddNew
            New_Event.Fields("OID") = Forms!Order!OID
            New_Event.Fields("[Line No]") = i
            New_Event.Fields("Event_No") = J
            If J = EVNT Then
                New_Event.Fields("Price") = Line_Price
            Else
                New_Event.Fields("Price") = Event_Price
            End If
            Line_Price = Line_Price - Event_Price

            New_Event.Fields("[Event_Date]") = DateAdd("d", (J - 1) * Freq, Date)

            New_Event.Fields("[Prod Type]") = Forms!Order!ORDER_DETAIL.Form![Prod Type]
            New_Event.Fields("Completed") = False
            New_Event.Fields("Complete_Date") = Null
            New_Event.Fields("Billed") = False
            New_Event.Fields("Bill_Date") = Null
            New_Event.Update
            New_Event.Close
        Next J
      End If
    Next i
    mydb.Close
End Function

Option Compare Database
Option Explicit

' ============================================================
'  frmSuperSchedulerSub VBA v3
'  Per-row assign, centralized refresh via parent form
' ============================================================

Private Sub AssignCrew(strCrew As String)
    Dim db As Object
    Dim sql As String
    Dim lOID As Long
    Dim lLine As Long
    Dim lCount As Long
    Set db = CurrentDb()
    lOID = Me![OID]
    lLine = Me![Line No]
    lCount = DCount("*", "tblCrewAssignments", _
        "OID = " & lOID & " AND LineNo = " & lLine)
    If lCount > 0 Then
        sql = "UPDATE tblCrewAssignments "
        sql = sql & "SET Crew = '" & strCrew & "', "
        sql = sql & "ScheduleDate = #" & Format(Date, "mm/dd/yyyy") & "# "
        sql = sql & "WHERE OID = " & lOID & " AND LineNo = " & lLine & ";"
    Else
        sql = "INSERT INTO tblCrewAssignments (OID, LineNo, Crew, ScheduleDate) "
        sql = sql & "VALUES (" & lOID & ", " & lLine & ", '" & strCrew & "', "
        sql = sql & "#" & Format(Date, "mm/dd/yyyy") & "#);"
    End If
    db.Execute sql, 128
    ' Refresh all subforms via parent
    Form_frmSuperScheduler.RefreshAllSubforms
End Sub

Private Sub cmdAssignCrew1_Click()
    Call AssignCrew("Crew 1")
End Sub

Private Sub cmdAssignCrew2_Click()
    Call AssignCrew("Crew 2")
End Sub

Sub SuperScheduler_Install()

    Dim db As Object
    Dim sql As String
    Dim parts() As String
    Dim i As Integer
    Set db = CurrentDb()

    ' ============================================================
    '  STEP 1 - Create tblCrewAssignments
    ' ============================================================

    Dim tblExists As Boolean
    tblExists = False
    Dim tdf As Object
    For Each tdf In db.TableDefs
        If tdf.Name = "tblCrewAssignments" Then
            tblExists = True
            Exit For
        End If
    Next tdf

    If tblExists Then
        MsgBox "tblCrewAssignments already exists - skipping.", vbInformation
    Else
        sql = "CREATE TABLE tblCrewAssignments ("
        sql = sql & "AssignID AUTOINCREMENT PRIMARY KEY, "
        sql = sql & "OID LONG NOT NULL, "
        sql = sql & "LineNo LONG NOT NULL, "
        sql = sql & "Crew TEXT(10), "
        sql = sql & "Priority TEXT(10), "
        sql = sql & "RouteOrder LONG, "
        sql = sql & "ScheduleDate DATETIME, "
        sql = sql & "Notes TEXT(255))"
        db.Execute sql, 128
        MsgBox "tblCrewAssignments created.", vbInformation
    End If

    ' ============================================================
    '  STEP 2 - Create qrySuperscheduler
    ' ============================================================

    Dim qryExists As Boolean
    qryExists = False
    Dim qdf As Object
    For Each qdf In db.QueryDefs
        If qdf.Name = "qrySuperscheduler" Then
            qryExists = True
            Exit For
        End If
    Next qdf
    If qryExists Then db.QueryDefs.Delete "qrySuperscheduler"

    sql = ""
    sql = sql & "SELECT C.CID, C.Lname, C.Fname, C.Street1, "
    sql = sql & "O.[Work Street], O.[Work City], C.City, C.State, C.Zip, "
    sql = sql & "C.Map, C.Grid, C.Phone, OD.OID, OD.[Line No], "
    sql = sql & "OD.[Prod Type], OD.Location, OD.Plant, OD.Pest, "
    sql = sql & "OD.Start, OD.Price, OD.Accept, E.Completed, "
    sql = sql & "E.Event_Date, E.Complete_Date, CA.AssignID, "
    sql = sql & "CA.Crew, CA.Priority, CA.RouteOrder, CA.ScheduleDate, CA.Notes, "
    sql = sql & "IIf(OD.Start IS NULL,'No Start Date',"
    sql = sql & "IIf(Date()>OD.Start+60,'Urgent',"
    sql = sql & "IIf(Date()>OD.Start+30,'High',"
    sql = sql & "IIf(Date()>OD.Start,'Medium','Low')))) AS AutoPriority "
    sql = sql & "FROM ((CUSTOMER AS C "
    sql = sql & "INNER JOIN [ORDER] AS O ON C.CID = O.CID) "
    sql = sql & "INNER JOIN [ORDER DETAIL] AS OD ON O.OID = OD.OID) "
    sql = sql & "LEFT JOIN EVENT AS E "
    sql = sql & "ON (OD.OID = E.OID AND OD.[Line No] = E.[Line No]) "
    sql = sql & "LEFT JOIN tblCrewAssignments AS CA "
    sql = sql & "ON (OD.OID = CA.OID AND OD.[Line No] = CA.LineNo) "
    sql = sql & "WHERE OD.Accept = Yes "
    sql = sql & "AND (E.Completed = No OR E.Completed IS NULL) "
    sql = sql & "AND OD.[Prod Type] IN ('SPRAY','PPHM') "
    sql = sql & "ORDER BY C.City, C.Lname, OD.Start;"

    Dim newQdf As Object
    Set newQdf = db.CreateQueryDef("qrySuperscheduler", sql)
    newQdf.Close
    MsgBox "qrySuperscheduler created.", vbInformation

    ' ============================================================
    '  DONE
    ' ============================================================

    MsgBox "Install complete!" & vbCrLf & vbCrLf & _
           "  - tblCrewAssignments" & vbCrLf & _
           "  - qrySuperscheduler" & vbCrLf & vbCrLf & _
           "Now build frmSuperScheduler manually.", vbInformation

End Sub

        sql = sql & "LineNo LONG NOT NULL, "
        sql = sql & "Crew TEXT(10), "
        sql = sql & "Priority TEXT(10), "
        sql = sql & "RouteOrder LONG, "
        sql = sql & "ScheduleDate DATETIME, "
        sql = sql & "Notes TEXT(255))"
        db.Execute sql, 128
        MsgBox "tblCrewAssignments created.", vbInformation
    End If

    ' ============================================================
    '  STEP 2 - Create qrySuperscheduler
    ' ============================================================

    Dim qryExists As Boolean
    qryExists = False
    Dim qdf As Object
    For Each qdf In db.QueryDefs
        If qdf.Name = "qrySuperscheduler" Then
            qryExists = True
            Exit For
        End If
    Next qdf
    If qryExists Then db.QueryDefs.Delete "qrySuperscheduler"

    sql = ""
    sql = sql & "SELECT C.CID, C.Lname, C.Fname, C.Street1, "
    sql = sql & "O.[Work Street], O.[Work City], C.City, C.State, C.Zip, "
    sql = sql & "C.Map, C.Grid, C.Phone, OD.OID, OD.[Line No], "
    sql = sql & "OD.[Prod Type], OD.Location, OD.Plant, OD.Pest, "
    sql = sql & "OD.Start, OD.Price, OD.Accept, E.Completed, "
    sql = sql & "E.Event_Date, E.Complete_Date, CA.AssignID, "
    sql = sql & "CA.Crew, CA.Priority, CA.RouteOrder, CA.ScheduleDate, CA.Notes, "
    sql = sql & "IIf(OD.Start IS NULL,'No Start Date',"
    sql = sql & "IIf(Date()>OD.Start+60,'Urgent',"
    sql = sql & "IIf(Date()>OD.Start+30,'High',"
    sql = sql & "IIf(Date()>OD.Start,'Medium','Low')))) AS AutoPriority "
    sql = sql & "FROM ((CUSTOMER AS C "
    sql = sql & "INNER JOIN [ORDER] AS O ON C.CID = O.CID) "
    sql = sql & "INNER JOIN [ORDER DETAIL] AS OD ON O.OID = OD.OID) "
    sql = sql & "LEFT JOIN EVENT AS E "
    sql = sql & "ON (OD.OID = E.OID AND OD.[Line No] = E.[Line No]) "
    sql = sql & "LEFT JOIN tblCrewAssignments AS CA "
    sql = sql & "ON (OD.OID = CA.OID AND OD.[Line No] = CA.LineNo) "
    sql = sql & "WHERE OD.Accept = Yes "
    sql = sql & "AND (E.Completed = No OR E.Completed IS NULL) "
    sql = sql & "AND OD.[Prod Type] IN ('SPRAY','PPHM') "
    sql = sql & "ORDER BY C.City, C.Lname, OD.Start;"

    Dim newQdf As Object
    Set newQdf = db.CreateQueryDef("qrySuperscheduler", sql)
    newQdf.Close
    MsgBox "qrySuperscheduler created.", vbInformation

    ' ============================================================
    '  DONE
    ' ============================================================

    MsgBox "Install complete!" & vbCrLf & vbCrLf & _
           "  - tblCrewAssignments" & vbCrLf & _
           "  - qrySuperscheduler" & vbCrLf & vbCrLf & _
           "Now build frmSuperScheduler manually.", vbInformation

End Sub

Sub SuperScheduler_Install()

    Dim db As Object
    Dim sql As String
    Set db = CurrentDb()

    ' ============================================================
    '  STEP 1 - tblCrewAssignments (skip if exists)
    ' ============================================================

    Dim tblExists As Boolean
    tblExists = False
    Dim tdf As Object
    For Each tdf In db.TableDefs
        If tdf.Name = "tblCrewAssignments" Then
            tblExists = True
            Exit For
        End If
    Next tdf

    If tblExists Then
        MsgBox "tblCrewAssignments already exists - skipping.", vbInformation
    Else
        sql = "CREATE TABLE tblCrewAssignments ("
        sql = sql & "AssignID AUTOINCREMENT PRIMARY KEY, "
        sql = sql & "OID LONG NOT NULL, "
        sql = sql & "LineNo LONG NOT NULL, "
        sql = sql & "Crew TEXT(10), "
        sql = sql & "Priority TEXT(10), "
        sql = sql & "RouteOrder LONG, "
        sql = sql & "ScheduleDate DATETIME, "
        sql = sql & "Notes TEXT(255))"
        db.Execute sql, 128
        MsgBox "tblCrewAssignments created.", vbInformation
    End If

    ' ============================================================
    '  STEP 2 - qrySuperscheduler (delete and recreate if exists)
    ' ============================================================

    Dim qryExists As Boolean
    qryExists = False
    Dim qdf As Object
    For Each qdf In db.QueryDefs
        If qdf.Name = "qrySuperscheduler" Then
            qryExists = True
            Exit For
        End If
    Next qdf
    If qryExists Then db.QueryDefs.Delete "qrySuperscheduler"

    sql = ""
    sql = sql & "SELECT C.CID, C.Lname, C.Fname, C.Street1, "
    sql = sql & "O.[Work Street], O.[Work City], C.City, C.State, C.Zip, "
    sql = sql & "C.Map, C.Grid, C.Phone, OD.OID, OD.[Line No], "
    sql = sql & "OD.[Prod Type], OD.Location, OD.Plant, OD.Pest, "
    sql = sql & "OD.Start, OD.Price, OD.Accept, E.Completed, "
    sql = sql & "E.Event_Date, E.Complete_Date, CA.AssignID, "
    sql = sql & "CA.Crew, CA.Priority, CA.RouteOrder, CA.ScheduleDate, CA.Notes, "
    sql = sql & "IIf(OD.Start IS NULL,'No Start Date',"
    sql = sql & "IIf(Date()>OD.Start+60,'Urgent',"
    sql = sql & "IIf(Date()>OD.Start+30,'High',"
    sql = sql & "IIf(Date()>OD.Start,'Medium','Low')))) AS AutoPriority "
    sql = sql & "FROM (((CUSTOMER AS C "
    sql = sql & "INNER JOIN [ORDER] AS O ON C.CID = O.CID) "
    sql = sql & "INNER JOIN [ORDER DETAIL] AS OD ON O.OID = OD.OID) "
    sql = sql & "LEFT JOIN EVENT AS E "
    sql = sql & "ON (OD.OID = E.OID AND OD.[Line No] = E.[Line No])) "
    sql = sql & "LEFT JOIN tblCrewAssignments AS CA "
    sql = sql & "ON (OD.OID = CA.OID AND OD.[Line No] = CA.LineNo) "
    sql = sql & "WHERE OD.Accept = Yes "
    sql = sql & "AND (E.Completed = No OR E.Completed IS NULL) "
    sql = sql & "AND OD.[Prod Type] IN ('SPRAY','PPHM') "
    sql = sql & "ORDER BY C.City, C.Lname, OD.Start;"

    Dim newQdf As Object
    Set newQdf = db.CreateQueryDef("qrySuperscheduler", sql)
    newQdf.Close
    MsgBox "qrySuperscheduler created.", vbInformation

    ' ============================================================
    '  DONE
    ' ============================================================

    MsgBox "Install complete!" & vbCrLf & vbCrLf & _
           "  - tblCrewAssignments" & vbCrLf & _
           "  - qrySuperscheduler" & vbCrLf & vbCrLf & _
           "Now build frmSuperScheduler manually.", vbInformation

End Sub

OpenStreetMap) ------------------- Private Function NormalizeCity(sCity As String) As String Select Case Trim(LCase(sCity)) Case "old greenwich": NormalizeCity = "Greenwich" Case "cos cob": NormalizeCity = "Greenwich" Case "riverside": NormalizeCity = "Greenwich" Case "southport": NormalizeCity = "Fairfield" Case Else: NormalizeCity = sCity End Select End Function Private Function FetchLatLon(sURL As String) As String Dim http As Object Dim sResponse As String Dim latStart As Long, latEnd As Long Dim lonStart As Long, lonEnd As Long Dim sLat As String, sLon As String Set http = CreateObject("WinHttp.WinHttpRequest.5.1") http.Open "GET", sURL, False http.SetRequestHeader "User-Agent", "GreenleafSuperScheduler/1.0" http.Send sResponse = http.ResponseText If sResponse = "[]" Or sResponse = "" Then FetchLatLon = "" Exit Function End If latStart = InStr(sResponse, Chr(34) & "lat" & Chr(34) & ":" & Chr(34)) + 7 latEnd = InStr(latStart, sResponse, Chr(34)) sLat = Mid(sResponse, latStart, latEnd - latStart) lonStart = InStr(sResponse, Chr(34) & "lon" & Chr(34) & ":" & Chr(34)) + 7 lonEnd = InStr(lonStart, sResponse, Chr(34)) sLon = Mid(sResponse, lonStart, lonEnd - lonStart) If sLat = "" Or sLon = "" Or latStart <= 7 Then FetchLatLon = "" Else FetchLatLon = sLat & "," & sLon End If Set http = Nothing End Function Private Function GeoCode(sStreet As String, sCity As String, sZip As String) As String Dim sNormCity As String Dim sURL As String Dim sResult As String sNormCity = NormalizeCity(sCity) ' Attempt 1: street + normalized city + CT sURL = "https://nominatim.openstreetmap.org/search?format=json&limit=1&q=" & _ EncodeURL(sStreet & ", " & sNormCity & ", CT") sResult = FetchLatLon(sURL) If sResult <> "" Then GeoCode = sResult Exit Function End If ' Attempt 2: street + zip only If sZip <> "" Then sURL = "https://nominatim.openstreetmap.org/search?format=json&limit=1&q=" & _ EncodeURL(sStreet & ", " & sZip) sResult = FetchLatLon(sURL) If sResult <> "" Then GeoCode = sResult Exit Function End If End If ' Attempt 3: city + CT (last resort) sURL = "https://nominatim.openstreetmap.org/search?format=json&limit=1&q=" & _ EncodeURL(sNormCity & ", CT") GeoCode = FetchLatLon(sURL) End Function Private Function EncodeURL(s As String) As String Dim result As String result = s result = Replace(result, " ", "+") result = Replace(result, ",", sAddr = rs![Work Street] & ", " & rs![Work City] & ", CT" sLatLon = GeoCode(rs![Work Street], rs![Work City], Nz(rs![Zip], "")) If sLatLon <> "" Then sLat = Split(sLatLon, ",")(0) sLon = Sub SuperScheduler_UpdateQuery()

    Dim db As Object
    Dim sql As String
    Set db = CurrentDb()

    ' Delete and recreate qrySuperscheduler with Selected NULL fix
    Dim qryExists As Boolean
    qryExists = False
    Dim qdf As Object
    For Each qdf In db.QueryDefs
        If qdf.Name = "qrySuperscheduler" Then
            qryExists = True
            Exit For
        End If
    Next qdf
    If qryExists Then db.QueryDefs.Delete "qrySuperscheduler"

    sql = ""
    sql = sql & "SELECT C.CID, C.Lname, C.Fname, C.Street1, "
    sql = sql & "O.[Work Street], O.[Work City], C.City, C.State, C.Zip, "
    sql = sql & "C.Map, C.Grid, C.Phone, OD.OID, OD.[Line No], "
    sql = sql & "OD.[Prod Type], OD.Location, OD.Plant, OD.Pest, "
    sql = sql & "OD.Start, OD.Price, OD.Accept, E.Completed, "
    sql = sql & "E.Event_Date, E.Complete_Date, CA.AssignID, "
    sql = sql & "CA.Crew, CA.Priority, CA.RouteOrder, CA.ScheduleDate, CA.Notes, "
    sql = sql & "IIf(CA.Selected IS NULL, False, CA.Selected) AS Selected, "
    sql = sql & "IIf(OD.Start IS NULL,'No Start Date',"
    sql = sql & "IIf(Date()>OD.Start+60,'Urgent',"
    sql = sql & "IIf(Date()>OD.Start+30,'High',"
    sql = sql & "IIf(Date()>OD.Start,'Medium','Low')))) AS AutoPriority "
    sql = sql & "FROM (((CUSTOMER AS C "
    sql = sql & "INNER JOIN [ORDER] AS O ON C.CID = O.CID) "
    sql = sql & "INNER JOIN [ORDER DETAIL] AS OD ON O.OID = OD.OID) "
    sql = sql & "LEFT JOIN EVENT AS E "
    sql = sql & "ON (OD.OID = E.OID AND OD.[Line No] = E.[Line No])) "
    sql = sql & "LEFT JOIN tblCrewAssignments AS CA "
    sql = sql & "ON (OD.OID = CA.OID AND OD.[Line No] = CA.LineNo) "
    sql = sql & "WHERE OD.Accept = Yes "
    sql = sql & "AND (E.Completed = No OR E.Completed IS NULL) "
    sql = sql & "AND OD.[Prod Type] IN ('SPRAY','PPHM') "
    sql = sql & "ORDER BY C.City, C.Lname, OD.Start;"

    Dim newQdf As Object
    Set newQdf = db.CreateQueryDef("qrySuperscheduler", sql)
    newQdf.Close

    MsgBox "qrySuperscheduler updated successfully.", vbInformation

End Sub

Call ExportCrewPDF("Crew 1") End Sub Private Sub cmdExportCrew2_Click() Call ExportCrewPDF("Crew 2") End Sub ' ---- GEOCODE (Nominatim + CartoDB tiles) ------------------- Private Function NormalizeCity(sCity As String) As String Select Case Trim(LCase(sCity)) Case "old greenwich": NormalizeCity = "Greenwich" Case "cos cob": NormalizeCity = "Greenwich" Case "riverside": NormalizeCity = "Greenwich" Case "southport": NormalizeCity = "Fairfield" Case Else: NormalizeCity = sCity End Select End Function Private Function FetchLatLon(sURL As String) As String Dim http As Object Dim sResponse As String Dim latStart As Long, latEnd As Long Dim lonStart As Long, lonEnd As Long Dim sLat As String, sLon As String Set http = CreateObject("WinHttp.WinHttpRequest.5.1") http.Open "GET", sURL, False http.SetRequestHeader "User-Agent", "GreenleafSuperScheduler/1.0" http.Send sResponse = http.ResponseText If sResponse = "[]" Or sResponse = "" Then FetchLatLon = "" Exit Function End If latStart = InStr(sResponse, Chr(34) & "lat" & Chr(34) & ":" & Chr(34)) + 7 latEnd = InStr(latStart, sResponse, Chr(34)) sLat = Mid(sResponse, latStart, latEnd - latStart) lonStart = InStr(sResponse, Chr(34) & "lon" & Chr(34) & ":" & Chr(34)) + 7 lonEnd = InStr(lonStart, sResponse, Chr(34)) sLon = Mid(sResponse, lonStart, lonEnd - lonStart) If sLat = "" Or sLon = "" Or latStart <= 7 Then FetchLatLon = "" Else FetchLatLon = sLat & "," & sLon End If Set http = Nothing End Function Private Function GeoCode(sStreet As String, sCity As String, sZip As String) As String Dim sNormCity As String Dim sURL As String Dim sResult As String ' CT bounding box: viewbox=-73.7,41.6,-71.8,40.9 Dim sBBox As String sBBox = "&countrycodes=us" sNormCity = NormalizeCity(sCity) ' Attempt 1: street + normalized city + CT + bbox sURL = "https://nominatim.openstreetmap.org/search?format=json&limit=1&q=" & _ EncodeURL(sStreet & ", " & sNormCity & ", CT") & sBBox sResult = FetchLatLon(sURL) If sResult <> "" Then GeoCode = sResult Exit Function End If ' Attempt 2: street + zip + bbox If sZip <> "" Then sURL = "https://nominatim.openstreetmap.org/search?format=json&limit=1&q=" & _ EncodeURL(sStreet & ", " & sZip) & sBBox sResult = FetchLatLon(sURL) If sResult <> "" Then GeoCode = sResult Exit Function End If End If ' Attempt 3: city + CT + bbox (last resort) sURL = "https://nominatim.openstreetmap.org/search?format=json&limit=1&q=" & _ EncodeURL(sNormCity & ", CT") & sBBox GeoCode = FetchLatLon(sURL) End Function Private Function EncodeURL(s As String) As String Dim result As String result = s result = Replace(result, " ", "+") result = Replace(result, ",", "%2C") result = Replace(result, "&", "%26") result = Replace(result, "#", "%23") EncodeURL = result End Option Compare Database
Option Explicit

' ============================================================
'  frmSuperScheduler VBA v3
'  Row selector multi-select, pins-only map, RouteOrder PDF sort
' ============================================================

Private Sub Form_Load()
    Call RefreshSubform
End Sub

' ---- FILTER ------------------------------------------------

Private Function BuildFilter() As String
    Dim f As String
    f = ""
    If Not IsNull(Me.cmbLname) And Me.cmbLname <> "" Then
        f = f & " AND Lname = '" & Replace(Me.cmbLname, "'", "''") & "'"
    End If
    If Not IsNull(Me.cmbCity) And Me.cmbCity <> "" Then
        f = f & " AND City = '" & Replace(Me.cmbCity, "'", "''") & "'"
    End If
    If Not IsNull(Me.cmbZip) And Me.cmbZip <> "" Then
        f = f & " AND Zip = '" & Replace(Me.cmbZip, "'", "''") & "'"
    End If
    If Not IsNull(Me.cmbMap) And Me.cmbMap <> "" Then
        f = f & " AND Map = '" & Replace(Me.cmbMap, "'", "''") & "'"
    End If
    If Not IsNull(Me.cmbGrid) And Me.cmbGrid <> "" Then
        f = f & " AND Grid = '" & Replace(Me.cmbGrid, "'", "''") & "'"
    End If
    If Not IsNull(Me.cmbProdType) And Me.cmbProdType <> "" Then
        f = f & " AND [Prod Type] = '" & Me.cmbProdType & "'"
    End If
    If Not IsNull(Me.cmbPriority) And Me.cmbPriority <> "" Then
        f = f & " AND AutoPriority = '" & Me.cmbPriority & "'"
    End If
    If Not IsNull(Me.cmbCrew) And Me.cmbCrew <> "" Then
        If Me.cmbCrew = "Unassigned" Then
            f = f & " AND (Crew IS NULL OR Crew = '')"
        Else
            f = f & " AND Crew = '" & Me.cmbCrew & "'"
        End If
    End If
    If Left(f, 5) = " AND " Then f = Mid(f, 6)
    BuildFilter = f
End Function

Private Sub RefreshSubform()
    Dim f As String
    f = BuildFilter()
    With Me.frmSuperSchedulerSub.Form
        If f = "" Then
            .Filter = ""
            .FilterOn = False
        Else
            .Filter = f
            .FilterOn = True
        End If
        .Requery
    End With
End Sub

' ---- DROPDOWN EVENTS --------------------------------------

Private Sub cmbLname_AfterUpdate()
    Call RefreshSubform
End Sub
Private Sub cmbCity_AfterUpdate()
    Call RefreshSubform
End Sub
Private Sub cmbZip_AfterUpdate()
    Call RefreshSubform
End Sub
Private Sub cmbMap_AfterUpdate()
    Call RefreshSubform
End Sub
Private Sub cmbGrid_AfterUpdate()
    Call RefreshSubform
End Sub
Private Sub cmbProdType_AfterUpdate()
    Call RefreshSubform
End Sub
Private Sub cmbPriority_AfterUpdate()
    Call RefreshSubform
End Sub
Private Sub cmbCrew_AfterUpdate()
    Call RefreshSubform
End Sub

' ---- RESET ------------------------------------------------

Private Sub cmdReset_Click()
    Me.cmbLname = Null
    Me.cmbCity = Null
    Me.cmbZip = Null
    Me.cmbMap = Null
    Me.cmbGrid = Null
    Me.cmbProdType = Null
    Me.cmbPriority = Null
    Me.cmbCrew = Null
    Call RefreshSubform
End Sub

' ---- CREW ASSIGNMENT (row selector multi-select) -----------

Private Sub AssignCrew(strCrew As String)
    Dim db As Object
    Dim subFrm As Form
    Dim rs As Object
    Dim sql As String
    Dim lOID As Long
    Dim lLine As Long
    Dim lCount As Long
    Dim nAssigned As Integer
    Dim i As Integer
    nAssigned = 0
    Set db = CurrentDb()
    Set subFrm = Me.frmSuperSchedulerSub.Form
    Set rs = subFrm.RecordsetClone

    ' Check if any rows are selected
    If subFrm.SelHeight = 0 Then
        MsgBox "No rows selected. Click a row (or Ctrl+Click multiple rows) to select first.", vbExclamation
        Exit Sub
    End If

    ' Move to first selected row
    rs.MoveFirst
    rs.Move subFrm.SelTop - 1

    ' Loop through selected rows
    For i = 1 To subFrm.SelHeight
        lOID = rs![OID]
        lLine = rs![Line No]
        lCount = DCount("*", "tblCrewAssignments", _
            "OID = " & lOID & " AND LineNo = " & lLine)
        If lCount > 0 Then
            sql = "UPDATE tblCrewAssignments "
            sql = sql & "SET Crew = '" & strCrew & "', "
            sql = sql & "ScheduleDate = #" & Format(Date, "mm/dd/yyyy") & "# "
            sql = sql & "WHERE OID = " & lOID & " AND LineNo = " & lLine & ";"
        Else
            sql = "INSERT INTO tblCrewAssignments (OID, LineNo, Crew, ScheduleDate) "
            sql = sql & "VALUES (" & lOID & ", " & lLine & ", '" & strCrew & "', "
            sql = sql & "#" & Format(Date, "mm/dd/yyyy") & "#);"
        End If
        db.Execute sql, 128
        nAssigned = nAssigned + 1
        rs.MoveNext
    Next i

    If nAssigned = 0 Then
        MsgBox "No rows assigned.", vbExclamation
    Else
        MsgBox nAssigned & " job(s) assigned to " & strCrew & ".", vbInformation
        Call RefreshSubform
    End If
End Sub

Private Sub cmdCrew1_Click()
    Call AssignCrew("Crew 1")
End Sub

Private Sub cmdCrew2_Click()
    Call AssignCrew("Crew 2")
End Sub

' ---- MAP (pins only) --------------------------------------

Private Sub cmdMap_Click()
    Dim subFrm As Form
    Dim rs As Object
    Dim url As String
    Dim street As String
    Dim City As String
    Dim markers As String
    Dim count As Integer
    Set subFrm = Me.frmSuperSchedulerSub.Form
    Set rs = subFrm.RecordsetClone
    If rs.EOF And rs.BOF Then
        MsgBox "No jobs in current list to map.", vbExclamation
        Exit Sub
    End If
    markers = ""
    count = 0
    rs.MoveFirst
    Do While Not rs.EOF
        If Not IsNull(rs![Work Street]) And Not IsNull(rs![Work City]) Then
            street = Replace(Trim(rs![Work Street]), " ", "+")
            City = Replace(Trim(rs![Work City]), " ", "+")
            markers = markers & "&q=" & street & ",+" & City & ",+CT"
            count = count + 1
        End If
        rs.MoveNext
    Loop
    If count = 0 Then
        MsgBox "No addresses found in current list.", vbExclamation
        Exit Sub
    End If
    markers = Mid(markers, 2)
    url = "https://maps.google.com/maps?" & markers
    Application.FollowHyperlink url
    MsgBox count & " location(s) plotted." & vbCrLf & _
        "Enter Route Order numbers on each row to set the PDF sequence.", vbInformation
End Sub

' ---- PDF EXPORT -------------------------------------------

Private Sub ExportCrewPDF(strCrew As String)
    Dim strPath As String
    Dim strDate As String
    Dim strFilter As String
    strDate = Format(Date, "yyyy-mm-dd")
    strPath = CurrentProject.Path & "\SuperScheduler_" & _
              Replace(strCrew, " ", "") & "_" & strDate & ".pdf"
    strFilter = "Crew = '" & strCrew & "' AND " & _
                "Format(ScheduleDate,'yyyy-mm-dd') = '" & strDate & "'"
    DoCmd.OpenReport "rptCrewSchedule", acViewPreview, , strFilter
    DoCmd.OutputTo acOutputReport, "rptCrewSchedule", acFormatPDF, strPath
    DoCmd.Close acReport, "rptCrewSchedule"
    MsgBox strCrew & " schedule exported to:" & vbCrLf & strPath, vbInformation
End Sub

Private Sub cmdExportCrew1_Click()
    Call ExportCrewPDF("Crew 1")
End Sub

Private Sub cmdExportCrew2_Click()
    Call ExportCrewPDF("Crew 2")
End Sub
