Option Compare Database
Option Explicit

' ============================================================
'  frmSuperSchedulerSub VBA
'  Per-row Crew 1 / Crew 2 assign buttons
' ============================================================

Private Sub AssignCrew(strCrew As String)
    Dim db As Object
    Dim sql As String
    Dim lOID As Long
    Dim lLine As Long
    Dim lCount As Long
    Set db = CurrentDb()
    lOID = Me![OID]
    lLine = Me![Line No]
    lCount = DCount("*", "tblCrewAssignments", _
        "OID = " & lOID & " AND LineNo = " & lLine)
    If lCount > 0 Then
        sql = "UPDATE tblCrewAssignments "
        sql = sql & "SET Crew = '" & strCrew & "', "
        sql = sql & "ScheduleDate = #" & Format(Date, "mm/dd/yyyy") & "# "
        sql = sql & "WHERE OID = " & lOID & " AND LineNo = " & lLine & ";"
    Else
        sql = "INSERT INTO tblCrewAssignments (OID, LineNo, Crew, ScheduleDate) "
        sql = sql & "VALUES (" & lOID & ", " & lLine & ", '" & strCrew & "', "
        sql = sql & "#" & Format(Date, "mm/dd/yyyy") & "#);"
    End If
    db.Execute sql, 128
    Me.Requery
    MsgBox "Assigned to " & strCrew & ".", vbInformation
End Sub

Private Sub cmdAssignCrew1_Click()
    Call AssignCrew("Crew 1")
End Sub

Private Sub cmdAssignCrew2_Click()
    Call AssignCrew("Crew 2")
End Sub

Sub SuperScheduler_CreateCrewQuery()

    Dim db As Object
    Dim sql As String
    Set db = CurrentDb()

    Dim qryExists As Boolean
    qryExists = False
    Dim qdf As Object
    For Each qdf In db.QueryDefs
        If qdf.Name = "qryCrewAssignments" Then
            qryExists = True
            Exit For
        End If
    Next qdf
    If qryExists Then db.QueryDefs.Delete "qryCrewAssignments"

    sql = ""
    sql = sql & "SELECT C.CID, C.Lname, C.Fname, C.Street1, "
    sql = sql & "O.[Work Street], O.[Work City], C.City, C.State, C.Zip, "
    sql = sql & "C.Map, C.Grid, C.Phone, OD.OID, OD.[Line No], "
    sql = sql & "OD.[Prod Type], OD.Location, OD.Plant, OD.Pest, "
    sql = sql & "OD.Start, OD.Price, OD.Accept, E.Completed, "
    sql = sql & "E.Event_Date, E.Complete_Date, CA.AssignID, "
    sql = sql & "CA.Crew, CA.Priority, CA.RouteOrder, CA.ScheduleDate, CA.Notes, "
    sql = sql & "IIf(OD.Start IS NULL,'No Start Date',"
    sql = sql & "IIf(Date()>OD.Start+60,'Urgent',"
    sql = sql & "IIf(Date()>OD.Start+30,'High',"
    sql = sql & "IIf(Date()>OD.Start,'Medium','Low')))) AS AutoPriority "
    sql = sql & "FROM (((CUSTOMER AS C "
    sql = sql & "INNER JOIN [ORDER] AS O ON C.CID = O.CID) "
    sql = sql & "INNER JOIN [ORDER DETAIL] AS OD ON O.OID = OD.OID) "
    sql = sql & "LEFT JOIN EVENT AS E "
    sql = sql & "ON (OD.OID = E.OID AND OD.[Line No] = E.[Line No])) "
    sql = sql & "INNER JOIN tblCrewAssignments AS CA "
    sql = sql & "ON (OD.OID = CA.OID AND OD.[Line No] = CA.LineNo) "
    sql = sql & "WHERE OD.Accept = Yes "
    sql = sql & "AND (E.Completed = No OR E.Completed IS NULL) "
    sql = sql & "AND OD.[Prod Type] IN ('SPRAY','PPHM') "
    sql = sql & "AND CA.Crew IS NOT NULL "
    sql = sql & "ORDER BY CA.Crew, CA.RouteOrder, C.Lname;"

    Dim newQdf As Object
    Set newQdf = db.CreateQueryDef("qryCrewAssignments", sql)
    newQdf.Close

    MsgBox "qryCrewAssignments created successfully.", vbInformation

End Sub

Private Sub AssignCrew(strCrew As String)
    Dim db As Object
    Dim sql As String
    Dim lOID As Long
    Dim lLine As Long
    Dim lCount As Long
    Set db = CurrentDb()
    lOID = Me![OID]
    lLine = Me![Line No]
    lCount = DCount("*", "tblCrewAssignments", _
        "OID = " & lOID & " AND LineNo = " & lLine)
    If lCount > 0 Then
        sql = "UPDATE tblCrewAssignments "
        sql = sql & "SET Crew = '" & strCrew & "', "
        sql = sql & "ScheduleDate = #" & Format(Date, "mm/dd/yyyy") & "# "
        sql = sql & "WHERE OID = " & lOID & " AND LineNo = " & lLine & ";"

' ============================================================

'  Centralized refresh, pins-only map, RouteOrder PDF sort
' ============================================================

Public Sub RefreshAllSubforms()
    Me.frmSuperSchedulerSub.Form.Requery
    Me.frmCrew1Sub.Form.Requery
    Me.frmCrew2Sub.Form.Requery
End Sub

Private Sub Form_Load()
    Call RefreshSubform
End Sub

' ---- FILTER ------------------------------------------------

Private Function BuildFilter() As String
    Dim f As String
    f = ""
    If Not IsNull(Me.cmbLname) And Me.cmbLname <> "" Then
        f = f & " AND Lname = '" & Replace(Me.cmbLname, "'", "''") & "'"
    End If
    If Not IsNull(Me.cmbCity) And Me.cmbCity <> "" Then
        f = f & " AND City = '" & Replace(Me.cmbCity, "'", "''") & "'"
    End If
    If Not IsNull(Me.cmbZip) And Me.cmbZip <> "" Then
        f = f & " AND Zip = '" & Replace(Me.cmbZip, "'", "''") & "'"
    End If
    If Not IsNull(Me.cmbMap) And Me.cmbMap <> "" Then
        f = f & " AND Map = '" & Replace(Me.cmbMap, "'", "''") & "'"
    End If
    If Not IsNull(Me.cmbGrid) And Me.cmbGrid <> "" Then
        f = f & " AND Grid = '" & Replace(Me.cmbGrid, "'", "''") & "'"
    End If
    If Not IsNull(Me.cmbProdType) And Me.cmbProdType <> "" Then
        f = f & " AND [Prod Type] = '" & Me.cmbProdType & "'"
    End If
    If Not IsNull(Me.cmbPriority) And Me.cmbPriority <> "" Then
        f = f & " AND AutoPriority = '" & Me.cmbPriority & "'"
    End If
    If Not IsNull(Me.cmbCrew) And Me.cmbCrew <> "" Then
        If Me.cmbCrew = "Unassigned" Then
            f = f & " AND (Crew IS NULL OR Crew = '')"
        Else
            f = f & " AND Crew = '" & Me.cmbCrew & "'"
        End If
    End If
    If Left(f, 5) = " AND " Then f = Mid(f, 6)
    BuildFilter = f
End Function

Private Sub RefreshSubform()
    Dim f As String
    f = BuildFilter()
    With Me.frmSuperSchedulerSub.Form
        If f = "" Then
            .Filter = ""
            .FilterOn = False
        Else
            .Filter = f
            .FilterOn = True
        End If
        .Requery
    End With
End Sub

    Call RefreshSubform
End Sub

    Call RefreshSubform

    Call RefreshSubform

    Call RefreshSubform

' ---- RESET ------------------------------------------------

Private Sub cmdReset_Click()
    Me.cmbLname = Null
    Me.cmbCity = Null
    Me.cmbZip = Null
    Me.cmbMap = Null
    Me.cmbGrid = Null
    Me.cmbProdType = Null
    Me.cmbPriority = Null
    Me.cmbCrew = Null
    Call RefreshSubform
End Sub

' ---- MAP (pins only) --------------------------------------

Private Sub cmdMap_Click()
    Dim subFrm As Form
    Dim rs As Object
    Dim url As String
    Dim street As String
    Dim City As String
    Dim markers As String
    Dim count As Integer
    Set subFrm = Me.frmSuperSchedulerSub.Form
    Set rs = subFrm.RecordsetClone
    If rs.EOF And rs.BOF Then
        MsgBox "No jobs in current list to map.", vbExclamation
        Exit Sub
    End If
    markers = ""
    count = 0
    rs.MoveFirst
    Do While Not rs.EOF
        If Not IsNull(rs![Work Street]) And Not IsNull(rs![Work City]) Then
            street = Replace(Trim(rs![Work Street]), " ", "+")
            City = Replace(Trim(rs![Work City]), " ", "+")
            markers = markers & "&q=" & street & ",+" & City & ",+CT"
            count = count + 1
        End If
        rs.MoveNext
    Loop
    If count = 0 Then
        MsgBox "No addresses found in current list.", vbExclamation
        Exit Sub
    End If
    markers = Mid(markers, 2)
    url = "https://maps.google.com/maps?" & markers
    Application.FollowHyperlink url
    MsgBox count & " location(s) plotted." & vbCrLf & _
        "Enter Route Order numbers on each row to set the PDF sequence.", vbInformation
End Sub

Private Sub ExportCrewPDF(strCrew As String)
    Dim strPath As String
    Dim strDate As String
    Dim strFilter As String
    strDate = Format(Date, "yyyy-mm-dd")
    strPath = CurrentProject.Path & "\SuperScheduler_" & _
              Replace(strCrew, " ", "") & "_" & strDate & ".pdf"
    strFilter = "Crew = '" & strCrew & "' AND " & _
                "Format(ScheduleDate,'yyyy-mm-dd') = '" & strDate & "'"
    DoCmd.OpenReport "rptCrewSchedule", acViewPreview, , strFilter
    DoCmd.OutputTo acOutputReport, "rptCrewSchedule", acFormatPDF, strPath
    DoCmd.Close acReport, "rptCrewSchedule"
    MsgBox strCrew & " schedule exported to:" & vbCrLf & strPath, vbInformation
End Sub

Private Sub cmdExportCrew1_Click()
    Call ExportCrewPDF("Crew 1")
End Sub

Private Sub cmdExportCrew2_Click()
    Call ExportCrewPDF("Crew 2")
End Sub

Option Compare Database
Option Explicit

' ============================================================
'  frmSuperSchedulerSub VBA v4
'  Per-row assign buttons, date-scoped via parent GetScheduleDate()
' ============================================================

Private Sub AssignCrew(strCrew As String)
    Dim db As Object
    Dim sql As String
    Dim lOID As Long
    Dim lLine As Long
    Dim lCount As Long
    Dim sDate As String
    Set db = CurrentDb()
    lOID = Me![OID]
    lLine = Me![Line No]
    sDate = Form_frmSuperScheduler.GetScheduleDate()
    lCount = DCount("*", "tblCrewAssignments", _
        "OID = " & lOID & " AND LineNo = " & lLine)
    If lCount > 0 Then
        sql = "UPDATE tblCrewAssignments "
        sql = sql & "SET Crew = '" & strCrew & "', "
        sql = sql & "ScheduleDate = #" & sDate & "# "
        sql = sql & "WHERE OID = " & lOID & " AND LineNo = " & lLine & ";"
    Else
        sql = "INSERT INTO tblCrewAssignments (OID, LineNo, Crew, ScheduleDate) "
        sql = sql & "VALUES (" & lOID & ", " & lLine & ", '" & strCrew & "', "
        sql = sql & "#" & sDate & "#);"
    End If
    db.Execute sql, 128
    Form_frmSuperScheduler.RefreshAllSubforms
End Sub

Private Sub cmdAssignCrew1_Click()
    Call AssignCrew("Crew 1")
End Sub

Private Sub cmdAssignCrew2_Click()
    Call AssignCrew("Crew 2")
End Sub

Option Compare Database
Option Explicit

' ============================================================
'  frmCrew1Sub / frmCrew2Sub VBA v3
'  Remove clears tblCrewAssignments AND ORDER DETAIL
' ============================================================

Private Sub cmdRemove_Click()
    Dim db As Object
    Dim sql As String
    Dim lOID As Long
    Dim lLine As Long
    Set db = CurrentDb()
    lOID = Me![OID]
    lLine = Me![Line No]
    ' Remove from temp table
    sql = "DELETE FROM tblCrewAssignments "
    sql = sql & "WHERE OID = " & lOID & " AND LineNo = " & lLine & ";"
    db.Execute sql, 128
    ' Clear CrewID and ScheduleDate on ORDER DETAIL
    sql = "UPDATE [ORDER DETAIL] "
    sql = sql & "SET [CrewID] = NULL, [ScheduleDate] = NULL "
    sql = sql & "WHERE OID = " & lOID & " AND [Line No] = " & lLine & ";"
    db.Execute sql, 128
    Form_frmSuperScheduler.RefreshAllSubforms
End Sub

Private Sub RouteOrder_AfterUpdate()
    Me.Dirty = False
End Sub

Sub SuperScheduler_UpdateCrewQuery()

    Dim db As Object
    Dim sql As String
    Set db = CurrentDb()

    Dim qryExists As Boolean
    qryExists = False
    Dim qdf As Object
    For Each qdf In db.QueryDefs
        If qdf.Name = "qryCrewAssignments" Then
            qryExists = True
            Exit For
        End If
    Next qdf
    If qryExists Then db.QueryDefs.Delete "qryCrewAssignments"

    sql = ""
    sql = sql & "SELECT C.CID, C.Lname, C.Fname, C.Street1, "
    sql = sql & "O.[Work Street], O.[Work City], C.City, C.State, C.Zip, "
    sql = sql & "C.Map, C.Grid, C.Phone, OD.OID, OD.[Line No], "
    sql = sql & "OD.[Prod Type], OD.Location, OD.Plant, OD.Pest, "
    sql = sql & "OD.Start, OD.Price, OD.LargeTree, OD.Priority, OD.Accept, "
    sql = sql & "E.Completed, E.Event_Date, E.Complete_Date, "
    sql = sql & "CA.AssignID, CA.Crew, CA.RouteOrder, CA.ScheduleDate, CA.Notes "
    sql = sql & "FROM (((CUSTOMER AS C "
    sql = sql & "INNER JOIN [ORDER] AS O ON C.CID = O.CID) "
    sql = sql & "INNER JOIN [ORDER DETAIL] AS OD ON O.OID = OD.OID) "
    sql = sql & "LEFT JOIN EVENT AS E "
    sql = sql & "ON (OD.OID = E.OID AND OD.[Line No] = E.[Line No])) "
    sql = sql & "INNER JOIN tblCrewAssignments AS CA "
    sql = sql & "ON (OD.OID = CA.OID AND OD.[Line No] = CA.LineNo) "
    sql = sql & "WHERE OD.Accept = Yes "
    sql = sql & "AND (E.Completed = No OR E.Completed IS NULL) "
    sql = sql & "AND OD.[Prod Type] IN ('SPRAY','PPHM') "
    sql = sql & "AND CA.Crew IS NOT NULL "
    sql = sql & "ORDER BY CA.Crew, CA.RouteOrder, C.Lname;"

    Dim newQdf As Object
    Set newQdf = db.CreateQueryDef("qryCrewAssignments", sql)
    newQdf.Close

    MsgBox "qryCrewAssignments updated successfully.", vbInformation

End Sub

Option Compare Database Option Explicit ' ============================================================ ' frmSuperScheduler VBA v14 ' Filters: Priority, Zip, City, Map, Grid, Last Name, ' Pest, Prod Type, Crew, Large Tree, Start Date ' Priority reads from ORDER DETAIL (AutoPriority removed) ' Schedule Crew writes back to ORDER DETAIL ' Remove clears ORDER DETAIL CrewID and ScheduleDate ' Update Scheduling wired up (6 steps) ' Running totals per crew and combined daily total ' ============================================================ Public Sub RefreshAllSubforms() Me.frmSuperSchedulerSub.Form.Requery Me.frmCrew1Sub.Form.Requery Me.frmCrew2Sub.Form.Requery Dim sDate As String sDate = GetScheduleDate() Dim crew1Total As Currency Dim crew2Total As Currency crew1Total = Nz(DSum("Price", "qryCrewAssignments", _ "Crew = 'Crew 1' AND Format(ScheduleDate,'mm/dd/yyyy') = '" & sDate & "'"), 0) crew2Total = Nz(DSum("Price", "qryCrewAssignments", _ "Crew = 'Crew 2' AND Format(ScheduleDate,'mm/dd/yyyy') = '" & sDate & "'"), 0) Me.txtCrew1Total = Format(crew1Total, "$#,##0.00") Me.txtCrew2Total = Format(crew2Total, "$#,##0.00") Me.txtDailyTotal = Format(crew1Total + crew2Total, "$#,##0.00") End Sub Private Sub Form_Load() Me.txtScheduleDate = Format(Date, "mm/dd/yyyy") Me.cmbLargeTree = "Both" Call RefreshSubform End Sub Public Function GetScheduleDate() As String If Not IsNull(Me.txtScheduleDate) And Me.txtScheduleDate <> "" Then GetScheduleDate = Format(CDate(Me.txtScheduleDate), "mm/dd/yyyy") Else GetScheduleDate = Format(Date, "mm/dd/yyyy") End If End Function ' ---- FILTER ------------------------------------------------ Private Function BuildFilter() As String Dim f As String f = "" If Not IsNull(Me.cmbLname) And Me.cmbLname <> "" Then f = f & " AND Lname = '" & Replace(Me.cmbLname, "'", "''") & "'" End If If Not IsNull(Me.cmbCity) And Me.cmbCity <> "" Then f = f & " AND City = '" & Replace(Me.cmbCity, "'", "''") & "'" End If If Not IsNull(Me.cmbZip) And Me.cmbZip <> "" Then f = f & " AND Zip = '" & Replace(Me.cmbZip, "'", "''") & "'" End If If Not IsNull(Me.cmbMap) And Me.cmbMap <> "" Then f = f & " AND Map = '" & Replace(Me.cmbMap, "'", "''") & "'" End If If Not IsNull(Me.cmbGrid) And Me.cmbGrid <> "" Then f = f & " AND Grid = '" & Replace(Me.cmbGrid, "'", "''") & "'" End If If Not IsNull(Me.cmbPriority) And Me.cmbPriority <> "" Then f = f & " AND Priority = '" & Me.cmbPriority & "'" End If If Not IsNull(Me.cmbPest) And Me.cmbPest <> "" Then f = f & " AND Pest = '" & Replace(Me.cmbPest, "'", "''") & "'" End If If Not IsNull(Me.cmbProdType) And Me.cmbProdType <> "" Then If Me.cmbProdType = "Both" Then f = f & " AND [Prod Type] IN ('SPRAY','PPHM')" Else f = f & " AND [Prod Type] = '" & Me.cmbProdType & "'" End If End If If Not IsNull(Me.cmbCrew) And Me.cmbCrew <> "" Then If Me.cmbCrew = "Unassigned" Then f = f & " AND (Crew IS NULL OR Crew = '')" Else f = f & " AND Crew = '" & Me.cmbCrew & "'" End If End If If Not IsNull(Me.cmbLargeTree) And Me.cmbLargeTree <> "" And Me.cmbLargeTree <> "Both" Then If Me.cmbLargeTree = "Yes" Then f = f & " AND LargeTree = True" Else f = f & " AND (LargeTree = False OR LargeTree IS NULL)" End If End If If Not IsNull(Me.cmbStartDate) And Me.cmbStartDate <> "" Then f = f & " AND Start = #" & Format(Me.cmbStartDate, "mm/dd/yyyy") & "#" End If If Left(f, 5) = " AND " Then f = Mid(f, 6) BuildFilter = f End Function Private Sub RefreshSubform() Dim f As String Dim sDate As String f = BuildFilter() sDate = GetScheduleDate() With Me.frmSuperSchedulerSub.Form If f = "" Then .Filter = "" .FilterOn = False Else .Filter = f .FilterOn = True End If .Requery End With Dim sDateFilter As String sDateFilter = "Format(ScheduleDate,'mm/dd/yyyy') = '" & sDate & "'" With Me.frmCrew1Sub.Form .Filter = "Crew = 'Crew 1' AND " & sDateFilter .FilterOn = True .Requery End With With Me.frmCrew2Sub.Form .Filter = "Crew = 'Crew 2' AND " & sDateFilter .FilterOn = True .Requery End With End Sub ' ---- DROPDOWN EVENTS -------------------------------------- Private Sub cmbLname_AfterUpdate() Call RefreshSubform End Sub Private Sub cmbCity_AfterUpdate() Call RefreshSubform End Sub Private Sub cmbZip_AfterUpdate() Call RefreshSubform End Sub Private Sub cmbMap_AfterUpdate() Call RefreshSubform End Sub Private Sub cmbGrid_AfterUpdate() Call RefreshSubform End Sub Private Sub cmbPriority_AfterUpdate() Call RefreshSubform End Sub Private Sub cmbPest_AfterUpdate() Call RefreshSubform End Sub Private Sub cmbProdType_AfterUpdate() Call RefreshSubform End Sub Private Sub cmbCrew_AfterUpdate() Call RefreshSubform End Sub Private Sub cmbLargeTree_AfterUpdate() Call RefreshSubform End Sub Private Sub cmbStartDate_AfterUpdate() Call RefreshSubform End Sub ' ---- RESET ------------------------------------------------ Private Sub cmdReset_Click() Me.cmbLname = Null Me.cmbCity = Null Me.cmbZip = Null Me.cmbMap = Null Me.cmbGrid = Null Me.cmbPriority = Null Me.cmbPest = Null Me.cmbProdType = Null Me.cmbCrew = Null Me.cmbStartDate = Null Me.cmbLargeTree = "Both" Call RefreshSubform End Sub ' ---- DATE NAVIGATION -------------------------------------- Private Sub cmdDateBack_Click() Dim d As Date d = CDate(Me.txtScheduleDate) Me.txtScheduleDate = Format(d - 1, "mm/dd/yyyy") Call RefreshSubform Call RefreshAllSubforms End Sub Private Sub cmdDateForward_Click() Dim d As Date d = CDate(Me.txtScheduleDate) Me.txtScheduleDate = Format(d + 1, "mm/dd/yyyy") Call RefreshSubform Call RefreshAllSubforms End Sub ' ---- SCHEDULE CREW (writes to ORDER DETAIL) --------------- Private Sub ScheduleCrew(strCrew As String) On Error GoTo ErrHandler Dim db As Object Dim rs As Object Dim sql As String Dim sDate As String Dim lOID As Long Dim lLine As Long Dim nUpdated As Integer nUpdated = 0 sDate = GetScheduleDate() Set db = CurrentDb() sql = "SELECT OID, [Line No] FROM qryCrewAssignments " sql = sql & "WHERE Crew = '" & strCrew & "' " sql = sql & "AND ScheduleDate = #" & sDate & "#;" Set rs = db.OpenRecordset(sql) If rs.EOF And rs.BOF Then MsgBox "No jobs assigned to " & strCrew & " for " & sDate & ".", vbExclamation Exit Sub End If Do While Not rs.EOF lOID = rs![OID] lLine = rs![Line No] sql = "UPDATE [ORDER DETAIL] " sql = sql & "SET [CrewID] = '" & strCrew & "', " sql = sql & "[ScheduleDate] = #" & sDate & "# " sql = sql & "WHERE OID = " & lOID & " AND [Line No] = " & lLine & ";" db.Execute sql, 128 nUpdated = nUpdated + 1 rs.MoveNext Loop rs.Close Set rs = Nothing Set db = Nothing Dim strFilter As String Dim strOpenArgs As String strFilter = "Crew = '" & strCrew & "' AND " & _ "Format(ScheduleDate,'mm/dd/yyyy') = '" & sDate & "'" strOpenArgs = sDate & "|" & strCrew MsgBox nUpdated & " job(s) scheduled for " & strCrew & " on " & sDate & ".", vbInformation DoCmd.OpenReport "rptCrewSchedule", acViewPreview, , strFilter, , strOpenArgs Exit Sub ErrHandler: MsgBox "Error " & Err.Number & ": " & Err.Description, vbCritical End Sub Private Sub cmdScheduleCrew1_Click() Call ScheduleCrew("Crew 1") End Sub Private Sub cmdScheduleCrew2_Click() Call ScheduleCrew("Crew 2") End Sub ' ---- UPDATE SCHEDULING ------------------------------------ Private Sub cmdUpdateScheduling_Click() Dim db As Object Dim sql As String Set db = CurrentDb() ' Step 0 - Default ScheduleReady = No where null sql = "UPDATE [ORDER DETAIL] SET ScheduleReady = No " & _ "WHERE Accept = Yes AND ScheduleReady IS NULL;" db.Execute sql, 128 ' Step 1 - Set ScheduleReady = Yes where start date reached sql = "UPDATE [ORDER DETAIL] INNER JOIN EVENT " & _ "ON [ORDER DETAIL].OID = EVENT.OID " & _ "AND [ORDER DETAIL].[Line No] = EVENT.[Line No] " & _ "SET [ORDER DETAIL].ScheduleReady = Yes " & _ "WHERE [ORDER DETAIL].Accept = Yes " & _ "AND [ORDER DETAIL].Start <= Date() " & _ "AND (EVENT.Completed = No OR EVENT.Completed IS NULL);" db.Execute sql, 128 ' Step 2 - Priority = Low (feeds/ferts) sql = "UPDATE [ORDER DETAIL] INNER JOIN EVENT " & _ "ON [ORDER DETAIL].OID = EVENT.OID " & _ "AND [ORDER DETAIL].[Line No] = EVENT.[Line No] " & _ "SET [ORDER DETAIL].Priority = 'Low' " & _ "WHERE [ORDER DETAIL].Accept = Yes " & _ "AND ([ORDER DETAIL].Pest LIKE '*feed*' OR [ORDER DETAIL].Pest LIKE '*fert*') " & _ "AND (EVENT.Completed = No OR EVENT.Completed IS NULL);" db.Execute sql, 128 ' Step 3 - Priority = Medium (no priority yet) sql = "UPDATE [ORDER DETAIL] INNER JOIN EVENT " & _ "ON [ORDER DETAIL].OID = EVENT.OID " & _ "AND [ORDER DETAIL].[Line No] = EVENT.[Line No] " & _ "SET [ORDER DETAIL].Priority = 'Medium' " & _ "WHERE [ORDER DETAIL].Accept = Yes " & _ "AND [ORDER DETAIL].Priority IS NULL " & _ "AND (EVENT.Completed = No OR EVENT.Completed IS NULL);" db.Execute sql, 128 ' Step 4 - Priority = High (10+ days past start) sql = "UPDATE [ORDER DETAIL] INNER JOIN EVENT " & _ "ON [ORDER DETAIL].OID = EVENT.OID " & _ "AND [ORDER DETAIL].[Line No] = EVENT.[Line No] " & _ "SET [ORDER DETAIL].Priority = 'High' " & _ "WHERE [ORDER DETAIL].Accept = Yes " & _ "AND Date() - [ORDER DETAIL].Start > 10 " & _ "AND [ORDER DETAIL].Priority <> 'Low' " & _ "AND (EVENT.Completed = No OR EVENT.Completed IS NULL);" db.Execute sql, 128 ' Step 5 - Priority = Urgent (20+ days past start) sql = "UPDATE [ORDER DETAIL] INNER JOIN EVENT " & _ "ON [ORDER DETAIL].OID = EVENT.OID " & _ "AND [ORDER DETAIL].[Line No] = EVENT.[Line No] " & _ "SET [ORDER DETAIL].Priority = 'Urgent' " & _ "WHERE [ORDER DETAIL].Accept = Yes " & _ "AND Date() - [ORDER DETAIL].Start > 20 " & _ "AND [ORDER DETAIL].Priority <> 'Low' " & _ "AND (EVENT.Completed = No OR EVENT.Completed IS NULL);" db.Execute sql, 128 MsgBox "Scheduling updated successfully.", vbInformation Call RefreshAllSubforms End Sub ' ---- GEOCODE (Nominatim + CartoDB tiles) ------------------- Private Function NormalizeCity(sCity As String) As String Select Case Trim(LCase(sCity)) Case "old greenwich": NormalizeCity = "Greenwich" Case "cos cob": NormalizeCity = "Greenwich" Case "riverside": NormalizeCity = "Greenwich" Case "southport": NormalizeCity = "Fairfield" Case Else: NormalizeCity = sCity End Select End Function Private Function FetchLatLon(sURL As String) As String Dim http As Object Dim sResponse As String Dim latStart As Long, latEnd As Long Dim lonStart As Long, lonEnd As Long Dim sLat As String, sLon As String Set http = CreateObject("WinHttp.WinHttpRequest.5.1") http.Open "GET", sURL, False http.SetRequestHeader "User-Agent", "GreenleafSuperScheduler/1.0" http.Send sResponse = http.ResponseText If sResponse = "[]" Or sResponse = "" Then FetchLatLon = "" Exit Function End If latStart = InStr(sResponse, Chr(34) & "lat" & Chr(34) & ":" & Chr(34)) + 7 latEnd = InStr(latStart, sResponse, Chr(34)) sLat = Mid(sResponse, latStart, latEnd - latStart) lonStart = InStr(sResponse, Chr(34) & "lon" & Chr(34) & ":" & Chr(34)) + 7 lonEnd = InStr(lonStart, sResponse, Chr(34)) sLon = Mid(sResponse, lonStart, lonEnd - lonStart) If sLat = "" Or sLon = "" Or latStart <= 7 Then FetchLatLon = "" Else FetchLatLon = sLat & "," & sLon End If Set http = Nothing End Function Private Function GeoCode(sStreet As String, sCity As String, sZip As String) As String Dim sNormCity As String Dim sURL As String Dim sResult As String Dim sBBox As String sBBox = "&bounded=1&viewbox=-80%2C45%2C-66%2C38" sNormCity = NormalizeCity(sCity) sURL = "https://nominatim.openstreetmap.org/search?format=json&limit=1&q=" & _ EncodeURL(sStreet & ", " & sNormCity & ", CT") & sBBox sResult = FetchLatLon(sURL) If sResult <> "" Then GeoCode = sResult Exit Function End If If sZip <> "" Then sURL = "https://nominatim.openstreetmap.org/search?format=json&limit=1&q=" & _ EncodeURL(sStreet & ", " & sZip) & sBBox sResult = FetchLatLon(sURL) If sResult <> "" Then GeoCode = sResult Exit Function End If End If sURL = "https://nominatim.openstreetmap.org/search?format=json&limit=1&q=" & _ EncodeURL(sNormCity & ", CT") & sBBox GeoCode = FetchLatLon(sURL) End Function Private Function EncodeURL(s As String) As String Dim result As String result = s result = Replace(result, " ", "+") result = Replace(result, ",", "%2C") result = Replace(result, "&", "%26") result = Replace(result, "#", "%23") EncodeURL = result End Function ' ---- CREW MAP BUTTONS ------------------------------------- Private Sub cmdMapCrew1_Click() Dim db As Object Dim rs As Object Dim sql As String Dim sFilePath As rs = db.OpenRecordset(sql) If rs.EOF And rs.BOF Then MsgBox "No jobs assigned to Crew 1 for " & sDate & ".", vbExclamation Exit Sub End If Do While Not rs.EOF sName = Replace(Nz(rs!Lname, ""), "'", City], Nz(rs!Zip, "")) If sLatLon <> "" Then sLat = Split(sLatLon, ",")(0) sLon = Split(sLatLon, ",")(1) sPest = Replace(Nz(rs!Pest, ""), "'", "\'") sAddrClean = Replace(sAddr, "'", "\'") If sMarkers <> "" Then sMarkers = sMarkers & "," & vbCrLf sMarkers = sMarkers & " { name: '" & sName & "', addr: '" & sAddrClean & "', pest: '" & sPest & "', grid: '" & sGrid & "', lat: " & sLat & ", lon: " & sLon & " }" nPlotted = nPlotted + 1 End If End If rs.MoveNext Loop rs.Close Set rs = Nothing Set db = Nothing If sMarkers = "" Then MsgBox "No addresses could be geocoded for Crew 1.", vbExclamation Exit Sub End If sFilePath = Environ("TEMP") & "\Crew1Map.html" iFile = FreeFile Open sFilePath For Output As #iFile Print #iFile, "" Print #iFile, "" Print #iFile, "Greenleaf Crew 1 Map" Print #iFile, "" Print #iFile, "" Print #iFile, "" Print #iFile, "" Print #iFile, "
Greenleaf SuperScheduler — Crew 1 — " & sDate & " " & nPlotted & " stops
